text: Forced - When this agenda would advance by reaching its doom threshold: Instead, remove all doom in play and shuffle a random set-aside [[Monster]] enemy into the [[Leads]] deck. Then, if there are no set-aside [[Monster]] enemies, advance to agenda 1b.

name: Trail Goes Cold
text: Angry Mob cannot be defeated. [reaction] After Wendy Adams evades Angry Mob: She may discover 1 clue from its location. Each [[Suspect]] enemy loses aloof and enters play with +1 [per_investigator] clues. Each [[Hideout]] location gets +1 [per_investigator] clue value.

name: Searching for Dad
text: [[Suspect]] and [[Hideout]] cards cannot be added to the victory display except using Mysterious Photo. Forced – If there are no [[Suspect]] or [[Hideout]] cards in play: Wendy Adams must draw cards from the top of the Leads deck until she draws a [[Suspect]] or [[Hideout]] card. Objective – Search for Dad using Mysterious Photo. The fewer cards that remain in the Leads deck, the better. If it is empty, advance.

name: Mysterious Photo
text: [fast] Exhaust Mysterious Photo: Either take a parley action on a [[Suspect]] enemy or flip Mysterious Photo over. [fast] If there is a [[Suspect]] enemy with no clues on it at your location, investigators at your location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group (2 [per_investigator] clues instead if it is agenda 2): “Have you seen my dad?” Add that enemy to the victory display.

name: Mysterious Photo
text: [fast] Exhaust Mysterious Photo: Either take an investigate action at a [[Hideout]] location or flip Mysterious Photo over. [fast] If you are at a [[Hideout]] location with no clues on it, investigators at that location spend clues, as a group, equal to its clue value: “Where is Dad now?” Add that location to the victory display, moving each enemy and investigator there to a connecting location.

name: All or Nothing
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -1 for each clue you have. [cultist]: -2 (-4 instead if you have 10 or more resources). [tablet]: -2. If you fail, lose 3 resources. [elder_thing]: -3. If you fail, "Skids" O'Toole takes 1 horror.

name: Eyes All Around You
text: [action] If you are in the Clover Club Cardroom, spend any number of clues: You cash in your chips. Gain 5 resources for each clue just spent. Forced - If "Skids" O'Toole is defeated: (→R2)

name: Playing Cards
text: Investigators cannot resign. Clover Club Pit Boss gains aloof. Forced - After a [[Criminal]] enemy is defeated: Place 1 doom on the agenda. Objective - At the end of the round: If an investigator has 15 or more resources, advance.

name: Hot on Your Tail
text: Each [[Criminal]] enemy gains hunter and gets +1 health. Forced - When an investigator resigns: Place each of that investigator's resources on this act. Objective - Collect as many resources as you can and get out. When each undefeated investigator has resigned, advance.

name: Siobhan Riley
text: Forced - After Siobhan Riley engages you: For every 5 resources you have, lose 1 resource. Forced - After an investigator at Siobhan Riley's location gains 1 or more resources during the investigation phase: Siobhan Riley readies, engages that investigator, and makes an attack.

name: Clover Club Bouncer
text: When Clover Club Bouncer is engaged with you, it gets +1 fight and +1 evade for every 5 resources you have. [action] Spend 3 resources: Parley. Test [intellect] (2). If you succeed, disengage from Clover Club Bouncer and exhaust it. It does not ready during the next upkeep phase.

name: Laid to Rest
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is 1 more than the number of copies of Unfinished Business in the victory display. [cultist]: -X. X is the number of cards attached to The Beyond. [tablet]: -X. X is the number of [[Spectral]] locations in play. [elder_thing]: -2. If there is a [[Geist]] enemy at your location, reveal another token.

name: Gathering Mists
text: Forced – When the enemy phase begins: Deal 1 damage to Jean Devereux for each ready Ravenous Spirit at his location. Forced – If Jim Culver is defeated: Advance the act. [action] Spend 2 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Parley. You banish a spirit. Discard the top card of the Spirit deck. (Hint: Draw Heretics out of the Beyond and summon them with Jean’s help!)

name: Laid to Rest
text: [fast] Either exhaust Jim’s Trumpet, or spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Choose an enemy to move once toward Jim Culver’s location. [fast] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Flip your location. (Group limit once per round per location.) Objective – If there are 4 copies of Unfinished Business in the victory display, advance.

name: Jean Devereux
text: Aloof. Patrol (Nearest location with a Ravenous Spirit enemy beneath it). Cannot be engaged. [action] Draw a facedown card beneath Jean Devereux’s location and choose a Heretic attached to The Beyond: Parley. Jim Culver draws the chosen Heretic, flips it, and resolves its text. Forced – When Jean Devereux would be defeated: Instead, heal all damage from him and flip him.

name: Jean Devereux
text: Hunter. Prey – Jim Culver only. [action]: Parley. Test [willpower] (3). This test gets +1 difficulty for each copy of Unfinished Business in the victory display. If you succeed, heal all damage from Jean Devereux and flip him (he is no longer engaged) . Forced – If Jean Devereux is defeated: Advance the act.

name: Ravenous Spirit
text: Aloof. Patrol (Jean Devereux’s location). Retaliate. Ravenous Spirit gets +2 [per_investigator] health. Forced – When this enemy enters a location: Flip that location to its [[Spectral]] side. One at a time, each investigator at that location resolves each haunted ability on it.

name: Enthralling Encore
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the number of measures. [cultist]: -2. If you fail, you must either spend 1 clue or take 1 damage. [tablet]: -3 (-5 instead if there are 3 or more classes among cards you control). [elder_thing]: -2. If Sinister Soloist is at your location, reveal another token.

name: The Haunting of the Ward Theatre
text: [fast] While at Sinister Soloist's location, discard 1 card of each class from your hand ([guardian], [seeker], [rogue], [mystic], and [survivor]): Parley. Automatically evade Sinister Soloist. Treat Sinister Soloist's text box as if it were blank (except for [[Traits]]) for the remainder of the round.

name: Break Free from the Past
text: [fast] Investigators at the same [[Private]] location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Parley. Reveal the top 3 cards of the Props deck and choose an investigator to draw 1 of them. Shuffle the remaining cards together and place them on the bottom of the Props deck. Objective - When Sinister Soloist is in the victory display, advance.

name: Sinister Soloist
text: Alert. Aloof. Elusive. Hunter. As an additional cost to play a non-Neutral card at Sinister Soloist's location, you must take 1 horror. Forced - When the enemy phase ends, if Sinister Soloist is ready: Each investigator at Sinister Soloist's location and each connecting location takes 1 direct horror.

name: Read or Die
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the number of [[Tome]] assets Daisy Walker controls. [cultist]: Reveal another token. If you fail, discard the top 2 cards of your deck. [tablet]: -2. If this is an attack or evasion attempt against Namer of the Dead and you do not succeed by at least 2, it attacks you. [elder_thing]: -3. If you fail, Daisy Walker takes 1 horror.

name: Mortal Inquiry
text: Dr. Henry Armitage does not take up an ally slot and gains: "You have 2 additional hand slots, which can only be used to hold [[Tome]] assets." "Jazz" Mulligan gains: "[action]: Move to a [[Miskatonic]] location up to 3 connections away."

name: Speed Reading
text: Ignore all Objectives on locations. [fast] If you are Daisy Walker, investigators at your location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues: Shuffle 1 facedown player card beneath this location into your deck. Objective - Find a way to banish the Namer of the Dead before it is too late.

name: Namer of the Dead
text: Hunter. Prey - Daisy Walker only. Forced - When Namer of the Dead would be defeated: Instead, fully heal it, exhaust it, and move it to Orne Library. [action] If you are Daisy Walker and you control at least 4 non-weakness [[Tome]] assets: Parley. Test [willpower] (18). This test gets -2 difficulty for each [[Tome]] asset you control. If you succeed, advance the act.

name: Roland Banks
text: At deck creation, choose 3 different Directive assets to add to your deck. [fast]: Flip a Directive asset facedown (ignoring its permanent keyword) . (Limit once per game.) [elder_sign] effect: +2. Choose a Directive asset. You may ignore its regulation ability this round.

name: Directive
text: Roland Banks deck only. Permanent. Regulation - You cannot fight more than twice each round. [fast] During a skill test while investigating, evading, or parleying, exhaust this Directive: You get +2 skill value for this test for each enemy engaged with you.

name: Directive
text: Roland Banks deck only. Permanent. Regulation - You cannot play more than 2 cards each round. [reaction] When you play an [[Insight]] or [[Tactic]] event, exhaust this Directive: That event gains fast.

name: Directive
text: Roland Banks deck only. Permanent. Regulation - You cannot voluntarily assign damage or horror to [[Ally]] assets. You have 1 additional ally slot.

name: Directive
text: Roland Banks deck only. Permanent. Regulation - When your location has 1 or more clues, you cannot commit cards to skill tests unless you have discovered a clue this round. [reaction] After you discover a clue, if an enemy is at your location, exhaust this Directive: Draw 1 card.

name: Directive
text: Roland Banks deck only. Permanent. Regulation - You cannot move more than twice each round. You get +3 sanity.

name: Roland's .38 Special
text: Roland Banks deck only. Advanced. Uses (4 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack (if there are 1 or more clues on your location, you get +4 [combat], instead). This attack deals +1 damage. If this attack defeats an enemy and there are no clues on your location, place 1 ammo on Roland's .38 Special

name: Cover Up
text: Advanced. Revelation - Put Cover Up into play in your threat area, with 4 clues on it. [reaction] When you would discover 1 or more clues at your location: Discard that many clues from Cover Up instead. Forced - When the game ends, if there are any clues on Cover Up: You suffer 1 mental trauma.

name: Agnes Baker
text: As an additional cost to play a [[Spell]] event, you may take 1 damage. If you do, reduce the cost to play that event by 2, and you may shuffle that event back into your deck instead of discarding it. [elder_sign] effect: +1. You may heal 1 damage.

name: Heirloom of Hyperborea
text: Agnes Baker deck only. Advanced. Only damage and/or horror from player card effects can be assigned to Heirloom of Hyperborea. [reaction] After you play a [[Spell]] card: Draw 1 card.

name: Dark Memory
text: Advanced. Place 1 doom on the current agenda. This effect can cause the current agenda to advance. Forced - If Dark Memory is in your hand at the end of your turn, reveal it and take 2 horror.

name: Jenny Barnes
text: [reaction] After your turn begins: Play a [[Talent]] asset, reducing its cost by 1. [fast] Discard a [[Talent]] asset you control: Gain resources equal to that asset's printed cost. (Limit 5 resources per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +0. If you succeed, gain 3 resources.

name: Jenny's Twin .45s
text: Jenny Barnes deck only. Advanced. Uses (X ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. [reaction] After you defeat an enemy using the above ability, exhaust Jenny's Twin .45s: Gain resources equal to that enemy's printed health.

name: Searching for Izzie
text: Advanced. Revelation - Attach Searching for Izzie to the location farthest from you. Attached location gets +2 shroud. [action] [action]: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, discard Searching for Izzie. Forced - When the game ends, if Searching for Izzie is in play: You suffer 1 mental trauma.

name: "Skids" O'Toole
text: [fast] Spend up to 3 resources: Test a base skill value of 3 against a difficulty equal to the amount of resources just spent. If you succeed, gain twice the number of spent resources. Only [agility] and [wild] skill icons may be committed to this test. (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +1. Choose a level 2 or less card in your discard pile. Add the chosen card to your hand.

name: On the Lam
text: "Skids" O'Toole deck only. Advanced. Fast. Play during any [fast] window. Until the end of the round, non-[[Elite]] enemies cannot attack you. At the end of the round, you may disengage from each engaged enemy and move up to 2 locations away.

name: Hospital Debts
text: Advanced. Revelation - Put Hospital Debts into play in your threat area. [fast]: Move 1 resource from your resource pool to Hospital Debts. (Limit three times per round.) Forced - When the game ends, if Hospital Debts has fewer than 9 resources on it: You earn 2 fewer experience for this scenario.

name: Monterey Jack
text: [reaction] After you discover the last clue at your location: Search the top X cards of your deck for a [[Charm]] or [[Relic]] asset and play it, reducing its cost by X. X is the printed shroud of your location. Shuffle your deck. (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +1. Gain 1 resource for each [[Charm]] asset and each [[Relic]] asset you control.

name: Trusty Bullwhip
text: Fast. Monterey Jack deck only. Advanced. [action]: Fight. This attack uses [agility] instead of [combat]. You get +2 skill value for this attack. If this attack succeeds, you may exhaust Trusty Bullwhip to deal +1 damage for this attack and automatically evade the attacked enemy.

name: Buried Secrets
text: Advanced. Revelation - Put Buried Secrets into play in your threat area. If your location can be investigated, you cannot move except by scenario card effects. [action] [action]: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, discard Buried Secrets.

name: Zoey Samaras
text: [reaction] After you deal 1 or more damage to an enemy: Add 1 [bless] token to the chaos bag. (Limit once per phase.) [fast] Before you reveal chaos tokens during an attack, remove 3 [bless] tokens from the chaos bag: This attack deals +1 damage. (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +1 for each [bless] token in the chaos bag.

name: Zoey's Cross
text: Zoey Samaras deck only. Advanced. [reaction] After you engage an enemy, exhaust Zoey’s Cross and spend 1 resource: Deal 1 damage to that enemy. [fast] Remove 2 [bless] tokens from the chaos bag: Engage an enemy at your location.

name: Smite the Wicked
text: Advanced. Attached enemy gets +2 fight and +2 health. Revelation - Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until an enemy is discarded. Attach Smite the Wicked to that enemy and spawn it at the location farthest from you. Forced - When the game ends, if attached enemy is in play: Zoey Samaras suffers 1 mental trauma.

name: Lola Hayes
text: You begin the game in the Neutral role. You can only play or commit Neutral cards or cards of your current role. Forced - When your turn begins: Switch your role ([guardian], [seeker], [rogue], [mystic], [survivor], or Neutral). [elder_sign] effect: +2. You may switch roles.

name: Leading Lady (Heroine)
text: Lola Hayes deck only. Replacement. Fast. Play only during your turn. Play a card from your hand, regardless of your current role (paying its cost) . If that card was a Guardian ([guardian]) card, you may either draw 1 card or immediately take a fight action.

name: Leading Lady (Mentor)
text: Lola Hayes deck only. Replacement. Fast. Play only during your turn. Play a card from your hand, regardless of your current role (paying its cost) . If that card was a Seeker ([seeker]) card, you may either draw 1 card or immediately take an investigate action.

name: Leading Lady (Femme Fatale)
text: Lola Hayes deck only. Replacement. Fast. Play only during your turn. Play a card from your hand, regardless of your current role (paying its cost) . If that card was a Rogue ([rogue]) card, you may either draw 1 card or immediately take an evade action.

name: Leading Lady (Enchantress)
text: Lola Hayes deck only. Replacement. Fast. Play only during your turn. Play a card from your hand, regardless of your current role (paying its cost) . If that card was a Mystic ([mystic]) card, you may either draw 1 card or remove 1 doom from a player card at your location.

name: Leading Lady (Final Girl)
text: Lola Hayes deck only. Replacement. Fast. Play only during your turn. Play a card from your hand, regardless of your current role (paying its cost) . If that card was a Survivor ([survivor]) card, you may either draw 1 card or heal 1 damage/horror.

name: Samuel Blake
text: Lola Hayes deck only. Replacement. Peril. Hidden. While Samuel Blake is in your hand, you cannot switch roles or play cards belonging to another role. While Samuel Blake is in play, as an additional cost for you to switch your role, you must take 1 horror.

name: Jim Culver
text: [reaction] After you reveal 1 or more [skull] or [curse] tokens during a skill test you are performing: Replenish 1 charge on an asset you control. (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +2. You may treat this token as if it were a [skull] or [curse] token instead.

name: Jim's Trumpet
text: Jim Culver deck only. Advanced. [reaction] When a [skull] or [curse] token is revealed during a skill test you are performing, exhaust Jim's Trumpet: Heal 1 horror from each investigator and [[Ally]] asset at your location or a connecting location.

name: Final Rhapsody
text: Advanced. Revelation - Reveal 5 chaos tokens from the chaos bag. For each non-[elder_sign], non-[bless] symbol token revealed, take 1 damage and 1 horror.

name: The Beyond
text: Jim Culver deck only. Permanent. Each attached spirit loses all printed traits and gains the [[Geist]] trait. When damage/horror would be placed on an attached spirit, it must be placed on Jim Culver, instead. Forced – When your turn begins: Attach the top card of the spirit deck to The Beyond, as a spirit. If 4 or more spirits are attached, flip this card and resolve its text.

name: The Beyond
text: Forced – One at a time, choose each non-weakness spirit attached to The Beyond and reveal a random token from the chaos bag. If it is... - ... an [elder_sign] token: You may either heal 1 horror, or attach the top card of the spirit deck to The Beyond, as a spirit. (Do not reveal tokens for the spirit you attach after resolving this effect.) - ... an [auto_fail] token: Discard this spirit. Take 1 direct damage/horror. - ...a [skull] token: Discard this spirit. Heal 1 horror. - ...a [cultist], [elder_thing], [tablet], or [curse] token: You must either discard this spirit or take 1 direct damage. - ...any other token: Discard this spirit. Flip this card back to its asset side. Reminder: Spirits attached to The Beyond are in play but only retain their names and text boxes. Spirits do not take up slots and do not have health or sanity values. When a unique spirit is attached to The Beyond, any other asset that shares its name and is already in play is discarded. Spirits are always discarded to the bottom of the spirit deck.

name: Vengeful Shade
text: Hunter. Prey – Jim Culver only. You may fight or evade this enemy while it is attached to The Beyond (as if it were engaged with you). If you succeed, discard it. If you fail, spawn it engaged with you. Forced – When you attach a spirit to The Beyond via its forced effect: Vengeful Shade attacks you (even if it is not at your location) .

name: Daisy Walker
text: You get +1 [willpower] and +1 sanity for each [[Tome]] asset you control. [fast]: One at a time, resolve an [action] ability on each [[Tome]] asset you control, ignoring their [action] cost. (Limit once per game.) [elder_sign] effect: +1. You may return a [[Tome]] asset from your discard pile to your hand.

name: Daisy's Tote Bag
text: Daisy Walker deck only. Advanced. You have 2 additional hand slots, which can only be used to hold [[Tome]] assets. [reaction] When you play a [[Tome]] asset during your turn, exhaust Daisy's Tote Bag: That asset gains fast.

name: The Necronomicon
text: Advanced. Revelation - Put this card into play in your threat area, with 3 horror on it. It cannot leave play while it has 1 or more horror on it. While it is in play, treat each [elder_sign] you reveal on a chaos token as a [cultist], [tablet], and [elder_thing] (resolve all three) . [action]: Move 1 horror from this card to Daisy Walker. Then, if The Necronomicon has no horror on it, discard it.

name: "Ashcan" Pete
text: You begin the game with Pete's Guitar in play. [reaction] When a card you own that is attached to a scenario card would be discarded: Add it to your hand instead. (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +1. Choose a card you own attached to a scenario card. You may return the chosen card to your hand.

name: Pete's Guitar
text: "Ashcan" Pete deck only. Replacement. [fast] Exhaust Pete's Guitar: Choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location or a connecting location. Move that enemy once in a direction of your choice. Then, if there are no enemies at your location, either heal 1 horror or gain 1 resource.

name: Hard Times
text: Replacement. Revelation - Put Hard Times into play in your threat area. Forced - After you draw 1 or more cards: Choose and discard that many cards from hand. [action][action]: Discard Hard Times.

name: Bad Blood
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the number of memories Agnes Baker has collected. [cultist]: -2. Ready Elspeth Baudin and resolve her patrol keyword. [tablet]: -3. If you fail and there is a memory at Elspeth Baudin's location, place this token on that location. [elder_thing]: -6. Agnes Baker may take up to 3 damage to increase your skill value by 2 for each damage taken.

name: Hyperborean Blood
text: Forced - At the end of the enemy phase, if Elspeth Baudin is ready and there is a memory at her location: Reveal a random token from the chaos bag and place it on that location. Forced - If there are 1 or more chaos tokens on a location without a memory: Return them to the chaos bag. Forced - If there are chaos tokens on a location with a memory that have a combined value of 6 or more (ignoring +/- and treating each [auto_fail] and [elder_sign] as a -6): Return them to the chaos bag, and Elspeth Baudin collects that memory.

name: A Walk Down Memory Lane
text: [fast] Investigators at Agnes Baker's location spend 2 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Agnes Baker collects the memory at her location. Forced - If Agnes Baker is defeated, proceed to (→R2) . Objective - Collect more memories than Elspeth. If all 9 memories have been collected (by either party) , advance.

name: Elspeth Baudin
text: Alert. Patrol (nearest location with at least 1 memory). Retaliate. Elspeth Baudin cannot be automatically evaded and gets -1 fight and -1 evade for each memory she has collected. Forced - When Elspeth Baudin would be defeated: Instead, heal all damage from her, flip her over, and resolve the text on her other side.

name: Triumph and Subjugation
text: Agnes Baker must decide (choose one): - Agnes Baker collects 1 memory from Elspeth Baudin. - Agnes Baker gains 2 [per_investigator] clues from the token bank. Then, flip this card over, exhausted and unengaged.

name: Wendy Adams
text: Add Tidal Memento to your deck. [reaction] After you successfully evade a non-[[Elite]] enemy: Seal either 1 [bless] or [curse] token from the chaos bag, or any [bless] or [curse] tokens revealed from the chaos bag during this test, on that enemy. [elder_sign] effect: +2. Search the chaos bag for up to 2 [bless] and/or [curse] tokens and reveal them, ignoring their effects.

name: Tidal Memento
text: Wendy Adams deck only. Permanent. [reaction] When an enemy would ready or doom would be placed on it, release a [bless] or [curse] token sealed on that enemy: Cancel that effect. [reaction] During a skill test you are performing, when a chaos token would be revealed from the chaos bag: Resolve a [bless] or [curse] token sealed on an enemy instead.

name: Wendy's Amulet
text: Wendy Adams deck only. Advanced. You may play any event in your discard pile as if it were in your hand. Forced - After you play an event or discard an event from play: Place it on the bottom of your deck instead of in your discard pile.

name: Abandoned and Alone
text: Advanced. Revelation - Remove all non-weakness cards in your discard pile from the game. If no cards were removed by this effect, shuffle this card back into your deck. Otherwise, take 3 direct horror.

name: Relics of the Past
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the number of locations with 1 or more doom on them. [cultist]: -1. If you are poisoned, reveal another token. [tablet]: -3. If you fail, place 1 doom on your location. [elder_thing]: -3. If you fail, the nearest ready unengaged [[Serpent]] enemy moves once toward your location.

name: Something Else Stirs...
text: *This agenda gets +1 [per_investigator] doom threshold. Forced - When this agenda advances: Do not remove doom from locations in play. Forced - When an investigator is defeated: That investigator shuffles each [[Ancient]] story asset they control into the exploration deck.

name: Dweller in the Pit
text: Hunter. Retaliate. Spawn - Engaged with Monterey Jack. Dweller in the Pit gets +1 [per_investigator] health and +1 fight for each vengeance point in the victory display (max +3 fight). Forced - After Dweller in the Pit deals damage to you, check your supplies: If you do not have the satchel, shuffle each [[Ancient]] asset you control into the exploration deck.

name: Guardian of the Relics
text: *This agenda gets +1 [per_investigator] doom threshold. Forced - When an investigator is defeated: That investigator shuffles each [[Ancient]] story asset they control into the exploration deck.

name: Crumbling Ruin
text: [action] If there are no clues on your location: Explore . Draw the top card of the exploration deck. If it is a connecting location, put it into play and move to it. Objective - When each surviving investigator is at Inner Chamber, they may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: Find the Way Out!
text: [action] If there are no clues on your location: Explore . Draw the top card of the exploration deck. If it is a connecting location, put it into play and move to it. Objective - Get out with as many [[Ancient]] relics as you can! If each surviving investigator has resigned, advance.

name: Secret Passage
text: Revelation - If Secret Passage is connected to your location, put it and the set-aside Inner Chamber into play. Otherwise, shuffle it into the exploration deck. Forced - After you enter Secret Passage: Check your supplies. If you have the compass, discover 1 clue from Secret Passage.

name: Inner Chamber
text: [action] Spend X clues: Reveal the top X cards of the exploration deck. Draw 1 non-location card revealed in this way and check your supplies. If you have chalk, you may choose 1 additional non-location card revealed and draw it. Shuffle the remaining cards into the exploration deck.

name: Ancient Hall
text: Forced - After doom is placed on Ancient Hall: Shuffle the top card of the encounter deck into the exploration deck. Any investigator at Ancient Hall may spend 3 resources to cancel this effect.

name: Jade Crocodile
text: Revelation - Put Jade Crocodile into play under your control. You must either place 1 doom on your location, or take 2 damage. Forced - When you resign: Add Jade Crocodile to the victory display.

name: Obsidian Jaguar
text: Revelation - Put Obsidian Jaguar into play under your control. You must either place 1 doom on your location, or the nearest enemy attacks you. Forced - When you resign: Add Obsidian Jaguar to the victory display.

name: Citrine Snake
text: Revelation - Put Citrine Snake into play under your control. If you are poisoned, take 1 direct damage. If you are not poisoned, put a set-aside Poisoned weakness into play in your threat area. Forced - When you resign: Add Citrine Snake to the victory display.

name: Turquoise Eagle
text: Revelation - Put Turquoise Eagle into play under your control. You must either place 1 doom on your location, or take 2 horror. Forced - When you resign: Add Turquoise Eagle to the victory display.

name: Vengeant Past
text: Peril. Revelation - For each [[Ancient]] story asset controlled by an investigator, you must either (choose one) : - Deal 1 damage or horror to that asset's controller. - Shuffle that asset into the exploration deck. After this effect resolves, shuffle Vengeant Past into the exploration deck.

name: Rex Murphy
text: [reaction] When you would either place 1 of your clues on your location, or add 2 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag: Do the other instead. (This can still satisfy the cost of an ability.) [elder_sign] effect: +2 for each [curse] token revealed during this test. Draw 1 card for each [curse] token revealed during this test.

name: Search for the Truth
text: Rex Murphy deck only. Advanced. For each clue on Rex Murphy (to a maximum of 5) you may either: - Draw 1 card. - Place that clue on your location and return any card from your discard pile to your hand.

name: Rex's Curse
text: Advanced. Revelation - Put Rex's Curse into play in your threat area. Forced - When you would succeed at a skill test: Reveal an additional chaos token. If this effect causes you to fail the test, shuffle Rex's Curse into your deck. (Limit once per test.)

name: Father Mateo
text: [fast] During your turn: Seal a [bless] token on an investigator at your location with no [bless] token sealed on them. (Limit once per round.) [reaction] When an investigator would reveal a chaos token: Resolve the [bless] token sealed on them instead. Release that token. [elder_sign] effect: +1. Resolve Father Mateo's [fast] ability, ignoring its limit.

name: The Codex of Ages
text: Father Mateo deck only. Advanced. Seal ([elder_sign] or up to 3 [bless]). You get +1 to each of your skills while there is a token sealed here. [reaction] When an investigator at your location would reveal a chaos token from the chaos bag: That investigator resolves a token sealed here instead, then releases that token. (Limit once per test.)

name: Serpents of Yig
text: Advanced. Prey - Father Mateo only. Hunter. Revelation - Search the chaos bag and all play areas for the [elder_sign] token and each [bless] token and seal them on Serpents of Yig.

name: By the Book
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the number of [[Cultist]] enemies in the victory display, to a maximum of 5. [cultist]: -2. If a [[Cultist]] enemy is engaged with you, reveal an additional chaos token. [tablet]: -3. Ready each [[Cultist]] enemy engaged with you. [elder_thing]: -4. If you fail, Roland Banks takes 1 damage.

name: A Covert Conspiracy
text: Forced - When a non-weakness [[Cultist]] enemy would be defeated: Heal damage from that enemy until it has 1 remaining health, instead. Forced - If Roland Banks is defeated: Proceed to (→R2) [action]: Resign. You don't want to miss your deadline, so you close the case.

name: Mr. Grey
text: Spawn - Engaged with Roland Banks. Hunter. Mr. Grey gets +2 [per_investigator] health. Forced - After Mr. Grey attacks an investigator: That investigator draws the top card of the encounter deck.

name: Your Deadline Nears
text: Forced - When a non-weakness [[Cultist]] enemy would be defeated: Heal damage from that enemy until it has 1 remaining health, instead. Forced - If Roland Banks is defeated: Proceed to (→R2) [action]: Resign. You don't want to miss your deadline, so you close the case.

name: Capture the Conspirators
text: [fast] The investigators spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Flip over a facedown conspirator at your location and put it into play engaged with you. [fast] Spend 1 resource: Exhaust a [[Cultist]] enemy engaged with you (it remains engaged) . Only Roland Banks may trigger this ability.] Objective - Parley with as many conspirators as you can. If 10 [[Cultist]] enemies are in the victory display, advance.

name: Arkham Police Station
text: Arkham Police Station is connected to Rivertown, Downtown, and Easttown, and vice versa. [fast]: Move to a connecting location. [fast] Choose a non-weakness [[Cultist]] enemy at this location and spend clues equal to its remaining health: Parley. Add that enemy to the victory display.

name: Where Doom Awaits
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -1 (-3 instead if you are at an [[Altered]] location). [cultist]: Reveal another token. Cancel the effects and icons of each skill card committed to this test. [tablet]: -2 (-4 instead if it is Agenda 2). [elder_thing]: -X. Discard the top 2 cards of your deck. X is the total printed cost of those discarded cards.

name: The Path to the Hill
text: Objective - When the investigators have collected the requisite number of clues, they must immediately spend them and advance.

name: Ascending the Hill (v. I)
text: Clues cannot be placed on non-[[Altered]] locations. Objective - When an investigator enters Sentinel Peak, advance.

name: Ascending the Hill (v. II)
text: Clues cannot be placed on non-[[Altered]] locations. Objective - When an investigator enters Sentinel Peak, advance.

name: Ascending the Hill (v. III)
text: Clues cannot be placed on non-[[Altered]] locations. Objective - When an investigator enters Sentinel Peak, advance.

name: The Gate Opens
text: Objective - Only investigators at Sentinel Peak may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: Base of the Hill
text: Base of the Hill is connected to each copy of Diverging Path. [action]: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, put a random set-aside Diverging Path into play. (Limit once per round.) [action]: Resign. "This is more than I signed up for!"

name: Ascending Path
text: Ascending Path is connected to each copy of Altered Path. [action]: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, put a random set-aside Altered Path into play. (Limit once per round.)

name: Sentinel Peak
text: Forced - When an investigator at this location draws a [[Hex]] card: That investigator takes 1 damage.

name: Slaughtered Woods
text: Forced - After you reveal Slaughtered Woods: Take 2 horror if you have no actions remaining.

name: Eerie Glade
text: Forced - After you reveal Eerie Glade: Discard the top 2 cards of your deck for each action you have remaining.

name: Destroyed Path
text: Forced - After you reveal Destroyed Path: Place 1 [per_investigator] doom on it. [action]: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, remove 1 doom from Destroyed Path.

name: Frozen Spring
text: Forced - After you reveal Frozen Spring: Lose the remainder of your actions and immediately end your turn.

name: Dimensional Gap
text: Forced - After you reveal Dimensional Gap: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until an enemy is discarded. Spawn that enemy here (instead of its normal spawn location).

name: A Tear in the Path
text: Forced - After you reveal A Tear in the Path: Take 2 damage if you have no actions remaining.

name: Uprooted Woods
text: Forced - After you reveal Uprooted Woods: Discard the top 5 cards of your deck if you have no actions remaining.

name: Lost Memories
text: Forced - After you reveal Lost Memories: Take 1 horror for each action you have remaining.

name: Seth Bishop
text: Retaliate.

name: Devotee of the Key
text: Spawn - Base of the Hill. Forced - At the end of the enemy phase, Devotee of the Key moves once toward Sentinel Peak. If Devotee of the Key is already at Sentinel Peak, discard it and add 2 doom to the current agenda, instead.

name: Crazed Shoggoth
text: Spawn - Nearest [[Altered]] location. Forced - When Crazed Shoggoth attacks: If this attack would defeat an investigator, that investigator is instead killed.

name: Rites Howled
text: Revelation - Discard the top 3 cards of each investigator's deck. Each investigator at an [[Altered]] location shuffles each weakness in his or her discard pile into his or her deck.

name: Spaces Between
text: Revelation - Flip each non-[[Sentinel Hill]] location in play to its unrevealed side, removing all clues from it. Each investigator and enemy at a location flipped in this way immediately moves to the nearest [[Sentinel Hill]] location. Shuffle each non- Sentinel Hill location, so the players do not know which is which.

name: Vortex of Time
text: Revelation - Each investigator at a [[Sentinel Hill]] location tests [willpower] (4). Each investigator who fails takes 2 damage.

name: Essex County Express
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the current Agenda #. [cultist]: -1. If you fail and it is your turn, lose all remaining actions and end your turn immediately. [tablet]: -2. Add 1 doom token to the nearest Cultist enemy. [elder_thing]: -3. If you fail, choose and discard a card from your hand.

name: Run!
text: Objective - If an investigator enters the Engine Car, immediately advance.

name: Get the Engine Running!
text: Objective - If there are no clues in the Engine Car, immediately advance.

name: Passenger Car
text: Passenger Car is connected to the locations to the left and right of it. Forced - After you enter Passenger Car: You must either discard cards from your hand with at least 2 total [agility] icons or take 2 damage.

name: Passenger Car
text: Passenger Car is connected to the locations to the left and right of it. Forced - After you enter Passenger Car: You must either discard cards from your hand with at least 2 total [combat] icons or take 2 damage.

name: Passenger Car
text: Passenger Car is connected to the locations to the left and right of it. Forced - After you enter Passenger Car: You must either discard cards from your hand with at least 2 total [willpower] icons or take 2 horror.

name: Passenger Car
text: Passenger Car is connected to the locations to the left and right of it. Forced - After you enter Passenger Car: You must either discard cards from your hand with at least 2 total [intellect] icons or take 2 horror.

name: Passenger Car
text: Passenger Car is connected to the locations to the left and right of it. Forced - After you enter Passenger Car: You must either discard a card from your hand with at least 1 [wild] icon or take 1 damage and 1 horror.

name: Sleeping Car
text: Sleeping Car is connected to the locations to the left and right of it. [action]: Gain 3 resources. Remember that you have "stolen a passenger's luggage." (Group limit once per game).

name: Dining Car
text: Dining Car is connected to the locations to the left and right of it. Forced - After you reveal Dining Car: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for a Grappling Horror and draw it.

name: Parlor Car
text: Parlor Car is connected to the locations to the left and right of it. Parlor Car cannot be investigated. [action] Spend 3 resources: Discover 1 clue in the Parlor Car.

name: Engine Car
text: Engine Car is connected to the location to the left of it.

name: Engine Car
text: Engine Car is connected to the location to the left of it. Forced - After you reveal Engine Car: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for a Grappling Horror and draw it. Shuffle the encounter deck.

name: Engine Car
text: Engine Car is connected to the location to the left of it. Forced - After you reveal Engine Car: Draw the top 3 cards of the encounter deck.

name: Across Space and Time
text: Revelation - Discard the top 3 cards of your deck.

name: Helpless Passenger
text: Surge. Revelation - Put Helpless Passenger into play at the location to your left (or at your location if you cannot). [action] Parley. Take control of Helpless Passenger. Forced - If Helpless Passenger leaves play: Each investigator takes 1 horror.

name: Claws of Steam
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, take 2 damage and you cannot move from this location this round. Damage from this effect must be assigned to your assets first, if able.

name: Broken Rails
text: Revelation - Each investigator at your location loses 1 action. Each investigator at your location with 4 or more damage must also discard an asset he or she controls.

name: Grappling Horror
text: Hunter. While you are engaged with Grappling Horror, you cannot move.

name: Emergent Monstrosity
text: Spawn - The location to your right (or your location if there is no location to your right). Emergent Monstrosity enters play exhausted.

name: "If it bleeds..."
text: Fast. Play after you defeat a [[Monster]] enemy. Each investigator at your location heals horror equal to that enemy's horror value.

name: Springfield M1903
text: Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +3 [combat] and deal +2 damage for this attack. Cannot be used to attack enemies engaged with you.

name: Inquiring Mind
text: Commit to a skill test only if there is a clue at your location.

name: Expose Weakness
text: Fast. Play during any [fast] player window. Choose an enemy at your location. Test [intellect] (X), where X is that enemy's fight value. For each point you succeed by, reduce that enemy's fight value by 1 for the next attack performed against it this phase.

name: Quick Thinking
text: If this skill test is successful by 2 or more, after it resolves, you may immediately take an action as if it were your turn (this action does not count toward the number of actions you can take each turn).

name: Lucky Dice
text: Exceptional. [reaction] When you reveal a non-[auto_fail] chaos token, spend 2 resources: Ignore that chaos token and reveal another one to resolve. If that token has a [auto_fail] symbol, remove Lucky Dice from the game (cannot be ignored/canceled).

name: Opportunist
text: Commit only to a skill test you are performing. If you succeed by 2 or more, return Opportunist to your hand after this test instead of discarding it.

name: Alyssa Graham
text: You get +1 [intellect]. [fast] Exhaust Alyssa Graham: Look at the top card of either the encounter deck or any player deck. You may then add 1 doom to Alyssa Graham to place the looked-at card on the bottom of its deck.

name: Rite of Seeking
text: Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Investigate. Investigate using [willpower] instead of [intellect]. You get +2 [willpower] for this test. If successful, you discover 2 additional clues at this location. If a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol is revealed during this test, after this test resolves lose all remaining actions and immediately end your turn.

name: Dark Horse
text: Limit 1 per investigator. During the upkeep phase, you may choose to not gain resources. While you have no resources in your resource pool, you get +1 [willpower], +1 [intellect], +1 [combat], and +1 [agility].

name: Survival Instinct
text: If this test is successful during an evasion attempt, the evading investigator may immediately evade each other enemy engaged with him or her, and may move to a connecting location.

name: Dr. Henry Armitage
text: [reaction] After you draw a non-weakness card, discard that card and exhaust Dr. Henry Armitage: Gain 3 resources.

name: Extracurricular Activity
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -1. If you fail, discard the top 3 cards of your deck. [cultist]: -1 (-3 instead if there are 10 or more cards in your discard pile). [elder_thing]: -X. Discard the top 2 cards of your deck. X is the total printed cost of those discarded cards.

name: Dead of Night
text: Each investigator's maximum hand size is reduced by 3 while checking his or her hand size during the upkeep phase.

name: The Beast Unleashed
text: Forced - When this agenda would advance by reaching its doom threshold: Instead, remove all doom in play and move The Experiment 1 location toward the Dormitories. Objective - If The Experiment enters the Dormitories, advance.

name: Rice's Whereabouts
text: [action] Spend 1 clue: Discard the top 5 cards of the encounter deck (top 10 instead if there is only 1 player in the game). Forced - If you discard "Jazz" Mulligan for any reason, resolve his revelation effect. Objective - When you take control of "Jazz" Mulligan, advance.

name: Campus Safety
text: Objective - Find and complete an objective on another encounter card.

name: Miskatonic Quad
text: [action]: Resign. "We can't find Rice anywhere..." You leave the campus, hoping Armitage will forgive you.

name: Humanities Building
text: Forced - At the end of your turn, if you are in the Humanities Building: Discard the top X cards of your deck, where X is the amount of horror on you.

name: Orne Library
text: You must spend 1 additional action to investigate the Orne Library.

name: Student Union
text: Forced - After Student Union is revealed: Put the set-aside Dormitories into play. [action] [action]: Heal 1 damage and 1 horror.

name: Dormitories
text: Objective - If investigators in the Dormitories spend 3 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: (→R2)

name: Administration Building
text: Forced - After Administration Building is revealed: Put the set-aside Faculty Offices into play. Forced - At the end of your turn, if you are in the Administration Building: Discard the top card of your deck.

name: Faculty Offices
text: Forced - After Faculty Offices is revealed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[Humanoid]] enemy and spawn it here. Shuffle the encounter deck. Objective - If investigators in the Faculty Offices spend 2 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: (→R1)

name: Science Building
text: Forced - After Science Building is revealed: Put the set-aside Alchemy Labs into play. Forced - When you fail a [willpower] test in the Science Building: Take 1 damage.

name: Alchemy Labs
text: [action]: Investigate. If you are successful, instead of discovering clues, take the Alchemical Concoction from underneath this location if able.

name: The Experiment
text: Massive. The Experiment gets +3 [per_investigator] health. Forced - When the enemy phase begins: Ready The Experiment. Objective - If The Experiment is defeated, advance to act 3b.

name: Alchemical Concoction
text: [action]: Fight. This attack uses [intellect] instead of [combat]. If used to attack The Experiment, this attack deals +6 damage. If you succeed, remove Alchemical Concoction from the game.

name: "Jazz" Mulligan
text: Revelation - Put "Jazz" Mulligan into play at your location. While "Jazz" Mulligan is not controlled by a player, he gains: "[action]: Parley. Test [intellect] (3). If successful, take control of "Jazz" Mulligan." While you control "Jazz" Mulligan, you ignore the text on each unrevealed [[Miskatonic]] location.

name: Professor Warren Rice
text: You get +1 [intellect]. [reaction] After you discover the last remaining clue in your location, exhaust Professor Warren Rice: Draw 1 card.

name: The House Always Wins
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -2. You may spend 2 resources to treat this token as a 0, instead. [cultist]: -3. If you succeed, gain 3 resources. [tablet]: -2. If you fail, discard 3 resources.

name: The Clover Club
text: Each [[Criminal]] enemy gains Aloof. If an investigator deals damage to a [[Criminal]] enemy: Immediately advance.

name: Chaos in the Clover Club
text: Forced - At the start of the enemy phase: Discard each [[Criminal]] enemy in the same location as an [[Abomination]] enemy.

name: Beginner's Luck
text: [reaction] When you reveal a chaos token: You may treat that token as if it were any other token in the chaos bag. If you do, remember that you have "cheated." (Group limit once per round.) Objective - When the investigators have collected the requisite number of clues, they must immediately spend them and advance.

name: Skin Game
text: Objective - Only investigators in the VIP Area may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: All In
text: While Dr. Morgan is not controlled by a player, he gains "[action]: Parley. Test [willpower] (3) to shake Dr. Morgan out of his daze. If you succeed, place 1 clue from the token bank on him. If there are 1 [per_investigator] clues on Dr. Morgan, take control of him." Objective - If each undefeated investigator has resigned, advance.

name: Fold
text: While Peter Clover is not controlled by a player, he gains "[action]: Parley. Test [willpower] (3) to convince Peter to follow you. If you succeed, place 1 clue from the token bank on him. If there are 1 [per_investigator] clues on Peter Clover, take control of him." Objective - If each undefeated investigator has resigned, advance.

name: La Bella Luna
text: [action]: Resign. This was a bust.

name: Clover Club Lounge
text: While it is Act 1, Clover Club Lounge gains: "[action] Discard an [[Ally]] asset from your hand: Gain 2 clues from the token pool. (Limit once per game.)"

name: Clover Club Bar
text: While it is Act 1, Clover Club Bar gains: "[action] Spend 2 resources: Gain 2 clues from the token pool and draw 2 cards. Remember that you have 'had a drink.' (Limit once per game.)"

name: Clover Club Cardroom
text: While it is Act 1, Clover Club Cardroom gains: "[action] Spend 2 resources: Reveal a random chaos token. If it is a [elder_sign] symbol, gain 2 clues and 2 resources from the token bank. If it is an even number, gain 2 clues from the token bank. If it is an odd number or a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol, nothing happens."

name: Darkened Hall
text: Forced - When Darkened Hall is revealed: Put into play the 3 set-aside Back Hall Doorway locations.

name: Art Gallery
text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating the Art Gallery: Lose 2 resources.

name: VIP Area
text: While you are in the VIP Area, you cannot draw cards or gain resources during the upkeep phase.

name: Back Alley
text: [action]: Resign. We can get out this way!

name: Clover Club Pit Boss
text: Prey - Highest [intellect]. Hunter. Forced - After an investigator at Clover Club Pit Boss's location gains any number of clues: Clover Club Pit Boss readies, engages that investigator, and makes an immediate attack.

name: Peter Clover
text: Forced - At the start of the enemy phase, if no investigator controls Peter Clover: Deal 1 damage to him. [fast] Exhaust Peter Clover: Automatically evade a [[Criminal]] enemy in your location.

name: Dr. Francis Morgan
text: You get +1 [combat]. [reaction] After you defeat an enemy, exhaust Dr. Francis Morgan: Draw 1 card.

name: Something in the Drinks
text: Surge. Revelation - Each player who has "had a drink" loses 1 action.

name: Arousing Suspicions
text: Revelation - Place 1 doom on each [[Criminal]] enemy at your location. If no doom was placed by this effect, lose 2 resources.

name: Visions of Futures Past
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (5). For each point you fail by, discard the top card of your deck.

name: Beyond the Veil
text: Surge. Revelation - Put Beyond the Veil into play in your threat area if there is no copy of Beyond the Veil in your threat area. Forced - If your deck has no cards in it: Take 10 damage and discard Beyond the Veil.

name: Light of Aforgomon
text: Peril. Revelation - You must attach Light of Aforgomon to either the current agenda or the current act. Limit 1 per agenda/act. Treat all damage as direct damage and all horror as direct horror.

name: Thrall
text: Spawn - Location with the most clues. Retaliate.

name: Wizard of Yog-Sothoth
text: Prey - Least cards in hand. Hunter. Forced - When the engaged investigator draws a [[Hex]] or [[Pact]] card: Wizard of Yog-Sothoth attacks that investigator.

name: Unhallowed Country
text: Revelation - Put Unhallowed Country into play in your threat area. You cannot play [[Ally]] assets. Treat the printed text box of each [[Ally]] asset you control as if it were blank. Forced - At the end of your turn: Test [willpower] (3). If you succeed, discard Unhallowed Country.

name: Sordid and Silent
text: Revelation - Attach Sordid and Silent to your location. Forced - At the end of the round: Each investigator at attached location takes 1 horror. Forced - When the agenda advances: Discard Sordid and Silent.

name: Whippoorwill
text: Aloof. Hunter. Each investigator at Whippoorwill's location gets -1 [willpower], -1 [intellect], -1 [combat], and -1 [agility].

name: Eager for Death
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (2). Increase this skill test's difficulty by 1 for each damage on you. If you fail, take 2 horror.

name: Cursed Luck
text: Revelation - Put Cursed Luck into play in your threat area. You get -1 skill value during skill tests. Forced - After you succeed at a skill test by 1 or more: Discard Cursed Luck.

name: Twist of Fate
text: Revelation - Reveal a random token from the chaos bag. If you reveal a [elder_sign] symbol or positive number, nothing happens. If you reveal any other number, take 1 damage. If you reveal a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol, take 2 horror.

name: Avian Thrall
text: Prey - Lowest [intellect]. Hunter. While Avian Thrall is being attacked using a [[Ranged]], [[Firearm]], or [[Spell]] asset, it gets -3 fight.

name: Lupine Thrall
text: Spawn - Farthest location from you. Prey - Lowest [agility]. Hunter. Retaliate.

name: Altered Beast
text: Revelation - If there are no [[Abomination]] enemies in play, Altered Beast gains surge. Otherwise, choose an [[Abomination]] enemy. Heal all damage from that enemy and attached Altered Beast to it. Forced - When you enter attached enemy's location (or vice-versa): Take 1 horror.

name: O'Bannion's Thug
text: While O'Bannion's Thug is engaged with you, you cannot gain resources.

name: Mobster
text: Retaliate. Forced - After Mobster attacks you: Lose 1 resource.

name: Hunted Down
text: Revelation - If there are no unengaged [[Criminal]] enemies in play, Hunted Down gains surge. If there are 1 or more unengaged [[Criminal]] enemies in play, each of them moves 1 location toward you. Each [[Criminal]] enemy that engages you as a result of this effect makes an immediate attack.

name: Pushed into the Beyond
text: Revelation - Choose and shuffle a non-story asset you control into your deck and discard the top 3 cards of your deck. If a copy of that asset is discarded, take 2 horror.

name: Terror from Beyond
text: Peril. Revelation - Choose one of the following cardtypes (asset, event, or skill). Each player must discard each card in his or her hand that is of the chosen cardtype. If this is not the first copy of Terror from Beyond drawn this phase, choose two cardtypes instead.

name: Arcane Barrier
text: Revelation - Attach to your location. As an additional cost to move into or out of attached location, test [willpower] (4). If successful, discard Arcane Barrier. Otherwise, you must either cancel the effects of the move or discard the top 5 cards of your deck.

name: Conglomeration of Spheres
text: Prey - Lowest [willpower]. Hunter. Forced - After you perform an attack against the Conglomeration of Spheres using a [[Melee]] card: Discard that card.

name: Servant of the Lurker
text: Prey - Lowest [agility]. Hunter. Forced - When Servant of the Lurker attacks you: Discard the top 2 cards of your deck.

name: Vicious Blow
text: If this skill test is successful during an attack, that attack deals +1 damage (+2 damage instead if it succeeds by 2 or more).

name: Monster Slayer
text: Fight. If this attack succeeds against a non-[[Elite]] enemy, defeat that enemy.

name: Lightning Gun
text: Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +5 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +2 damage.

name: Dr. William T. Maleson
text: [reaction] When you draw an encounter card from the encounter deck, exhaust Dr. William T. Maleson and place 1 of your clues on your location: Cancel the drawing of that card and shuffle it back into the encounter deck. Then, draw a new card from the top of the encounter deck.

name: Deciphered Reality
text: Investigate. The difficulty of this skill test is equal to the highest shroud value among revealed locations in play. If you succeed, discover 1 clue from each revealed location in play.

name: Chicago Typewriter
text: Uses (4 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You may spend any number of additional actions when you perform this attack. You get +2 [combat] for this attack for each action being spent (including this ability's [action] cost). This attack deals +2 damage.

name: The Gold Pocket Watch
text: Exceptional. [reaction] When a phase begins, remove The Gold Pocket Watch from the game: Skip this phase. [reaction] After a phase ends, remove The Gold Pocket Watch from the game: Repeat that phase.

name: Shrivelling
text: Uses (4 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Fight. This attack uses [willpower] instead of [combat]. You get +3 [willpower] and deal +2 damage for this attack. If a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol is revealed during this attack, take 2 horror.

name: Ward of Protection
text: Fast. Play when you draw a non-weakness encounter card. Cancel all of that card's effects and discard it. Then, take 1 horror.

name: Aquinnah
text: [reaction] When an enemy attacks you, exhaust Aquinnah and deal 1 horror to her: Deal that enemy's damage to any enemy at your location, instead. (You still take horror dealt by the attack.)

name: Try and Try Again
text: [reaction] After a skill test is failed, if a skill card you own is committed to that test, exhaust Try and Try Again: Return that skill card to your hand.

name: The Red-Gloved Man
text: Fast. [reaction] After The Red-Gloved Man enters play: Choose two of your skills. While The Red-Gloved Man is in play, raise the base value of each of those skills to 6. Forced - At the end of the mythos phase: Discard The Red-Gloved Man.

name: Undimensioned and Unseen
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -1 for each Brood of Yog-Sothoth in play. [cultist]: Reveal another token. If you fail this test, take 1 horror. [tablet]: 0. You must either remove all clue tokens from a Brood of Yog-Sothoth in play, or this token's modifier is -4 instead. [elder_thing]: -3. If this token is revealed during an attack or evasion attempt against a Brood of Yog-Sothoth, it immediately attacks you.

name: Rampaging Creatures
text: Forced - At the end of the enemy phase: Move each Brood of Yog-Sothoth enemy once toward a random location.

name: Biding Its Time
text: Forced - At the end of the enemy phase: Move each Brood of Yog-Sothoth enemy once toward a random location.

name: Horrors Unleashed
text: Each [[Abomination]] enemy gets +1 fight and +1 evade. Forced - At the end of the enemy phase: Move each Brood of Yog-Sothoth enemy once toward a random location.

name: Saracenic Script
text: Objective - Only investigators at Whateley Ruins may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: They Must Be Destroyed!
text: Objective - Defeat as many Brood of Yog-Sothoth enemies as you can. If there are no copies of Brood of Yog-Sothoth in play or set aside, advance.

name: Dunwich Village
text: [action]: Resign. You hide from the rampaging creatures. [fast]: You borrow some hounds to track the creatures by scent. An investigator in Dunwich Village may place 1 of his or her clues on any [[Abomination]] enemy in play. (Group limit once per game).

name: Dunwich Village
text: [action]: Resign. You hide from the rampaging creatures. [action]: Move a Brood of Yog-Sothoth enemy once toward Dunwich Village.

name: Cold Spring Glen
text: Each enemy in Cold Spring Glen gets -1 evade. [fast]: You lure the creature into the dense tree cover, and it becomes tangled. Investigators in Cold Spring Glen may, as a group, place up to 2 of their clues on an [[Abomination]] enemy in Cold Spring Glen. (Group limit once per game).

name: Cold Spring Glen
text: Each enemy in Cold Spring Glen gets -1 evade. [reaction] After Cold Spring Glen is chosen as a random location: An investigator in Cold Spring Glen tests [agility] (3). If successful, choose a different random location.

name: Ten-Acre Meadow

[elder_thing]: -3. If you fail, discard an asset you control.

text: [action] [action]: Search the top 6 cards of your deck for a card and add it to your hand. Shuffle the rest back into your deck. (Limit once per turn.)

text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating this location: Discard an asset you control.

text: Forced - After you enter this location: Discard 2 cards from your hand at random.

text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating this location: Lose 1 action.

text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating this location: Take 1 horror.

text: You get +2 [intellect] while investigating if you have no clues.

name: Lure
text: Attach to your location. During the enemy phase, each enemy that moves does so along the shortest path toward the attached location, instead of to where it would normally move. Forced - While attached, at the end of the round: Discard Lure.

name: Relic Hunter
text: Permanent. You have 1 additional accessory slot.

name: Charisma
text: Permanent. You have 1 additional ally slot.

name: Leadership
text: While Leadership is committed to a skill test being performed by another investigator, Leadership gains [willpower] [wild].

name: "I've had worse…"
text: Fast. Play when you are dealt damage and/or horror. Cancel up to 5 damage and/or horror just dealt to you. Then, gain that many resources.

name: Strange Solution
text: Researched. Uses (4 supplies). [action] Spend 1 supply: Heal 2 damage from an investigator at your location.

name: Strange Solution
text: Researched. Uses (3 supplies). [action] Spend 1 supply: Fight. Attack with a base [combat] skill of 6. This attack deals +2 damage.

name: Strange Solution
text: Researched. Uses (4 supplies). [action] Spend 1 supply: Evade. Evade with a base [agility] skill of 6.

name: Joey "The Rat" Vigil
text: [fast] Spend 1 resource: Choose an [[Item]] asset from your hand and play it (paying its cost).

name: Ace in the Hole
text: Exceptional. Fast. Play only during your turn. You may take an additional 3 actions this turn.

name: Moonlight Ritual
text: Remove all doom from 1 card you control.

name: Fearless
text: If this skill test is successful, heal 1 horror (2 horror instead if it succeeds by 2 or more).

name: Jewel of Aureolus
text: [reaction] After a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol is revealed during a skill test at your location, exhaust Jewel of Aureolus: Draw 1 card or gain 2 resources.

name: A Chance Encounter
text: Choose an [[Ally]] asset in any player's discard pile. Put that asset into play under your control. At the end of the round, if that asset is still in play, discard it.

name: Stroke of Luck
text: Commit only to a skill test you are performing. After revealing chaos tokens for this test, you may choose to exile Stroke of Luck. If you do, this test is automatically successful (unless a [auto_fail] token was revealed).

name: Fine Clothes
text: Reduce the difficulty of skill tests you perform during 'parley' actions by 2.

name: Moment of Respite
text: Play only if there are no enemies at your location. Heal 3 horror and draw 1 card.

name: Emergency Aid
text: Choose an investigator at your location. Heal 2 damage from that investigator or from an [[Ally]] asset he or she controls.

name: Brother Xavier
text: You get +1 [willpower]. Brother Xavier may be assigned damage and/or horror dealt to other investigators at your location. [reaction] When Brother Xavier is defeated: Deal 2 damage to an enemy at your location.

name: "I've got a plan!"
text: Fight. This attack uses [intellect]. You deal +1 damage for this attack for each clue you have (max +3 damage).

name: Pathfinder
text: [fast] During your turn, if you are not engaged with any enemies, exhaust Pathfinder: Move to a connecting location.

name: Contraband
text: Choose an asset controlled by an investigator at your location. Double the number of ammo or supply tokens on that asset.

name: Adaptable
text: Permanent. In between each game of a campaign, you may swap up to two level 0 cards out of your deck in exchange for an equal number of level 0 cards. (You must still follow all deckbuilding rules for your investigator).

name: Delve Too Deep
text: In player order, each investigator draws 1 card from the top of the encounter deck. Then, add Delve Too Deep to the victory display.

name: Song of the Dead
text: Uses (5 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Fight. This attack uses [willpower] instead of [combat]. You get +1 [willpower] for this attack. If a [skull] symbol is revealed during this attack, this attack deals +2 damage.

name: Oops!
text: Fast. Play after you fail a skill test by 2 or less while attacking an enemy engaged with you. Deal this attack's damage to a different enemy at your location.

name: Fire Extinguisher
text: [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. [action] Exile Fire Extinguisher: Evade. You get +3 [agility] for this test. If you are successful, evade each other enemy engaged with you, as well.

name: Flare
text: Either (choose one): - Fight. You get +3 [combat] and deal +2 damage for this attack. Exile Flare. - Search the top 9 cards of any investigator's deck for an [[Ally]] asset and put it into play under your control. Then, exile Flare. Shuffle the searched deck.

name: Smoking Pipe
text: Uses (3 supplies). [fast] Spend 1 supply, exhaust Smoking Pipe, and take 1 damage: Heal 1 horror.

name: Painkillers
text: Uses (3 supplies). [fast] Spend 1 supply, exhaust Painkillers, and take 1 horror: Heal 1 damage.

name: Carolyn Fern
text: [reaction] After one of your card effects heals horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset: The healed card's controller gains 1 resource. [elder_sign] effect: +1. You may heal 1 horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset at your location.

name: Foolishness
text: Carolyn Fern deck only. Replacement. Foolishness enters play with 3 horror on him. Horror on him may be healed as if it were on Carolyn Fern. While Foolishness has no horror on him, you get +1 to all skills.

name: To Fight the Black Wind
text: Carolyn Fern deck only. Replacement. Revelation - Attach To Fight the Black Wind to the current agenda. Carolyn Fern takes 1 direct horror. Forced - At the end of the round, if any amount of horror was assigned to an investigator this round and it was not healed: Place 1 doom on attached agenda.

name: Gloria Goldberg
text: You choose the investigator order during the mythos phase. [reaction] When you look at 1 or more cards from the encounter deck: Look at 1 additional card and choose 1 non-[[Elite]] card among them. Either discard it, put it on top of the encounter deck, or place it facedown beneath Gloria Goldberg (max 3 cards beneath her). [elder_sign] effect: +1. Look at the top card of the encounter deck.

name: Ruth Westmacott
text: Gloria Goldberg deck only. Replacement. [reaction] When an investigator fights, attempts to evade, or initiates a skill test on an encounter card, discard an encounter card that shares a [[Trait]] with that encounter card from beneath Gloria Goldberg: Reduce the difficulty of this skill test by 2.

name: Liber Omnium Finium
text: Gloria Goldberg deck only. Replacement. Revelation - Draw a random non-weakness encounter card from beneath Gloria Goldberg. That card gains peril, its effects cannot be canceled, and you get -2 to all skills while resolving its effects. If that card is an enemy, it immediately attacks you. If no card is drawn by this effect, shuffle this card back into your deck.

name: Marie Lambeau
text: While you have 1 or more doom among cards you control, you may take an additional action during your turn, which can only be used to play [[Spell]] cards or activate [[Spell]] [action] abilities. [elder_sign] effect: +1. You may add 1 doom to or remove 1 doom from a card you control.

name: Mystifying Song
text: Marie Lambeau deck only. Fast. Play when the agenda would advance by reaching its doom threshold. Until the end of the phase, the agenda cannot advance by reaching its doom threshold. Remove Mystifying Song from the game.

name: Baron Samedi
text: Revelation - Put Baron Samedi into play. He cannot leave play while he has less than 3 doom on him. Forced - When any amount of damage is placed on an investigator in Baron Samedi's location: Place 1 additional damage on that investigator. [fast] Exhaust Baron Samedi: Place 1 doom on Baron Samedi. If he has 3 or more doom on him, discard him.

name: Roland Banks
text: [reaction] After you defeat an enemy: Discover 1 clue at your location. (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +1 for each clue on your location.

name: Mysteries Remain
text: Roland Banks deck only. Replacement. Fast. Play only during your turn. Either place 1 clue (from the token bank) on your location, or discover 1 clue at your location. Remove Mysteries Remain from the game.

name: The Dirge of Reason
text: Roland Banks deck only. Replacement. Revelation - Place 2 of your clues on your location. If you cannot, place all of your clues on your location, take 1 horror, and shuffle The Dirge of Reason back into your deck.

name: Silas Marsh
text: [reaction] After you reveal a chaos token during a skill test you are performing. Return a skill you committed to this test to your hand. (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +0. You may commit a skill from your discard pile to this test. After this test ends, return that skill to your hand instead of discarding it.

name: Nautical Prowess
text: Silas Marsh deck only. Replacement. If a chaos token with a negative modifier is revealed during this test, either draw 1 card or Nautical Prowess gains [wild][wild].

name: Dreams of the Deep
text: Silas Marsh deck only. Replacement. This skill's icons subtract from your skill value instead of adding to it. If this skill test fails, return this skill to your hand. Forced - If Dreams of the Deep is in your hand at the end of your turn: Reveal it and take 2 damage.

name: Jenny Barnes
text: You collect 1 additional resource during each upkeep phase. [elder_sign] effect: +1 for each resource you have.

name: Green Man Medallion
text: Jenny Barnes deck only. Replacement. [fast] Spend up to 3 resources and exhaust Green Man Medallion: Place those resources on it, as offerings. [reaction] When you resign or the game ends: For every 6 offerings on Green Man Medallion, reduce the experience cost of the next card you purchase before the next scenario by 1.

name: Sacrificial Beast
text: Jenny Barnes deck only. Replacement. Spawn - Location farthest from you. Jenny Barnes cannot gain resources via card effects.

name: Dexter Drake
text: [fast] During your turn, discard an asset you control: Play an asset with a different title from your hand, reducing its cost by 1. (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +2. You may return an asset from your play area to your hand. Then, draw 1 card.

name: Molly Maxwell
text: Dexter Drake deck only. Replacement. [fast] Exhaust Molly Maxwell and deal her 1 horror: Name any trait. One at a time, reveal cards from the top of your deck until an asset with the named trait is revealed. Draw that asset. Shuffle each other revealed card back into your deck.

name: Yaztaroth
text: Dexter Drake deck only. Replacement. Revelation - Put Yaztaroth into play in your threat area. You cannot play assets or put assets into play. [action] [action]: Discard Yaztaroth.

name: Norman Withers
text: Play with the top card of your deck revealed. Once per round, you may play the top card of your deck as if it were in your hand, at -1 resource cost. Forced - After a weakness is revealed while on top of your deck: Draw it. [elder_sign] effect: +X. You may swap the top card of your deck with a card in your hand. X is the resource cost of the top card of your deck.

name: Split the Angle
text: Norman Withers deck only. Replacement. [action]: Reveal the top card of the encounter deck. [fast] Exhaust Split the Angle and discard the top card of your deck: Discard the top card of the encounter deck.

name: Vengeful Hound
text: Norman Withers deck only. Replacement. Prey - Norman Withers. While Vengeful Hounds is engaged with you, you cannot draw or reveal cards via player card effects.

name: Second Wind
text: Play only as your first action. Heal 1 damage (2 instead if you drew a treachery this round). Then, draw 1 card.

name: Take the Initiative
text: Commit only to a skill test you are performing. Take the Initiative loses [wild] for each action that has been completed by any investigator this phase.

name: Well Prepared
text: [fast] Exhaust Well Prepared: Choose an asset you control. You get +X skill value for this skill test, where X is the number of matching skill icons on the chosen asset.

name: Truth from Fiction
text: Play only if there is a clue on your location. Place 2 secrets on an asset you control.

name: True Understanding
text: Commit only to a skill test from an ability printed on a scenario card. If this skill test is successful, discover 1 clue at your location.

name: Quick Study
text: [fast] Place 1 of your clues on your location and exhaust Quick Study: You get +3 skill value for this skill test.

name: Hatchet Man
text: If this skill test is successful during an evasion attempt, the next time the evaded enemy takes damage this turn, deal it 1 additional damage.

name: High Roller
text: [fast] Spend 3 resources and exhaust High Roller: You get +2 skill value for this skill test. If you succeed, gain 3 resources.

name: Enraptured
text: If this skill test is successful during an investigation, place 1 charge or secret on an asset you control.

name: Recall the Future
text: [reaction] When a skill test you are performing begins, if Recall the Future is ready, name a chaos token: If the named chaos token is revealed during this skill test, exhaust Recall the Future. Then, you get +2 skill value for this skill test.

name: Try and Try Again
text: Uses (3 tries). If Try and Try Again has no tries, discard it. [reaction] After a skill test is failed, if a skill card you own is committed to that test, exhaust Try and Try Again and spend 1 try: Return that skill card to your hand.

name: Cornered
text: [fast] Discard 1 card from your hand: You get +2 skill value for this skill test. (Limit once per test.)

name: The Untamed Wilds
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the number of vengeance points in the victory display. [cultist]: -X. X is the number of locations in play (max 5). [tablet]: -X. X is the number of cards in the exploration deck (max 5). [elder_thing]: -2. If you are poisoned, this test automatically fails instead.

name: Expedition into the Wild
text: [action]: Explore. Draw the top card of the exploration deck. If it is a connecting location, put it into play and move to it.

name: Intruders
text: [action]: Explore. Draw the top card of the exploration deck. If it is a connecting location, put it into play and move to it.

name: Exploring the Rainforest
text: Objective - When the round ends, investigators at any non-[[Campsite]] locations may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: Huntress of the Eztli
text: Objective - If Ichtaca is defeated, advance. Objective - If there are 1 [per_investigator] clues on Ichtaca, place her in the victory display and advance.

name: Search for the Ruins
text: Each Eztli Guardian enemy cannot attack or be attacked. Ignore the effects of each Arrows from the Trees treachery. Objective - Only investigators at the Ruins of Eztli can spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: The Guarded Ruins
text: Each Eztli Guardian enemy gets +1 fight and +1 evade. Each Arrows from the Trees treachery gains surge. Objective - Only investigators at the Ruins of Eztli can spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: Expedition Camp
text: [action]: Resign. The wilds are too dangerous! [action]: Check your supplies. If you have a map, look at the top 3 cards of the exploration deck. Place 1 on the bottom and the other 2 on top, in any order.

name: Alejandro Vela
text: You get +1 skill value while investigating an [[Ancient]] location. [action] If you are at an [[Ancient]] location, exhaust Alejandro Vela: Draw 2 cards.

name: Ichtaca
text: Alert. Retaliate. [action]: Parley. Test [intellect] (4) to convince Ichtaca you are not her enemy. If you succeed, place 1 clue on her. If you fail and Ichtaca is ready, she attacks you.

name: Ruins of Eztli
text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating Ruins of Eztli: Draw the top card of the encounter deck.

name: The Doom of Eztli
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -1 (-3 instead if there is doom on your location). [cultist] [tablet]: -X. X is the number of locations with doom on them. [elder_thing]: Reveal another chaos token. If you fail, place 1 doom on your location.

name: Something Stirs…
text: *This agenda gets +1 [per_investigator] doom threshold. Forced - When this agenda advances: Do not remove doom from each location in play.

name: The Temple Warden
text: *This agenda gets +1 [per_investigator] doom threshold.

name: Into the Ruins
text: [action]: Explore. Draw the top card of the exploration deck. If it is a connecting location, put it into play and move to it.

name: Magic and Science
text: [action]: Explore. Draw the top card of the exploration deck. If it is a connecting location, put it into play and move to it. Objective - Only investigators in the Chamber of Time may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: Escape the Ruins
text: While there are 3 or more vengeance points in the victory display, each [[Serpent]] enemy gets +1 evade. Objective - If each undefeated investigator has resigned, advance.

name: Entryway
text: [action]: Resign. You've escaped… for now. [action]: Check your supplies. If you have torches, look at the top 2 cards of the exploration deck. Discard each treachery looked at by this effect. Shuffle the exploration deck.

name: Harbinger of Valusia
text: Alert. Hunter. Retaliate. Harbinger of Valusia can retaliate while exhausted. Forced - After Harbinger of Valusia is successfully attacked or evaded: Place 1 resource on it. Then, if there are 2 [per_investigator] resources on it, it vanishes with a sinister hiss. (Set it aside, out of play. It keeps all damage tokens.)

name: Ancient Hall
text: Forced - At the end of the round: Flip 1 of the clues on Ancient Hall to its doom side. Any investigator at Ancient Hall may spend 3 resources to cancel this effect.

name: Grand Chamber
text: Forced - When you investigate Grand Chamber and do not succeed by at least 2: Before resolving any other effects from this skill test, flip 1 of the clues on Grand Chamber to its doom side.

name: Burial Pit
text: Forced - After you put Burial Pit into play by exploring successfully: You must either draw 2 cards from the top of the encounter deck or place 2 doom on Burial Pit, or any combination thereof.

name: Underground Ruins
text: While there is an enemy in Underground Ruins, Underground Ruins is considered to be in the victory display (for the purposes of counting vengeance). Forced - After an enemy in Underground Ruins leaves play: Place 1 doom on Underground Ruins.

name: Secret Passage
