text: Forced - After this location is revealed: Spawn the set-aside Innsmouth Shoggoth at this location, exhausted. [action]: Parley. Move 1 barrier between this location and a connecting location so it is between this location and a different connecting location. [fast] If the investigators control 2 or more keys, as a group: Parley. Read Flashback V in the Campaign Guide.

name: Gilman House
text: Forced - After this location is revealed: Randomly choose 1 of the set-aside facedown keys and place it on this location without looking at it. [action]: Parley. Test [combat] (2) or [agility] (2). If you succeed, remove 1 barrier between this location and a connecting location.

name: Marsh Refinery
text: [fast] If you control 1 or more keys: Move to a connecting location. [action] Discard an asset you control: Parley. Remove 1 barrier between this location and a connecting location.

name: Railroad Station
text: Forced - After you enter this location, if it is flooded: Test [agility] (2). If you fail, take 1 damage. [action]: Resign. You escape the submerged town.

name: Desolate Coastline
text: Card effects cannot place barriers between Desolate Coastline and connecting locations.

name: Innsmouth Shoggoth
text: Hunter. Massive. Innsmouth Shoggoth gets +2 [per_investigator] health. When Innsmouth Shoggoth moves via its hunter keyword, it ignores all barriers. Forced - After Innsmouth Shoggoth moves: Remove each barrier it moved through.

name: Ravager from the Deep
text: Hunter. While its location is flooded, Ravager from the Deep gets +1 fight and +1 evade (+2 fight and +2 evade instead if its location is fully flooded). Forced - After Ravager from the Deep engages you: Test [combat] (2). If you fail, place 1 barrier between your location and the connecting location to the west.

name: Emerging Deep One
text: Hunter. Revelation - Emerging Deep One enters play exhausted and unengaged unless its location is fully flooded. Forced - After Emerging Deep One engages you, if your location is flooded: It attacks you.

name: Deep One Invasion
text: Revelation - Shuffle the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck. For each location to the east of your location (on the same row), discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a [[Deep One]] enemy with the hunter keyword is discarded and spawn that enemy at that location.

name: Pulled Back
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, move to the connecting location to the east, ignoring all barriers. Then place each key you control on your location.

name: Inundated
text: Revelation - Place 1 barrier between this location and each connecting location with no barriers between them. If no barriers are placed by this effect, Inundated gains surge.

name: Joe Sargent
text: Uses (3 tickets). Forced - When Joe Sargent leaves play: Remove him from the game. [fast] Spend 1 ticket: Move to a connecting location that is not fully flooded.

name: Teachings of the Order
text: Permanent. [fast] Exhaust Teachings of the Order and choose one effect you have not yet chosen this campaign: - Remove all [curse] tokens from the chaos bag. - Remove a flood token from a non-[[Sanctum]] location. - Defeat a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location.

name: Horror in High Gear
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -1 (-3 instead if there are 6 or fewer locations remaining in the Road deck). [cultist]: -1. For each point you fail by, an investigator in your vehicle places 1 of their clues on your location. [tablet]: -2. For each point you fail by, an investigator in your vehicle loses 1 resource. [elder_thing]: -4. If you fail, resolve the hunter keyword on each enemy in play.

name: The Chase is On! (v. I)
text: As an additional cost for you to move while not in a vehicle, you must spend 2 actions. text: Crypt of the Sepulchral Lamp is investigated using [willpower] instead of the skill indicated by the investigation attempt. Forced - When Crypt of the Sepulchral Lamp is revealed: Put the top 2 Catacombs in the Catacombs deck into play above and to the right of Crypt of the Sepulchral Lamp.

name: Bone-Filled Caverns
text: While you are investigating Bone-Filled Cavern, you have 1 fewer hand slot. Forced - When Bone-Filled Cavern is revealed: Put the top 2 Catacombs in the Catacombs deck into play below and to the right of Bone-Filled Cavern.

name: Well of Souls
text: Forced - After you end your turn at Well of Souls: You must either take 1 direct horror or discard 2 random cards from your hand. Forced - When Well of Souls is revealed: Put the topmost Catacombs in the Catacombs deck into play above, below, or to the right of Well of Souls.

name: Candlelit Tunnels
text: [action]: Test [intellect] (3) to read an ancient sign. If you succeed, look at the revealed side of any Catacombs location in play. (Group limit once per game.) Forced - When Candlelit Tunnels is revealed: Put the top 2 Catacombs in the Catacombs deck into play to the left and right of Candlelit Tunnels.

name: Labyrinth of Bones
text: Forced - When Labyrinth of Bones is revealed: Put the top 3 Catacombs in the Catacombs deck into play above, below, and to the right of Labyrinth of Bones.

name: Narrow Shaft
text: Forced - When you would move from Narrow Shaft to an unrevealed location: Test [agility] (3). If you fail, take 1 damage and cancel the effects of the move. Forced - When Narrow Shaft is revealed: Put the topmost Catacombs in the Catacombs deck into play above or to the right of Narrow Shaft.

name: Shivering Pools
text: Forced - After you end your turn at Shivering Pools: You must either take 1 direct damage or lose 5 resources. Forced - When Shivering Pools is revealed: Put the topmost Catacombs in the Catacombs deck into play below or to the right of Shivering Pools.

name: Blocked Passage
text: Forced - When you reveal Blocked Passage: Take 2 damage. You cannot leave Blocked Passage this round.

name: Tomb of Shadows
text: Forced - When Tomb of Shadows is revealed: Advance to act 1b. While The Man in the Pallid Mask is at the Tomb of Shadows, he gets +1 [per_investigator] health and cannot be defeated by his [action] ability.

name: Catacombs Docent
text: Spawn - Nearest unrevealed location. [action]: Parley. Test [intellect] (4) to interpret the guide's ravings. If you succeed, look at the revealed side of any Catacombs location in play. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Corpse Dweller
text: Spawn - Discard a [[Humanoid]] enemy at any location and spawn Corpse Dweller at that location (if there are no [[Humanoid]] enemies in play, discard Corpse Dweller and it gains surge instead). Hunter. Retaliate.

name: Eyes in the Walls
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). For each point you fail by, take 1 horror. When assigning horror from this effect, it must be divided as evenly as possible among eligible cards.

name: The Shadow Behind You
text: Revelation - Put The Shadow Behind You into play in your threat area. Limit 1 per investigator. [action]: You look behind you. Forced - At the end of your turn, if you did not perform the above [action] ability: You must either discard all of your resources or discard all cards in your hand. Then, discard The Shadow Behind You.

name: The Pit Below
text: Revelation - Attach to your location if there is no copy of The Pit Below attached (if there is, discard The Pit Below and it gains surge instead). Attached location gets +1 shroud. Forced - At the end of the round: Each investigator at attached location takes 3 damage. Discard The Pit Below.

name: On the Hunt
text: Fast. Play when you would draw an encounter card during the mythos phase. Instead, search the top 9 cards of the encounter deck for an enemy, spawn it engaged with you (instead of its normal spawn location) , and shuffle the encounter deck. If you cannot, draw the top card of the encounter deck.

name: Stick to the Plan
text: Permanent. Exceptional. [reaction] Before you draw your opening hand: Search your deck for up to 3 different [[Tactic]] and/or [[Supply]] events, and attach them facedown to Stick to the Plan. Shuffle your deck. Cards attached to Stick to the Plan may be played as if they were in your hand. As an additional cost to play an attached card, exhaust Stick to the Plan.

name: Guidance
text: Choose another investigator at your location who has yet to take his or her turn this round. That investigator may take an additional action during his or her turn this round.

name: Arcane Insight
text: Uses (3 charges). [fast] While an investigator is taking his or her turn, spend 1 charge: Your location gets -2 shroud until the end of this turn. (Limit once per turn.)

name: Narrow Escape
text: Fast. Play when an enemy makes an attack of opportunity against you. Cancel that attack. You get +2 skill value for the next skill test you perform this turn.

name: Suggestion
text: Uses (3 charges). [action] Exhaust Suggestion: Evade. Add your [willpower] value to your skill value for this evasion attempt. If you do not succeed by at least 2, remove 1 charge from Suggestion. [reaction] When a non-[[Elite]] enemy would attack you, spend 1 charge: Cancel that attack.

name: St. Hubert's Key
text: You get +1 [willpower], +1 [intellect], and -2 sanity. [reaction] When you would be defeated by horror, discard St. Hubert's Key: Immediately heal 2 horror.

name: Ward of Protection
text: Fast. Play when an investigator at any location draws a non-weakness treachery card. Cancel that card's revelation effect. Then, take 1 horror.

name: Arcane Initiate
text: Forced - After Arcane Initiate enters play: Place 1 doom or 2 horror on it. [fast] Exhaust Arcane Initiate: Search the top 3 cards of your deck for a [[Spell]] card and draw it. Shuffle your deck.

name: "Not without a fight!"
text: Commit to a skill test only if you are engaged with an enemy. For each enemy engaged with you, "Not without a fight!" gains [willpower] [combat] [agility].

name: True Survivor
text: Return 3 [[Innate]] skills from your discard pile to your hand.

name: "I'll see you in hell!"
text: Each non-[[Elite]] enemy engaged with you is defeated. You are defeated and suffer 1 physical trauma. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: .45 Automatic
text: Uses (4 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. Ignore the retaliate keyword for this attack.

name: Logical Reasoning
text: Play only if you have at least 1 clue. Choose an investigator at your location. That investigator either heals 2 horror or discards a [[Terror]] card from his or her threat area.

name: Archaic Glyphs
text: Researched. Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Investigate. For every 2 points you succeed by, discover 1 additional clue at your location.

name: Archaic Glyphs
text: Researched. Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Investigate. If you succeed, you may automatically evade an engaged enemy. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Cheap Shot
text: Fight. Add your [agility] value to your skill value for this attack. If you succeed by 2 or more, automatically evade the attacked enemy.

name: Pickpocketing
text: Fast. [reaction] After you evade an enemy, exhaust Pickpocketing: Draw 1 card or gain 1 resource. If you succeeded by 2 or more, do both instead.

name: Quantum Flux
text: Shuffle your discard pile into your deck and draw 1 card. Remove Quantum Flux from the game.

name: Recharge
text: Choose a [[Spell]] or [[Relic]] asset controlled by an investigator at your location and reveal a random chaos token from the chaos bag. If you reveal a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol, discard the chosen asset. Otherwise, add 3 charges to the chosen asset.

name: Madame Labranche
text: [fast] If you have no cards in your hand, exhaust Madame Labranche: Draw 1 card. [fast] If you have no resources, exhaust Madame Labranche: Gain 1 resource.

name: Snare Trap
text: Attach to your location. Limit 1 per location. Forced - After a non-[[Elite]] enemy enters attached location: Exhaust that enemy, disengage it from all investigators, and attach Snare Trap to it. Forced - When attached enemy would ready: Instead, discard Snare Trap.

name: Echoes of the Past
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the highest number of doom on an enemy in play. [cultist]: -2. If you fail, place 1 doom on the nearest enemy. [tablet]: -2. If you fail, discard a random card from your hand. [elder_thing]: -2. If you fail and there is an enemy at your location, take 1 horror.

name: The Truth is Hidden
text: Skip the 'Place 1 doom on the current agenda' step of the Mythos phase. Forced - After 1 or more clues are placed on an enemy in play: Flip those clues to their doom side.

name: Ransacking the Manor
text: Skip the 'Place 1 doom on the current agenda' step of the Mythos phase. Forced - After 1 or more clues are placed on an enemy in play: Flip those clues to their doom side.

name: Secrets Better Left Hidden
text: Skip the 'Place 1 doom on the current agenda' step of the Mythos phase. Forced - After 1 or more clues are placed on an enemy in play: Flip those clues to their doom side.

name: The Oath
text: Locations with the [[Passageway]] trait are connected to one another. Objective - Only investigators in the Hidden Library may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: Entry Hall
text: Entry Hall is connected to each other [[Ground Floor]] location. [action]: Resign. You flee, leaving the mysteries of the past to the mysterious cultists.

name: Historical Society
text: [action] Exhaust an [[Ally]] asset: Discover a clue at this location. (Limit once per round.)

name: Historical Society
text: Each enemy at this location gets +1 fight and +1 evade.

name: Historical Society
text: While investigating this location, your [intellect] cannot be increased.

name: Quiet Halls
text: Quiet Halls is connected to each other [[Second Floor]] location. [action] If each location in play is revealed and there are no clues on locations in play: Place 1 [per_investigator] clues on Quiet Halls (from the token bank) .

name: Historical Society
text: While investigating this location, your [intellect] cannot be increased.

name: Historical Society
text: [reaction] After you successfully investigate this location, take 2 horror: Discover 1 clue at this location. (Limit once per round).

name: Historical Society
text: [action]: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, choose an enemy with doom on it. Take 1 of that enemy's doom, flip it to its clue side, and place it on your investigator. (Group limit once per round).

name: Quiet Halls
text: Quiet Halls is connected to each other [[Third Floor]] location. [action] If each location in play is revealed and there are no clues on locations in play: Place 1 [per_investigator] clues on Quiet Halls (from the token bank) .

name: Historical Society
text: [reaction] After you successfully investigate this location, take 2 horror: Discover 1 clue at this location. (Limit once per round).

name: Historical Society
text: While an investigator at this location controls Mr. Peabody, this location gets -2 shroud.

name: Historical Society
text: Each enemy at this location gets +1 fight and +1 evade.

name: Hidden Library
text: While an enemy is moving, Hidden Library gains the [[Passageway]] trait.

name: Possessed Oathspeaker
text: Hunter. Retaliate. Cannot be damaged during act 1 or act 2. Forced - At the beginning of the enemy phase: The investigators must either ready Possessed Oathspeaker or place 1 doom on it. Objective - If Possessed Oathspeaker is defeated: (→R3)

name: Mr. Peabody
text: [action] Exhaust Mr. Peabody: Choose a location. Until Mr. Peabody readies, that location gets -1 shroud and gains the [[Passageway]] trait.

name: Clasp of Black Onyx
text: While Clasp of Black Onyx is in your hand, increase the cost of each other card in your hand by 1.

name: The Tattered Cloak
text: You get -1 sanity. You get +1 [willpower], +1 [combat], and +1 [agility] while you have 3 or fewer remaining sanity.

name: Seeker of Carcosa
text: Spawn - Any empty Historical Society location. Aloof. Forced - At the end of the mythos phase: Move 1 clue from Seeker of Carcosa's location to Seeker of Carcosa (if you cannot, place 1 doom on Seeker of Carcosa, instead).

name: Led Astray
text: Peril. Revelation - You must decide (choose one): - Place 1 of your clues on a [[Cultist]] enemy. - Place 1 doom on the current agenda (this effect may cause the current agenda to advance).

name: The Cult's Search
text: Revelation - If there is a [[Cultist]] enemy in play with doom on it, move all doom from each [[Cultist]] enemy to the current agenda (this effect may cause the current agenda to advance). If there are no [[Cultist]] enemies in play with doom on them, search the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[Cultist]] enemy and draw it (shuffle the encounter deck).

name: Mark Harrigan
text: You begin the game with Sophie (In Loving Memory) in play. [reaction] After damage is placed on a card you control: Draw 1 card. (Limit once per phase.) [elder_sign] effect: +1 for each damage on Mark Harrigan.

name: Minh Thi Phan
text: [reaction] After an investigator at your location commits a card to a skill test: That card gains a [wild] icon until the end of the test. (Limit once for each investigator per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +1. You may choose a skill card committed to this skill test to return to its owner's hand after this test ends.

name: Sefina Rousseau
text: Forced - When you would draw your opening hand: Draw 13 cards, instead. Choose up to 5 events to place beneath this card and keep 8 cards as your opening hand. Discard the rest. (You cannot mulligan.) [action]: Choose an event beneath this card and draw it. Does not provoke attacks of opportunity. [elder_sign] effect: +3. You may choose an event beneath this card and draw it.

name: Akachi Onyele
text: Your assets with "uses (charges)" enter play with 1 additional charge on them. [elder_sign] effect: +1. Add 1 charge to an asset with "uses (charges)" you control.

name: William Yorick
text: [reaction] After you defeat an enemy: Play an asset from your discard pile (paying its cost) . (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +2. If this test is successful, return 1 card from your discard pile to your hand.

name: Lola Hayes
text: Forced - After you draw your opening hand: Choose a role ([survivor], [guardian], [seeker], [rogue], [mystic], or Neutral). You can only play, commit, or trigger abilities on Neutral cards or cards of your role. [fast]: Switch your role. (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +2. You may switch roles.

name: The Home Front
text: Mark Harrigan deck only. If this skill test is successful during an attack, move 1 damage from Mark Harrigan to the attacked enemy.

name: Shell Shock
text: Revelation - For every 2 damage on you, take 1 horror.

name: Sophie
text: Mark Harrigan deck only. Sophie cannot leave play. [fast] Take 1 direct damage: You get +2 to your skill value for this skill test. Forced - If Mark Harrigan has 5 or more damage on him: Flip Sophie.

name: Sophie
text: Sophie cannot leave play. You get -1 to each of your skills. Forced - If Mark Harrigan has 4 or less damage on him: Flip Sophie.

name: Analytical Mind
text: Minh Thi Phan deck only. You may commit 1 card to each skill test performed by an investigator at another location. [reaction] After you commit exactly 1 card to a skill test, exhaust Analytical Mind: Draw 1 card.

name: The King in Yellow
text: Revelation - Put The King in Yellow into play in your threat area. It cannot leave play except through the [reaction] ability below. You cannot commit exactly 1 or 2 cards to a skill test. [reaction] After a skill test is successful in which Minh Thi Phan has committed at least 6 matching skill icons for that test: Discard The King in Yellow.

name: The Painted World
text: Sefina Rousseau deck only. Cannot be placed beneath Sefina Rousseau. Play The Painted World as an exact copy of a non-exceptional event that is beneath Sefina Rousseau. Remove The Painted World from the game instead of discarding it.

name: Stars of Hyades
text: Revelation - Randomly choose an event beneath Sefina Rousseau and remove it from the game. If you cannot, take 1 damage and 1 horror. If your deck has 5 or more cards in it, shuffle Stars of Hyades back into your deck instead of discarding it.

name: Spirit-Speaker
text: Akachi Onyele deck only. [fast] Exhaust Spirit-Speaker: Choose an asset you control with "uses (charges)." Either return that asset to your hand, or move all charges from that asset to your resource pool (as resources) and discard that asset.

name: Angered Spirits
text: Revelation - Put Angered Spirits into play in your threat area. [fast] Exhaust a [[Spell]] asset: Move 1 charge from that asset to Angered Spirits. Forced - When the game ends, if Angered Spirits has fewer than 4 charges on it: You suffer 1 physical trauma.

name: Bury Them Deep
text: William Yorick deck only. Fast. Play after a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location is defeated. Add that enemy (and this card) to the victory display.

name: Graveyard Ghouls
text: Prey - William Yorick only. Hunter. While Graveyard Ghouls is engaged with you, cards cannot leave your discard pile.

name: Improvisation
text: Lola Hayes deck only. Fast. Play only during your turn. Switch your role. Until the end of your turn, reduce the resource cost of the next card you play of your role by 3. Draw 1 card.

name: Crisis of Identity
text: Revelation - Discard all cards you control of your current role. Then, discard the top card of your deck. Switch your role to the class of the discarded card (if the discarded card is a weakness, switch your role to neutral).

name: .32 Colt
text: Uses (6 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You deal +1 damage for this attack.

name: True Grit
text: True Grit may be assigned damage dealt to other investigators at your location.

name: "Let me handle this!"
text: Fast. Play after another investigator draws a non-peril encounter card, but before resolving that card's effects. You are considered to have drawn that encounter card, instead. You get +2 to each of your skills while resolving that card's revelation effect.

name: Ever Vigilant
text: One at a time, play up to 3 assets from your hand, reducing the resource cost of each by 1.

name: Fieldwork
text: [reaction] After you move to a location, if that location has at least 1 clue on it, exhaust Fieldwork: You get +2 skill value for the next skill test you perform this phase.

name: Archaic Glyphs
text: [action] Discard a card with at least 1 [intellect] skill icon from your hand: Place 1 resource on Archaic Glyphs from the token pool, as a secret. Forced - After the third secret is placed on Archaic Glyphs: Discard Archaic Glyphs and gain 5 resources. Record in your Campaign Log that "you have translated the glyphs."

name: No Stone Unturned
text: Choose an investigator at your location. That investigator searches the top 6 cards of his or her deck for a card, draws it, and shuffles his or her deck.

name: In the Know
text: Uses (3 secrets). [action] Spend 1 secret: Investigate. Investigate any revealed location in play as if you were at that location.

name: Stealth
text: [action] Exhaust Stealth: Evade. The chosen enemy gets -2 evade for this evasion attempt. If you successfully evade the enemy, disengage with it but do not exhaust it. Until the end of your turn, that enemy cannot engage you.

name: Sleight of Hand
text: Fast. Play only during your turn. Put an [[Item]] asset into play from your hand. At the end of your turn, if that asset is still in play, return it to your hand.

name: Daring Maneuver
text: Fast. Play when you would succeed at a skill test. You get +2 skill value for this test.

name: Lockpicks
text: Uses (3 supplies). If Lockpicks has no supplies, discard it. [action] Exhaust Lockpicks: Investigate. Add your [agility] value to your skill value for this investigation. If you do not succeed by at least 2, remove 1 supply from Lockpicks.

name: Alchemical Transmutation
text: Uses (3 charges). [action] Exhaust Alchemical Transmutation, spend 1 charge: Test [willpower] (1). For each point you succeed by, gain 1 resource (to a maximum of 3). If a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol is revealed during this test, take 1 damage.

name: Uncage the Soul
text: Play a [[Spell]] or [[Ritual]] card from your hand, reducing its resource cost by 3.

name: Astral Travel
text: Move. Move to any revealed location and reveal a random token from the chaos bag. If you reveal a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol, you must discard an [[Item]] or [[Ally]] asset you control (if you cannot, take 1 damage).

name: Spirit Athame
text: [fast] During a skill test on a [[Spell]] card, exhaust Spirit Athame: You get +2 skill value for this test. [action] Exhaust Spirit Athame: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack.

name: Lantern
text: [action]: Investigate. Your location gets -1 shroud for this investigation. [action] Discard Lantern: Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Gravedigger's Shovel
text: [action]: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. [action] Discard Gravedigger's Shovel: Discover 1 clue at your location.

name: Hiding Spot
text: Fast. Attach Hiding Spot to any location. Each non-[[Elite]] enemy at attached location gains aloof. Forced - At the end of the enemy phase, if a ready enemy is at attached location: Discard Hiding Spot.

name: Resourceful
text: If this skill test is successful, choose a [survivor] card not named Resourceful in your discard pile. Add the chosen card to your hand.

name: Overzealous
text: Revelation - Draw the top card of the encounter deck. That card gains surge.

name: Drawing the Sign
text: Revelation - Put Drawing the Sign into play in your threat area. Your maximum hand size is reduced by 5. [action] [action]: Discard Drawing the Sign.

name: The Thing That Follows
text: Spawn - Location farthest from you. Prey - Bearer only. Hunter. Forced - When The Thing That Follows would be defeated: Instead shuffle it into its bearer's deck.

name: A Phantom of Truth
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the amount of doom in play (max 5). [cultist]: -2. If you fail, move each unengaged [[Byakhee]] in play once toward the nearest investigator. [tablet]: -3. Cancel the effects and icons of each skill card committed to this test. [elder_thing]: -2. If you fail, lose 1 resource for each point you failed by.

name: The First Night
text: While you have more Conviction than Doubt , this agenda gains: "When checking the doom threshold, doom on cards other than this agenda subtract from the total doom in play instead of adding to it."

name: The Second Night
text: While you have more Conviction than Doubt , this agenda gains: "When checking the doom threshold, doom on cards other than this agenda subtract from the total doom in play instead of adding to it."

name: The Third Night
text: While you have more Conviction than Doubt , this agenda gains: "When checking the doom threshold, doom on cards other than this agenda subtract from the total doom in play instead of adding to it."

name: The Parisian Conspiracy (v. I)
text: Objective - Spend the requisite number of clues to advance. Objective - At the end of the round, if there are 3 or more doom in play, advance.

name: The Parisian Conspiracy (v. II)
text: Objective - Spend the requisite number of clues to advance. Objective - At the end of the round, if there are 3 or more doom in play, advance.

name: Pursuing Shadows
text: [reaction] After you successfully attack The Organist: An investigator at your location may place 1 of his or her clues on The Organist. (Group limit 1 [per_investigator] times per round.) Objective - If there are 3 [per_investigator] clues on The Organist, advance.

name: Stalked by Shadows
text: [fast] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Either place 1 doom on the current agenda, or automatically evade The Organist. (Group limit once per round.) Objective - Survive three nights. (Do not advance until you are instructed.)

name: Montparnasse
text: [fast] Discard a card from your hand: Gain resources equal to the number of [willpower] icons on the discarded card. (Limit once per round.)

name: Montmartre
text: [action]: Reveal the top card of each investigator's deck. You may play an asset revealed by this effect (paying its cost) , under your control. Shuffle each investigator's deck. (Group limit once per round.)

name: Montmartre
text: [action] Spend 1 resource: Add 1 supply or ammo token to a card you control. (Limit once per round.)

name: Grand Guignol
text: Forced - After you reveal Grand Guignol: You must either take 2 horror, or shuffle all non-weakness cards from your hand into your deck, then draw an equal number of cards.

name: Opéra Garnier
text: While you are investigating Opéra Garnier, double the number of skill icons committed to this skill test.

name: Opéra Garnier
text: While you are investigating Opéra Garnier, double the base value of your skill.

name: Gare d'Orsay
text: [action] Spend 1 resource: Move to any [[Rail]] location.

name: Père Lachaise Cemetery
text: Forced - After you successfully investigate Père Lachaise Cemetery: You cannot leave Père Lachaise Cemetery until the end of the round.

name: Canal Saint-Martin
text: [reaction] After you evade an enemy at Canal Saint-Martin: Move that enemy to a connecting location. (Limit once per round.)

name: Le Marais
text: [reaction] When your turn begins, if you are in Le Marais: Draw 1 card. (Group limit once per round.)

name: Le Marais
text: Forced - After you enter Le Marais: For the remainder of the round, you cannot leave Le Marais.

name: Notre-Dame
text: Each enemy at Notre-Dame gets -1 fight and +1 evade. [action]: Test [willpower] (6). If you succeed, either place 1 doom on the current agenda, or remove 1 doom from the current agenda. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Gardens of Luxembourg
text: While a [[Byakhee]] enemy is moving, if there is an investigator at Gardens of Luxembourg, that enemy's location is considered to be connected to Gardens of Luxembourg.

name: The Organist
text: Hunter. Cannot be damaged. Forced - After The Organist moves from the hunter keyword, if it is unengaged: Resolve its hunter keyword again. The Organist cannot attack this phase. (Limit once per round).

name: The Organist
text: Aloof. Cannot be damaged. Forced - At the end of the enemy phase: If The Organist is unengaged, move it 1 location away from the nearest investigator (to a location with no investigators, if possible). If it is engaged, disengage it instead.

name: Stealthy Byakhee
text: Hunter. While Stealthy Byakhee is exhausted, it gets -3 fight.

name: Twin Suns
text: Revelation - Test [intellect] (4). If you fail, you must either remove 1 doom from the current agenda, or take 1 horror for each point you failed by.

name: Deadly Fate
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until an enemy is discarded. You must either draw that enemy, or that enemy attacks you (from the discard pile) . If no enemy is discarded, take 1 horror instead.

name: Torturous Chords
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (5). If you fail, put Torturous Chords into play in your threat area, with 1 resource on it for each point you failed by. Each time you play a card, increase the cost of that card by 1 and remove 1 resource from Torturous Chords. If Torturous Chords has no resources, discard it.

name: Frozen in Fear
text: Revelation - Put Frozen in Fear into play in your threat area. The first time you perform one of the following actions (move, fight, or evade) each round, it costs 1 additional action. Forced - At the end of your turn: Test [willpower] (3). If you succeed, discard Frozen in Fear.

name: Lost Soul
text: Revelation - Check Campaign Log. - If you have more (or equal) Doubt than Conviction , test [intellect] (X), where X is your [willpower]. If you fail, take 2 damage. - If you have more Conviction than Doubt , test [willpower] (X), where X is your [intellect]. If you fail, take 2 damage.

name: Curtain Call
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -1 (-3 instead if you have 3 or more horror on you). [cultist] [tablet] [elder_thing]: -4. If your location has at least 1 horror on it, take 1 horror (from the token pool) . If your location has no horror on it, place 1 horror on it instead.

name: Encore
text: Forced - After Royal Emissary is added to the victory display: Remove all doom from play and reset the agenda deck to agenda 1a. Then, place 3 doom on that agenda.

name: The Stranger
text: Objective - When The Man in the Pallid Mask would be discarded from play, advance.

name: The Stranger
text: Objective - When The Man in the Pallid Mask would be discarded from play, advance.

name: The Stranger
text: Objective - When The Man in the Pallid Mask would be discarded from play, advance.

name: Curtain Call
text: While The Man in the Pallid Mask is not in play, the Lobby gains: "[action]: Resign. " Forced - At the end of the round: Place 1 horror on each location with no horror that is connected to a location with horror. Objective - If each undefeated investigator has resigned, advance.

name: Lobby
text: Forced - When Lobby is revealed: Put 2 of the set-aside Lobby Doorway locations into play, at random. [action] [action]: Draw 3 cards.

name: Balcony

text: Agatha Crane deck only. [reaction] After you succeed at a skill test, if no tokens are sealed here: Seal a non-symbol token revealed during this skill test on Ocula Obscura. (Limit once per phase.) Forced - When you would reveal a token from the chaos bag: Resolve the token sealed here instead, then release that token.

name: Glimpse the Void
text: Revelation - Put Glimpse the Void into play in your threat area. The first time you reveal 1 or more chaos tokens during each skill test, you must reveal 1 additional chaos token (and resolve its effects) . [action]: Shuffle Glimpse the Void into your deck.

name: Michael McGlen
text: [reaction] After you spend 1 or more ammo from a [[Firearm]] asset: Gain 1 resource. (Limit once per [[Firearm]] asset per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +2. You may place 1 ammo on a [[Firearm]] asset you control.

name: "Viola" Case
text: Michael McGlen deck only. You have 2 additional hand slots, which can only be used to hold [[Firearm]] assets. [reaction] After you play "Viola" Case: Search the top 9 cards of your deck for a [[Firearm]] asset and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.

name: Confiscation
text: Revelation - Shuffle each [[Firearm]] asset in your play area into your deck. If no asset was shuffled into your deck by this effect, take 1 damage and shuffle Confiscation back into your deck.

name: Gloria Goldberg
text: You choose the investigator order during the mythos phase. [reaction] When you look at 1 or more cards from the encounter deck: Look at 1 additional card and choose 1 non-[[Elite]] card among them. Either discard it, put it on top of the encounter deck, or place it facedown beneath Gloria Goldberg (max 3 cards beneath her). [elder_sign] effect: +1. Look at the top card of the encounter deck.

name: Psychic Sensitivity
text: Gloria Goldberg deck only. Fast. Play when an investigator at any location draws an encounter card, if there is a copy of that encounter card beneath Gloria Goldberg. Cancel all of that card's effects and discard both copies of it. Then, draw 1 card.

name: Prophecy of the End
text: Surge. Forced - If Gloria Goldberg uses her [reaction] ability and this treachery is among the looked-at cards, it must be chosen and placed facedown beneath her (if you cannot, discard a non-weakness card beneath her first). Then, if there are 3 copies of this treachery beneath her, she is defeated and suffers 1 mental trauma.

name: George Barnaby
text: Your max hand size is equal to the number of facedown cards beneath George Barnaby. (Limit 5 cards.) You may commit facedown cards beneath George Barnaby to skill tests as if they were in your hand. [reaction] After you discard a card from your hand: Place it facedown beneath George Barnaby, then draw 1 card. (Limit once per phase.) [elder_sign] effect: +1. Draw 1 card.

name: Grim Resolve
text: George Barnaby deck only. After this skill test resolves, you may swap any number of cards beneath George Barnaby with the same number of non-weakness cards in your hand.

name: Cast Adrift
text: Revelation - If there are no cards beneath George Barnaby, shuffle Cast Adrift into your deck. Otherwise, discard each card beneath George Barnaby.

name: The Book of War
text: Uses (3 secrets). [reaction] After you play a [[Tactic]] event, spend 1 secret and exhaust The Book of War: When your turn ends, return that event to your hand.

name: Crowbar
text: [action] Exhaust Crowbar: Investigate. This investigation attempt uses [combat] instead of [intellect]. [action] Exhaust Crowbar: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack.

name: Remington Model 1858
text: Uses (2 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. [reaction] When Remington Model 1858 leaves play: Immediately trigger the above [action] ability, ignoring all costs.

name: Primed for Action
text: Play only as your first action. Play a [[Firearm]] asset from your hand, reducing its cost by 2. Then, you may play an [[Upgrade]] event from your hand, attaching it to that asset if able.

name: Ready for Anything
text: Play only as your first action. Draw 1 card (2 cards instead if you drew an enemy this round). Then, heal 1 horror. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Hardboiled
text: Max 1 committed per skill test. Hardboiled gains [combat] [wild] for each successful attack you performed this round.

name: Hunter's Mark
text: Fast. Attach to an enemy at your location. Limit 1 per enemy. Investigators get +1 [combat] while fighting this enemy. [reaction] When damage is dealt to attached enemy, discard Hunter's Mark: Deal 1 additional damage to that enemy. Any investigator may trigger this ability.

name: Alice Luxley
text: You get +1 [intellect]. The first investigate action you perform each turn does not provoke attacks of opportunity. [reaction] After you discover a clue, exhaust Alice Luxley: Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location. Card design inspired by the Council in Exile 2022.

name: Bulwark
text: Limit 1 per investigator. Seal ([elder_sign] or +1). You may resolve this keyword again after you defeat an enemy. [reaction] When an enemy would attack an investigator at your location, exhaust Bulwark and release a token sealed here: Cancel that attack. Ready another asset you control.

name: Inspiring Presence
text: If this skill test is successful, ready an [[Ally]] asset at your location and heal 1 damage and 1 horror from it.

text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Your [[Firearm]] assets with "Uses (ammo)" enter play with 1 additional ammo on them.

text: Myriad. Fast. Play only during your turn. Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location. [reaction] After you draw Quick Shot during your turn: Play it, reducing its resource cost by 2.

name: Remington Model 1858
text: Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. [reaction] When Remington Model 1858 enters or leaves play: Immediately trigger the above [action] ability, ignoring all costs.

name: Forensic Kit
text: Uses (4 supplies). [action] Spend 1 supply: Investigate. For this investigation, you may use [agility] instead of [intellect], and you get +1 skill value. If you succeed and there is an exhausted enemy at your location, heal 1 horror.

text: Uses (0 resources). Resources on Mortar and Pestle may be spent to pay for [[Spell]] cards. [reaction] After you discover 1 or more clues, exhaust Mortar and Pestle: Place 1 resource on it (from the token pool) .

text: Limit 1 per investigator. You have 2 additional hand slots, which may only be used to hold [[Science]] and/or [[Tool]] assets.

name: Dial of Ancients
text: Researched. Limit 1 per deck. Uses (4 charges). [action]: Fight/Evade. text: Myriad. A Glimmer of Hope can only be played from your discard pile. Add all copies of A Glimmer of Hope in your discard pile to your hand (including this copy) .

text: Max 1 committed per test. For each additional chaos token revealed during this skill test (even if it was canceled or ignored), Confidence gains [wild] (to a maximum of +3 [wild] icons).

text: [[Detective]], [[Hunter]], [[Wayfarer]] deck only. While there is a [[Creature]] or [[Monster]] enemy at your location, you get +1 [willpower] and +1 [combat]. text: [[Blessed]], [[Clairvoyant]], [[Sorcerer]] deck only. [action]: Fight. Add your [willpower] value to your skill value for this attack.
