name: Barrier Node
text: Barrier Node cannot be defeated or leave play. [reaction] When your turn begins: Heal 1 damage from Barrier Node. [tdc_rune_q] · [tdc_rune_x] · [tdc_rune_g] · [tdc_rune_k] · [tdc_rune_s] Barrier Node gets +2 health.

name: The Apiary
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is half the amount of doom on enemies and assets in play, rounded down (to a max of 4). [cultist]: -1. If there is a [[Cultist]] enemy at your location, reveal another token. [tablet]: -3. If you fail, place 1 doom on an enemy at your location with no doom on it. [elder_thing]: -4. If you fail, take 1 damage or 1 horror.

name: Loathsome Parasites
text: Forced - When doom is placed on this agenda, if there are no non-[[Elite]] enemies in play: Reveal cards from the top of the encounter deck until an enemy is revealed and spawn it (at an empty location, if able). Shuffle each other revealed card and place them on top of the encounter deck.

name: Unsettling Signs
text: [action] Spend 1 or more clues, as a group: For each clue spent, discard the top 5 cards (10 cards instead if there is 1 investigator) of the encounter deck and draw each location discarded by this effect. Objective - If each surviving investigator is at a [[Sanctum]] location, investigators may spend the requisite clues, as a group, to advance. (Hint: you may not be able to explore further after you advance.)

name: Lost Pilgrims
text: Each [[Cultist]] enemy gains victory 0 and aloof. [action]: Parley. Test [intellect] (2) or [combat] (2). For each point you succeed by, move a different [[Cultist]] enemy at your location once in any direction. Forced - When the enemy phase ends: Each [[Cultist]] enemy takes 1 damage for each [[Stowaway]] enemy at its location. Objective - When the round ends, if there is a combined total of 5 or more [[Cultist]] cards in the victory display and/or under this act, you must advance.

name: The Hive Mind
text: [fast] During your turn, place X clues on your location: Deal X damage to a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location. Forced - When the round ends: Flip a coin. On heads, rotate Central Chamber once clockwise. On tails, rotate Central Chamber once counter-clockwise. Objective - If Mother is defeated, immediately advance.

name: Apiary Entrance
text: [action] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Shuffle each location in the encounter discard pile into the bottom 10 cards of the encounter deck. [fast]: Choose the farthest location from Apiary Entrance. Place clues on the chosen location up to its clue value. (Limit once per round.) [action]: Resign. You make your exit.

name: Apiary Entrance
text: When a [[Stowaway]] enemy is drawn, spawn it at Apiary Entrance instead of its normal spawn location. [action] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Place a [[Cultist]] asset or enemy at this location underneath the act. [action]: Resign. You make your exit.

name: Fleshy Paths
text: Revelation - Put Fleshy Paths into play. [action]: Test [intellect] (2) to search the flesh-like walls. If you succeed, put the set-aside Ancient Relic [tdc_rune_s] asset into play under your control.

name: Fleshy Paths [tdc_rune_r]
text: Revelation - Put Fleshy Paths [tdc_rune_r] into play. [action] You discover this glyph: [tdc_rune_r] In your Campaign Log, record "Time" under [tdc_rune_r] on the glyph record. This glyph has been translated.

name: Growing Fields
text: Revelation - Put Growing Fields into play along with the set-aside Hidden Vault [tdc_rune_u] location. [action]: Test [willpower] (8). Double the skill icons of each card committed to this test. If you succeed, take control of the set-aside Grisly "Mask" story asset.

name: Churning Chasm
text: Revelation - Put Churning Chasm into play and spawn the set-aside Squamous Parasite [tdc_rune_t] enemy at it. [reaction] When you begin your turn in Churning Chasm: Move to any revealed location.

name: Corrupted Vault [tdc_rune_q]
text: Revelation - Put Corrupted Vault [tdc_rune_q] into play. [action][action]: You discover this glyph: [tdc_rune_q] In your Campaign Log, record "Hand" under [tdc_rune_q] on the glyph record. This glyph has been translated.

name: Luminous Tunnels
text: Revelation - Put Luminous Tunnels into play. Shuffle the set-aside Pilgrims encounter set into the encounter deck along with the encounter discard pile. Find the set-aside Spawning Grounds and Corrupted Vault [tdc_rune_q] and shuffle them into the bottom 10 cards of the encounter deck. [action] Take 1 damage: Place clues on the location farthest from Apiary Entrance up to its clue value.

name: Spawning Grounds
text: Revelation - Put Spawning Grounds into play. Shuffle the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck. Find the set-aside Lost Campsite and Churning Chasm and shuffle them into the bottom 10 cards of the encounter deck.

name: Lost Campsite
text: Revelation - Put Lost Campsite into play. [action]: Draw the topmost card beneath Lost Campsite.

name: Maria Rivera
text: When damage would be placed on a [[Cultist]] enemy at your location, place it on Maria Rivera instead. [reaction] When doom would be placed on a [[Cultist]] enemy, exhaust Maria Rivera: Place it on Maria Rivera instead, as damage. Forced - If Maria Rivera is defeated: Add her to the victory display.

name: Grasping Corridor
text: Revelation - Put Grasping Corridor into play. Shuffle the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck. Find the set-aside Starving Corridor and Corrupted Vault [tdc_rune_q] and shuffle them into the bottom 10 cards of the encounter deck. [action] Take 1 horror: Place clues on the location farthest from Apiary Entrance up to its clue value.

name: Starving Corridor
text: Revelation - Put Starving Corridor into play. Shuffle the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck. Find the set-aside Acidic Coelom and Churning Chasm and shuffle them into the bottom 10 cards of the encounter deck.

name: Acidic Coelom
text: Revelation - Put Acidic Coelom into play. As an additional cost to move from Acidic Coelom to Apiary Entrance, you must take 1 damage.

name: Central Chamber
text: Central Chamber is connected to the location below it (bordering its bottom edge) and vice versa. Forced - When your turn ends, if you are at this location: Test [agility] (1). If you fail, you must either move to a connecting location or Mother attacks you.

name: Mother
text: Massive. Relentless. Forced - When another [[Stowaway]] enemy is defeated: Move all damage on that enemy to Mother. (If that enemy had doom on it, shuffle that enemy into the encounter deck as well.)

name: Grotesque Amalgam
text: Hunter. Retaliate. Forced - After you fight this enemy using a [[Weapon]] asset: Place 1 doom on that asset.

name: Apiary Tender
text: Aloof. Hunter. Prey - Lowest [agility]. Forced - When doom is placed on a card at this location: Ready Apiary Tender. It loses aloof until the end of the round. If it is engaged with an investigator, it makes an immediate attack.

name: Hungry Walls
text: Revelation - Attach this card to your location. Forced - When you leave attached location: Test [agility] (4) or [combat] (4). If you fail and you tested... - ...[agility], discard an asset you control and take 1 damage. Discard Hungry Walls. - ...[combat], take 2 direct damage. Discard Hungry Walls.

name: Dangerous Curiosity
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (X), where X is your location's shroud value. If you fail, take 1 damage and discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a [[Stowaway]] enemy is discarded and draw it. Shuffle each location discarded by this effect back into the encounter deck.

name: Alien Eggs
text: Surge. Revelation - Place 1 doom on the nearest non-[[Elite]] enemy with no doom on it.

name: Hidden Vault [tdc_rune_u]
text: Forced - After Hidden Vault [tdc_rune_u] enters play: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for an enemy and spawn it at this location. [reaction] After you successfully evade an enemy at Hidden Vault [tdc_rune_u] by 2 or more: Flip this card and resolve its text.

name: Hidden Vault [tdc_rune_u]
text: You find an alien panel hidden behind a fold of fleshy wall. Grimacing, you press it and reveal a round alcove untouched by the alien growths. Sharp glowing symbols connected by curling lines appear on a black slate in the center of the alcove. After some study, you recognize it as some kind of ancestral tree. There are hundreds upon hundreds of names: how many creatures lived in this city aeons ago? You discover this glyph: [tdc_rune_u] In your Campaign Log, record "Daughters" under [tdc_rune_u] on the glyph record. This glyph has been translated. Flip this card back to its location side. It cannot be flipped over again.

name: Squamous Parasite [tdc_rune_t]
text: Retaliate. If Squamous Parasite [tdc_rune_t] would leave play, set it aside, out of play. Forced - When you defeat Squamous Parasite [tdc_rune_t]: Flip this enemy and resolve its text.

name: Squamous Parasite [tdc_rune_t]
text: The alien creature's hard carapace crumbles to reveal a shining black sigil. It must have devoured this piece of technology... or was it assembled from it? Pressing the sigil projects an image of a cloudy golden sky. Somewhere not of this world. A series of glyphs and descending lines overlay the scene. Eventually, their meaning becomes clear. You discover this glyph: [tdc_rune_t] In your Campaign Log, record "Air" under [tdc_rune_t] on the glyph record. This glyph has been translated. Add this card to the victory display.

name: Ancient Relic [tdc_rune_s]
text: If Ancient Relic [tdc_rune_s] would leave play, set it aside, out of play. Forced - After you take 1 or more damage: Deal 1 damage to Ancient Relic [tdc_rune_s]. [reaction] When you end the game with Ancient Relic [tdc_rune_s] under your control: Flip this card and resolve its text.

name: Ancient Relic [tdc_rune_s]
text: Twisting portions of the relic unlocks a small cylinder in the center. Inside the cylinder is an even smaller version of the same relic, and within the smaller relic is a glittering gem. Holding it up to the light projects a series of small dots that form some kind of code. One of the expedition members identifies it as a blueprint of sorts: the symbols appear to be instructions for repairing some kind of machine. You discover this glyph: [tdc_rune_s] In your Campaign Log, record "Machine" under [tdc_rune_s] on the glyph record. This glyph has been translated. Add this card to the victory display.

name: Grisly "Mask"
text: [fast] Exhaust Grisly "Mask": Disengage from each enemy. Until the beginning of your next turn, you cannot move and cannot damage enemies or engage them. [tdc_rune_j] · [tdc_rune_m] · [tdc_rune_s] · [tdc_rune_c] · [tdc_rune_b] [fast] Take 1 direct horror and exhaust Grisly "Mask": Deal 2 damage to an enemy at your location.

name: Parasitic Transformation
text: Revelation - Put Parasitic Transformation into play in your threat area. Forced - After an enemy engages you: Place 1 doom on Parasitic Transformation. [action][action]: Discard Parasitic Transformation.

name: The Grand Vault
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is half the number of activated locations (rounded down). [cultist]: -3. If you fail, you must either deactivate your location or take 1 damage or 1 horror. [tablet]: -2 (-3 instead if your location is partially flooded; -4 instead if your location is fully flooded). [elder_thing]: -4. If you fail, search the encounter discard pile for a copy of the Still Behind You treachery and add it to the victory display.

name: Bowels of the City
text: Forced - When your turn begins, if your location is fully flooded, you struggle for air: When your turn ends, if you did not enter a partially flooded or unflooded location during your turn, or decrease your location's flood level, take 5 direct damage.

name: Devil in the Machine
text: The Inescapable gets +1 [per_investigator] health. When The Inescapable moves via its hunter keyword, each location is considered to be connected to each adjacent location. Forced - When your turn begins, if your location is fully flooded, you struggle for air: When your turn ends, if you did not enter a partially flooded or unflooded location during your turn, or decrease your location's flood level, take 5 direct damage.

name: Ever-Shifting Walls
text: The Inescapable gets +2 [per_investigator] health. When The Inescapable moves via its hunter keyword, each location is considered to be connected to each adjacent location. Forced - When your turn begins, if your location is fully flooded, you struggle for air: When your turn ends, if you did not enter a partially flooded or unflooded location during your turn, or decrease your location's flood level, take 5 direct damage.

name: Careful Navigation
text: [reaction] After the investigators have translated any 3 of the following glyphs ([tdc_rune_l], [tdc_rune_m], [tdc_rune_n], [tdc_rune_p], [tdc_rune_o]): Reveal the Sealed Chamber location. (Hint: Each of these glyphs are found in this scenario.) . Objective - When the round ends, if an investigator controls the Tidal Tablet story asset, advance.

name: Back Through the Machine
text: Objective - If each surviving investigator has resigned, advance.

name: The Great Stair
text: The Great Stair cannot be flooded. [action]: Resign. You venture into darkness, leaving the churning machinery behind.

name: Moving Platform
text: Moving Platform cannot be flooded. Moving Platform is connected to each adjacent location, and vice versa. [fast] Investigators at Moving Platform spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Swap Moving Platform with an adjacent [[Vault]] location.

name: Core of the Vault
text: Core of the Vault cannot be flooded. Forced - If The Inescapable is defeated at this location: Search all in- and out-of-play areas for each copy of Still Behind You and remove them from the game. In your Campaign Log, record the creature was defeated. [action] [action] Spend 3 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: You study the machine. Proceed to Scenario Interlude: The Vault Core (page 26) .

name: Shrouded Cistern
text: This location's flood level cannot be decreased. Forced - After Shrouded Cistern is revealed: Increase its flood level. [action]: You open up a new passageway. Activate this location. Then, increase the flood level of any eligible [[Vault]] location.

name: Chamber of Records [tdc_rune_l]
text: [action]: Activate this location. [reaction] After the last clue is discovered from this location, you discover this glyph: [tdc_rune_l] In your Campaign Log, record "Arm" under [tdc_rune_l] on the glyph record. This glyph has been translated.

name: Chamber of Records [tdc_rune_m]
text: [action]: Activate this location. [reaction] After the last clue is discovered from this location, you discover this glyph: [tdc_rune_m] In your Campaign Log, record "Earth" under [tdc_rune_m] on the glyph record. This glyph has been translated.

name: Otherworldly Mechanisms
text: Forced - When you reveal Otherworldly Mechanisms: Draw 1 random set-aside [[Glyph]] treachery, if able. [action] Choose and discard 3 cards from your hand: Activate this location.

name: Otherworldly Mechanisms
text: Forced - When you reveal Otherworldly Mechanisms: Draw 1 random set-aside [[Glyph]] treachery, if able. [action] Take 1 damage and 1 horror: Activate this location.

name: Otherworldly Mechanisms
text: Forced - When you reveal Otherworldly Mechanisms: Draw 1 random set-aside [[Glyph]] treachery, if able. [action] Spend 5 resources: Activate this location.

name: Otherworldly Mechanisms
text: Forced - When you reveal Otherworldly Mechanisms: Draw 1 random set-aside [[Glyph]] treachery, if able. [action] Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck: Draw each revealed weakness and remove the rest from the game. Activate this location.

name: Chamber of the Tablet
text: Chamber of the Tablet cannot be flooded. Chamber of the Tablet is connected to the location to the left of it, and vice versa. [reaction] After the last clue is discovered from Chamber of the Tablet: Choose an investigator at this location to take control of the set-aside Tidal Tablet story asset.

name: Slitherer in Darkness
text: Spawn - Nearest flooded location. Slitherer in Darkness cannot enter unflooded locations. Forced - When the enemy phase begins, if there are no investigators at this enemy's location: This enemy attacks the investigator with the lowest [combat] at a connecting location. If no attack was made, Slitherer in Darkness moves to the flooded location nearest the Moving Platform.

name: Vault Attendant
text: Hunter. Spawn - Engaged with prey. Prey - Most clues. When Vault Attendant moves via its hunter keyword, its location is considered to be connected to each activated location.

name: Deadly Mechanisms
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, you must decide (choose one; choose two instead if it is act 2): - Deactivate the nearest activated [[Vault]] location. - Draw 1 of the set-aside Vault Attendant enemies. - Move to an adjacent location (flooded if able).

name: Ancient Vault [tdc_rune_o]
text: Revelation - Attach Ancient Vault [tdc_rune_o] to your location. Cannot be canceled. [action] Choose and discard assets from your play area with a total printed resource cost of at least X, where X is the shroud value of attached location: Flip this card over and resolve its text.

name: Ancient Vault [tdc_rune_o]
text: A small switch at the base of the wall opens into a cramped musty room. As you enter, a small glyph in the floor begins to glow a dim green. The light intensifies until it is blindingly bright, and the air in the room begins to crackle with energy. The glyph flares even brighter, then goes dark. The symbol's meaning will forever be burned into your memory. You discover this glyph: [tdc_rune_o] In your Campaign Log, record "Power" under [tdc_rune_o] on the glyph record. This glyph has been translated. Add this card to the victory display.

name: Ancient Vault [tdc_rune_n]
text: Revelation - Attach Ancient Vault [tdc_rune_n] to your location. Cannot be canceled. [action] Take a combined total of X damage and/or horror, where X is attached location's shroud: Flip this card over.

name: Ancient Vault [tdc_rune_n]
text: Within the ancient vault is a large octagonal room that resembles a kind of laboratory. A central console resembles a clawed hand, with two of its "fingers" raised. Nodes in the console project a glowing translucent letter. Curious, you press one hand to a central node. A vision overwhelmes your mind: a torrential wave, a sundered mountain, burning forests and atmosphere. You pull one hand away, uncertain of what you just experienced. A record? A vision? You discover this glyph: [tdc_rune_n] In your Campaign Log, record "Doom" under [tdc_rune_n] on the glyph record. This glyph has been translated. Add this card to the victory display.

name: Ancient Vault [tdc_rune_p]
text: Revelation - Attach Ancient Vault [tdc_rune_p] to your location. Cannot be canceled. [action] Choose and discard X cards from your hand, where X is attached location's shroud: Flip this card over.

name: Ancient Vault [tdc_rune_p]
text: The room within the vault is dark and featureless, save for an incandescent, smoky orb suspended in the center. Inspecting it closer, you find a full-scale model of an alien planet. Small storm systems move along the surface at an accelerated rate, swirling and dissipating in seconds. When you touch it, your senses are assailed by invisible gales, torrential rain, and a crack of thunder. Lines of swirling alien writing appear on the globe, conveying a record of an ancient storm. You discover this glyph: [tdc_rune_p] In your Campaign Log, record "Weather" under [tdc_rune_p] on the glyph record. This glyph has been translated. Add this card to the victory display.

name: Tidal Tablet
text: [reaction] When your location's flood level is increased: Move to a connecting location. [tdc_rune_l] · [tdc_rune_k] · [tdc_rune_d] [fast] Exhaust Tidal Tablet: Increase the flood level of your location. Then, choose another flooded location and decrease its flood level.

name: Court of the Ancients
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the number of [[Glyph]] cards in the victory display. [cultist]: -2 (-4 instead if there is a [[Stowaway]] enemy at your location). [tablet]: -2. If your location is flooded, reveal another token. [elder_thing]: -4. If this token is revealed during an attack or evasion attempt, take 1 damage or 1 horror.

name: Flooded Archives
text: Forced - When your turn begins, if your location is fully flooded, you struggle for air: When your turn ends, if you did not enter an unflooded or partially flooded location during your turn, take 5 direct damage.

name: Unstable Foundations
text: During the enemy phase, each location is considered to be connected to the location above and below it. Forced - After the Great Lift moves: Each investigator at the Great Lift must test [agility] (2). Each investigator who fails takes 1 damage.

name: Steps of Giants
text: [action] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues: Discard the top 5 cards of the encounter deck (8 cards instead if there is only 1 investigator). Draw 1 [[Glyph]] card discarded by this effect. Then, one at a time, draw each [[Omen]] card discarded by this effect. Objective - After the Great Lift flips to its (Active) side, immediately advance.

name: Escape the Tower (v.I)
text: [action] If you are at Twisting Catwalks: Resign. [action] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues: Discard the top 5 cards of the encounter deck (8 cards instead if there is only 1 investigator). Draw 1 [[Glyph]] card discarded by this effect. Then, one at a time, draw each [[Omen]] card discarded by this effect. Objective - If each surviving investigator has resigned, advance.

name: Escape the Tower (v.II)
text: [action] If you are at East Antechamber: Resign. [action] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues: Discard the top 5 cards of the encounter deck (8 cards instead if there is only 1 investigator). Draw 1 [[Glyph]] card discarded by this effect. Then, one at a time, draw each [[Omen]] card discarded by this effect. Objective - If each surviving investigator has resigned, advance.

name: West Antechamber
text: [fast] During your turn, investigators at this location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group (2 [per_investigator] clues instead if this location is flooded): Slide the Great Lift down once.

name: East Antechamber
text: [fast] During your turn, investigators at this location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group (2 [per_investigator] clues instead if this location is flooded): Slide the Great Lift down once.

name: Twisting Catwalks
text: Forced - After an enemy at Twisting Catwalks deals damage and/or horror to you: Choose and discard 1 card from your hand. [reaction] After you defeat an enemy at this location: Discard the top X cards of the encounter deck, where X is that enemy's printed health. Draw 1 [[Glyph]] card discarded by this effect.

name: Great Lift
text: Great Lift cannot move and is connected to the locations to the right and left of it, and vice versa. Forced - When the last clue is discovered from this location: Flip Great Lift (keeping all tokens and attachments).

name: Great Lift
text: Great Lift is connected to the locations to the right and left of it, and vice versa. [reaction]When you successfully investigate this location, instead of discovering clues: Slide Great Lift up or down once. You may spend 1 [per_investigator] clues to slide Great Lift up or down one additional time.

name: Ancient Altar
text: [action]: Test [willpower] or [intellect] (5) to break the seal. This test gets -1 difficulty for every 5 glyphs the investigators have translated (to a max of -4). If you succeed, take control of the set-aside Shard of Y'ch'lecht story asset.

name: Ring Library
text: [reaction] When you discard 1 or more cards from the top of the encounter deck, choose and discard 1 card from your hand: Discard 2 additional cards from the top of the encounter deck. [action]: Move. Move to a revealed [[Passageway]] location.

name: Ring Library
text: [reaction] When you discard 1 or more cards from the top of the encounter deck, take 1 direct horror: Discard 3 additional cards from the top of the encounter deck.

name: Lofty Walkway
text: This location gets -1 shroud for each [[Glyph]] card in the victory display. Forced - When this location is revealed: Spawn the set-aside Star Spawn Observer at this location. [action]: Move. Move to a revealed [[Passageway]] location.

name: Lofty Walkway
text: Forced - After you discard 1 or more cards from the top of the encounter deck while at Lofty Walkway: The nearest ready, non-[[Elite]] enemy disengages from each investigator and moves to this location.

name: Luminous Archives
text: Luminous Archives gets +1 shroud for each [[Glyph]] card at or attached to it. [fast] Spend X actions (to a minimum of 1): Search the encounter discard pile for up to X [[Glyph]] cards and draw them, one at a time. [action]: Move. Move to a revealed [[Passageway]] location.

name: Luminous Archives
text: Forced - When the investigation phase ends, if there are clues on Luminous Archives: Shuffle each [[Glyph]] treachery attached to this location into the encounter deck. [action] [action]: Search the encounter discard pile for a [[Glyph]] card and draw it.

name: Court Keeper [tdc_rune_k]
text: If the investigators have translated 10 or more glyphs, this enemy gains relentless. Forced - When you defeat this enemy, discover this glyph: [tdc_rune_k] In your Campaign Log, record "Dreams" under [tdc_rune_k] on the glyph record. This glyph has been translated.

name: Court Keeper [tdc_rune_j]
text: If the investigators have translated 10 or more glyphs, this enemy gains alert and retaliate. Forced - When you defeat this enemy, discover this glyph: [tdc_rune_j] In your Campaign Log, record "Sleep" under [tdc_rune_j] on the glyph record. This glyph has been translated.

name: Ancient Vault [tdc_rune_g]
text: Revelation - If this treachery is drawn from the encounter discard pile, attach it to your location. Otherwise, discard it and it gains surge. [action]: Test [willpower] (3). If you succeed, record "Life" under [tdc_rune_g] on the glyph record in your Campaign Log. This glyph has been translated. Add this card to the victory display.

name: Ancient Vault [tdc_rune_i]
text: Revelation - If this treachery is drawn from the encounter discard pile, attach it to your location. Otherwise, discard it and it gains surge. [action]: Test [combat] (3). If you succeed, record "Cthulhu" under [tdc_rune_i] on the glyph record in your Campaign Log. This glyph has been translated. Add this card to the victory display.

name: Ruined Orrery [tdc_rune_h]
text: Revelation - If this treachery is drawn from the encounter discard pile, attach it to your location. Otherwise, discard it and it gains surge. [action]: Test [intellect] (3). If you succeed, record "Y'ch'lecht" under [tdc_rune_h] on the glyph record in your Campaign Log. This glyph has been translated. Add this card to the victory display.

name: Colossal Tyrant
text: Massive. Colossal Tyrant gets +3 [per_investigator] health and cannot move. Forced - When the enemy phase ends, if there are no investigators at Colossal Tyrant's location: Deal 1 direct horror to each card with sanity at each adjacent location.

name: Cosmic Omen
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). If the investigators have translated 10 or more glyphs, this test gets +2 difficulty. If you fail, you must either shuffle one [[Glyph]] card in play into the encounter deck, or take 1 direct horror and discard 1 card at random from your hand.

name: Winged Keeper
text: Alert. Spawn - Highest level with no investigators. Prey - Lowest [agility]. Forced - When the enemy phase begins, if this enemy is ready and unengaged: It moves to its prey's location.

name: Shard of Y'ch'lecht
text: You may ignore the first attack made against you by a [[Star Spawn]] or [[Deep One]] enemy each round. [tdc_rune_b] · [tdc_rune_x] · [tdc_rune_o] · [tdc_rune_k] [reaction] When a [[Star Spawn]] or [[Deep One]] enemy enters your location, exhaust this card: Exhaust that enemy.

name: Obsidian Canyons
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the current Storm Intensity. [cultist]: -4. If this test fails, place 1 doom on the nearest enemy. [tablet]: -1 for each open sky adjacent to your current location. [elder_thing]: -2. If there is an enemy at your location, reveal another token.

name: Western Winds
text: Forced - When the round ends, reveal tokens from the chaos bag equal to the storm intensity. If a non-[elder_sign] symbol token is revealed: - Shuffle the rightmost open sky/[[Summit]] locations in rows 2 and 4 and place them on top of the Summit deck (or place them in the victory display instead if they have Victory X and no clues on them). Each enemy, token, and attachment at those locations/open sky are discarded. - Slide each open sky and [[Summit]] location in rows 2 and 4 once to the right. - Place the bottom card of the Summit deck in each gap created. - Flip this card.

name: Eastern Winds
text: Forced - When the round ends, reveal tokens from the chaos bag equal to the storm intensity. If a non-[elder_sign] symbol token is revealed: - Shuffle the leftmost open sky/[[Summit]] locations in rows 1 and 3 and place them on top of the Summit deck (or place them in the victory display instead if they have Victory X and no clues on them). Each enemy, token, and attachment at those locations/open sky are discarded. - Slide each open sky and [[Summit]] location in rows 1 and 3 once to the left. - Place the bottom card of the Summit deck in each gap created. - Flip this card.

name: Otherworldly Storms
text: Each non-weakness enemy may enter or leave open sky as if it were a location. Each location is connected to each location (and open sky) adjacent to it. Forced - When an investigator's location would leave play: Move that investigator to any [[Central]] location. They take 2 direct damage.

name: Encroaching Storms
text: Each non-weakness enemy may enter or leave open sky as if it were a location. Each location is connected to each location (and open sky) adjacent to it. Forced - When an investigator's location would leave play: Move that investigator to any [[Central]] location. They take 2 direct damage.

name: Searching the Spires
text: [action] Spend X clues: Reveal X cards from the bottom of the Summit deck. You may put 1 revealed location into play in an adjacent open sky and move to it. (Place that open sky card and each other revealed card on top of the Summit deck in any order.) Objective - If each surviving investigator is at Central Spire, advance.

name: To the Ancient Dome!
text: [action] Spend X clues: Reveal X cards from the bottom of the Summit deck. You may put 1 revealed location into play in an adjacent open sky and move to it. (Place that open sky card and each other revealed card on top of the Summit deck in any order.) Objective - If each surviving investigator has resigned, advance.

name: Scouring the Spires
text: [action] Spend X clues: Reveal X cards from the bottom of the Summit deck. You may put 1 revealed location into play in an adjacent open sky and move to it. (Place that open sky card and each other revealed card on top of the Summit deck in any order.) Objective - If each surviving investigator is at Central Spire, advance.

name: Deadly Skies
text: [action] Spend X clues: Reveal X cards from the bottom of the Summit deck. You may put 1 revealed location into play in an adjacent open sky and move to it. (Place that open sky card and each other revealed card on top of the Summit deck in any order.) Objective - If each surviving investigator is at Floating Spire, advance.

name: Return to the Shoreline
text: [action] Spend X clues: Reveal X cards from the bottom of the Summit deck. You may put 1 revealed location into play in an adjacent open sky and move to it. (Place that open sky card and each other revealed card on top of the Summit deck in any order.) Objective - If each surviving investigator has resigned, advance.

name: R'lyeh Streets
text: R'lyeh Streets cannot be moved or leave play. [action] Spend 1-3 resources: Place that many clues (from the token pool) on any revealed location (Limit once per round.)

name: Central Spire
text: Central Spire cannot be moved or leave play. [action] Spend 1-3 resources: Place that many clues (from the token pool) on any revealed location (Limit once per round.)

name: Floating Spire
text: Floating Spire cannot be moved or leave play. [action] Spend 1-3 resources: Place that many clues (from the token pool) on any revealed location (Limit once per round.)

name: Western Wall
text: Western Wall cannot be moved or leave play. Forced - After you reveal this location: Draw the set-aside Eroded Frieze [tdc_rune_e] treachery. [action]: Resign. You clamber down.

name: Ancient Dome
text: Ancient Dome cannot be moved or leave play. Forced - After you reveal this location: Draw the set-aside Eroded Frieze [tdc_rune_e] treachery. [action]: Resign. You clamber down.

name: Eastern Athenaeum [tdc_rune_b]
text: [action] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: You discover this glyph: [tdc_rune_b] In your Campaign Log, record "Plant" under [tdc_rune_b] on the glyph record. This glyph has been translated.

name: Western Athenaeum [tdc_rune_c]
text: [reaction] After you discover the last clue at this location: You discover this glyph: [tdc_rune_c] In your Campaign Log, record "Elder Thing" under [tdc_rune_c] on the glyph record. This glyph has been translated.

name: Obsidian Cliffs
text: [action] Choose an adjacent open sky: Test [intellect] (3). If you succeed, put the set-aside Glyph Orrery [tdc_rune_d] into play in the chosen open sky (placing that open sky on top of the Summit deck).

name: Suspended Reef
text: Forced - After you end your turn at this location: You must either discard 1 card at random from your hand or take 1 damage. [fast] During your turn, spend 1 clue: Choose an enemy at a [[Summit]] location up to 3 connections away. Swap places with the chosen enemy, ignoring its location's Forced effect.

name: Hanging Ship
text: Forced - After you end your turn at this location: Test [agility] (X), where X is the number of investigators at this location. If you fail, discard Hanging Ship (to the top of the Summit deck). [action] Each investigator at this location spends 1 clue: Slide Hanging Ship once into an adjacent open sky.

name: Ancient Canyons
text: Forced - After you reveal this location: Test [agility] (1). If you fail, search the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[Monster]] enemy and spawn it engaged with you. [action]: Put the set-aside Sky Relic [tdc_rune_f] asset into play under your control.

name: Dazzling Skyline
text: Forced - After you reveal Dazzling Skyline: Take 1 horror. [action] Spend 1-3 clues: For each clue spent, reveal the bottom 3 cards of the Summit deck. You may place those cards on either the top or bottom of the Summit deck, in any order.

name: Aerial Waterfall
text: [fast] During your turn, spend 1 clue: Choose any revealed [[Summit]] location and move to it. (Limit once per round.) [action] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues: Put the set-aside Obsidian Claw story asset into play under control of any investigator, (Speed) side faceup.

name: Magnetic Spires
text: You cannot trigger abilities on [[Firearm]] assets while you are at Magnetic Spires. [action] Each investigator at this location spends 1 clue: Choose an open sky up to 2 spaces away. Swap Magnetic Spires with the chosen open sky. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Glyph Orrery [tdc_rune_d]
text: If Glyph Orrery [tdc_rune_d] would leave play, set it aside, out of play (or in the victory display if it has no clues on it). Forced - When you would enter this location, if you do not control the Obsidian Claw: You must either spend 1 clue or test [agility] (2). If you fail, cancel the effects of the move. [action] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Flip this card.

name: Glyph Orrery [tdc_rune_d]
text: You discover this glyph: [tdc_rune_d] In your Campaign Log, record "Wave" under [tdc_rune_d] on the glyph record. This glyph has been translated. Flip this card back over to its location side. It cannot be flipped over again.

name: Sky Relic [tdc_rune_f]
text: If Sky Relic [tdc_rune_f] would leave play, remove it from the game. [action]: Test [agility] (8). Double the skill icons of each card committed to this skill test. If you succeed, flip this card and resolve its text.

name: Sky Relic [tdc_rune_f]
text: You discover the following glyph: [tdc_rune_f] In your Campaign Log, record "Stars" under [tdc_rune_f] on the glyph record. This glyph has been translated. Add this card to the victory display.

name: Eroded Frieze [tdc_rune_e]
text: Revelation - Attach Eroded Frieze [tdc_rune_e] to your location. Cannot be canceled. If Eroded Frieze [tdc_rune_e] would leave play, set it aside, out of play. [action]: Test [combat] or [intellect] (3). If you fail, take 1 damage. Otherwise, put 1 resource on this card. If there are 1 [per_investigator] resources on Eroded Frieze [tdc_rune_e], flip it and resolve its text.

name: Eroded Frieze [tdc_rune_e]
text: You discover this glyph: [tdc_rune_e] In your Campaign Log, record "Darkness" under [tdc_rune_e] on the glyph record. This glyph has been translated. Add this card to the victory display.

name: St. Elmo's Fire
text: Revelation - Attach St. Elmo's Fire to the nearest location without St. Elmo's Fire attached. Forced - When the round ends: Each investigator at this location takes 1 damage. Attach St. Elmo's Fire to an adjacent location (with investigators, if able).

name: Acrophobia
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (1). This test gets +1 difficulty for each open sky adjacent to your location. For each point you fail by, you must either lose 1 action or take 1 horror.

name: Wings of Terror
text: Revelation - Put Wings of Terror into play in your threat area. Forced - After you fail a skill test: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until an enemy is discarded. Either draw that enemy, or that enemy attacks you (from the discard pile). Then, discard Wings of Terror.

name: Lost in the Clouds
text: Peril. Revelation - You must decide (choose one): - Place 1 doom on the current agenda. This effect can cause the current agenda to advance. - Each investigator takes 2 direct horror. - Resolve the Forced effect on the Eastern Winds/Western Winds story card as if you had drawn a non-[elder_sign] symbol token.

name: Primeval Terror
text: Patrol (nearest empty [[Summit]] location). Cannot make attacks of opportunity. While engaged with this enemy, you may enter open sky as if it were a location. If you defeat or disengage from this enemy while at open sky, you are defeated and suffer 1 physical trauma.

name: Star Vampire
text: Hunter. Relentless. Prey - Most remaining health. Forced - After this enemy attacks: Heal 1 damage from it.

name: Obsidian Claw
text: Cannot leave play. Enters play (Speed) side faceup. [fast] During your turn, exhaust this card and choose a location up to 2 connections away: Move to the chosen location. [tdc_rune_a] · [tdc_rune_p] · [tdc_rune_m] · [tdc_rune_e] · [tdc_rune_b] · [tdc_rune_c] [fast]: Flip this card. (Max once per round.)

name: Obsidian Claw
text: Cannot leave play. Enters play (Speed) side faceup. [action] Exhaust Obsidian Claw: Fight. You may use your [agility] instead of your [combat] and get +1 skill value for this attack. If the attacked enemy is exhausted, this attack deals +1 damage. [fast]: Flip this card. (Max once per round.)

name: Sepulchre of the Sleeper
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the current Disturbance (to a maximum of 6). [cultist]: -4. If you fail, draw the top card of the encounter deck. If you fail by 3 or more, that card gains peril and surge. [tablet]: -4. For each point you fail by, you must either take 1 horror or discard 1 card from your hand. [elder_thing]: -3. Reveal another token.

name: Beneath the City
text: Forced - When doom would be placed on a card other than a story asset: Place 1 resource on the scenario reference card, as Disturbance, instead. If the current Disturbance is 6 or more (8 or more instead of there are exactly 1 or 2 investigators in the game), immediately advance. Objective - Prepare your artifacts for the final showdown!

name: Cthulhu
text: Hunter. Massive. Relentless. Spawn - Dreamer's Rest. Forced - After Cthulhu is evaded: Either ready him, or each investigator at Cthulhu's location takes 1 direct damage.

name: Cthulhu Awakened
text: Forced - When doom is placed on this agenda: Each investigator takes 1 direct horror. [fast] During your turn, remove 1 doom from an [[Artifact]] asset you control: Cthulhu loses relentless and gets -1 fight and -1 evade until the end of the round. (Limit once per asset per round.) Objective - If you manage to defeat Cthulhu: (→R1) (page 39)

name: Dreamer's Rest
text: Forced - After an investigator fails a test at this location: Place 1 resource on the scenario reference card, as Disturbance.

name: Sigil-Carved Alcove
text: Forced - When Cthulhu enters this location: Each investigator discards 1 card at random from their hand. [action]: Test [willpower] (5). If you succeed, place 1 doom on Obsidian Claw. Investigators at this location may spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to place 1 additional doom on Obsidian Claw.

name: Sigil-Carved Alcove
text: Forced - When Cthulhu enters this location: Each investigator takes 1 direct damage. [action]: Test [combat] (5). If you succeed, place 1 doom on Barrier Node. Investigators at this location may spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to place 1 additional doom on Barrier Node.

name: Sigil-Carved Alcove
text: Forced - When Cthulhu enters this location: Each investigator takes 1 direct horror. [action]: Test [intellect] (5). If you succeed, place 1 doom on Tidal Tablet. Investigators at this location may spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to place 1 additional doom on Tidal Tablet.

name: Sigil-Carved Alcove
text: Forced - When Cthulhu enters this location: Each investigator loses 2 resources. [action]: Test [agility] (5). If you succeed, place 1 doom on Grisly "Mask". Investigators at this location may spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to place 1 additional doom on Grisly "Mask".

name: Sigil-Carved Alcove
text: Forced - When Cthulhu enters this location: Each investigator removes the top card of their deck from the game. [action] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues: Place 1 doom on Shard of Y'ch'lecht. Investigators at this location may spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to place 1 additional doom on Shard of Y'ch'lecht.

name: The Doom of Arkham Pt I
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is half the number of locations with no scenario cards beneath them (rounded up). [cultist]: -3. If this test fails, place 1 doom on the nearest enemy with no doom on it. [tablet]: -3. If this test fails, place 1 of your clues on your location. [elder_thing]: -2. If your location is flooded, reveal another token.

name: The Coming Storm
text: [action]: Resign. You give up your search. Forced - When doom is placed on this agenda: Increase the flood level of the lead investigator's location.

name: The Phantom Shop
text: [action] Investigators at your location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Draw the top card beneath your location. If it is an asset, take control of it. Objective - When the round ends, if an investigator at Tillinghast Esoterica controls at least 1 [[Artifact]] asset, the investigators may advance. (Hint: Recover as many artifacts as possible!)

name: Tillinghast Esoterica
text: Revelation - Put Tillinghast Esoterica into play adjacent to your location and spawn the set-aside Randall Tillinghast at it. Shuffle each set-aside [[Artifact]] asset and place them underneath it as a stack. Tillinghast Esoterica is connected to the location from which it was drawn, and vice versa. [fast]: Place clues on this location up to its clue value.

name: Randall Tillinghast
text: Relentless. Retaliate. Randall Tillinghast cannot move and gets +1 fight and +1[per_investigator] health for each card beneath Tillinghast Esoterica.

name: John Raymond Legrasse
text: You get +1 skill value while fighting [[Deep One]] and [[Star Spawn]] enemies. [reaction] During a skill test while fighting or evading Cthulhu, exhaust John Raymond Legrasse: You get +X skill value for this test, where X is Cthulhu's Rage.

name: Horror in Clay
text: Each [[Star Spawn]] enemy loses patrol and its printed Prey instructions and gains hunter and " Prey - You." [tdc_rune_u] · [tdc_rune_x] · [tdc_rune_o] · [tdc_rune_o] · [tdc_rune_d] · [tdc_rune_f] · [tdc_rune_z] [fast] Exhaust Horror in Clay: Either treat this asset's printed text box as if it were blank until the end of the round (except for Traits ) , or move a [[Star Spawn]] enemy once in any direction.

name: The Doom of Arkham Pt II
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is Cthulhu's Rage. [cultist]: -3. If you fail and your location is flooded, take 1 damage. [tablet]: -3. If you fail, place 1 of your clues on your location. [elder_thing]: -1. Reveal another token. If you fail, after this test resolves, draw the top card of the Cthulhu deck. (Max one draw per round.)

name: The Doom of Arkham
text: Forced - When the enemy phase ends: Increase the flood level of Cthulhu's location and draw the top card of the Cthulhu deck. Forced - When the round ends: Each investigator at a fully flooded location takes 1 damage/horror.

name: Fight Back!
text: [fast] During an attack at your location, spend 1 clue: That attack deals +1 damage. (Max once per attack.) Objective - When the round ends, if there are 3 [[Cthulhu]] enemies in the victory display, advance.

name: Banish Him!
text: [fast] During an attack at your location, spend 1 clue: That attack deals +1 damage. (Max once per attack.) Objective - When the round ends, if there are 3 [[Cthulhu]] enemies in the victory display, advance.

name: The Final Seal
text: [action] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, and place an [[Artifact]] asset you control in the victory display: Place 1 resource ( from the token pool ) on your location, as a sigil. Forced - When the enemy phase ends: Draw the top card of the Cthulhu deck. Objective - Banish the awakened dreamer! If each [[Cthulhu]] enemy is in the victory display and there are 5 locations with sigils on them, immediately advance.

name: Northside
text: Northside cannot be fully flooded. [action]: Test [willpower] (3). If you succeed, reveal the top 3 cards of the Cthulhu deck. You may discard 1 of them and place the rest back on top in any order. (Group limit once per round.)

name: Downtown
text: [reaction] When a [[Star Spawn]] enemy enters Downtown, spend 3 resources: Automatically evade that enemy.

name: Easttown
text: Easttown cannot be fully flooded. [action] Discard an [[Ally]] asset you control: Decrease this location's flood level and draw 3 cards. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Miskatonic University
text: Miskatonic University cannot be fully flooded. [action] Choose and discard up to 3 cards with [intellect] icons from your hand: For each card discarded in this way, heal 1 horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset at Miskatonic University. (Limit once per game.)

name: Rivertown
text: [action]: Test [agility] (3) or [intellect] (3) to attempt to open the emergency drain. If you succeed, decrease the flood level of this or an adjacent location. (Group limit once per game.)

name: St. Mary's Hospital
text: St. Mary's Hospital cannot be fully flooded. [reaction] After Cthulhu enters St. Mary's Hospital: Place up to 3 of your clues on this location. For each clue placed in this way, deal 1 damage to an enemy at this location. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Southside
text: [action] Choose an [[Item]] asset in your discard pile and add it to your hand. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Western Rooftops
text: Western Rooftops cannot be flooded and sigils cannot be placed on it. Northside, Miskatonic University, and St. Mary's Hospital are connected to Western Rooftops, and vice versa. While you are at Western Rooftops, you may fight and evade enemies at connecting locations as if you were at their location.

name: Eastern Rooftops
text: Eastern Rooftops cannot be flooded and sigils cannot be placed on it. Easttown, Rivertown, and Southside are connected to Eastern Rooftops, and vice versa. While you are at Eastern Rooftops, you may fight and evade enemies at connecting locations as if you were at their location.

name: Cthulhu
text: Each [[Cthulhu]] enemy on the Cthulhu Board shares this enemy's [[Traits]], text box, and location. Massive. Patrol (nearest location that can be flooded). Cannot make attacks of opportunity.

name: Cthulhu
text: Alert. Prey - Highest [agility]. X is Cthulhu's Rage. Cannot be damaged, defeated, or exhausted. [reaction] After you successfully fight or evade this enemy: Flip it to its [[Enraged]] side.

name: Cthulhu
text: Alert. Prey - Highest [agility]. X is Cthulhu's Rage. Cannot be exhausted. Forced - After you flip this enemy to this side: Draw the top card of the Cthulhu deck. [reaction] After you evade this enemy: Deal 1 damage to it.

name: Cthulhu
text: Alert. Retaliate. Prey - Highest [willpower]. X is Cthulhu's Rage. Cannot be damaged, defeated, or exhausted. [reaction] After you successfully fight or evade this enemy: Flip it to its [[Enraged]] side.

name: Cthulhu
text: Alert. Retaliate. Prey - Highest [willpower]. X is Cthulhu's Rage. Cannot be exhausted. Forced - After you flip this enemy to this side: Discard 1 card at random from your hand. [reaction] After you evade this enemy: Deal 1 damage to it.

name: Cthulhu
text: Retaliate. Prey - Highest [combat]. X is Cthulhu's Rage. Cannot be damaged, defeated, or exhausted. [reaction] After you successfully fight or evade this enemy: Flip it to its [[Enraged]] side.

name: Cthulhu
text: Retaliate. Prey - Highest [combat]. X is Cthulhu's Rage. Cannot be exhausted. Forced - After you flip this enemy to this side: Place 1 doom on it. [reaction] After you evade this enemy: Deal 1 damage to it.

name: Ruthless Charge
text: If Cthulhu (Hoary Wings) is in play: Each investigator at Cthulhu's location discards one card from hand at random. If Cthulhu (Fierce Visage) is in play: Cthulhu (Fierce Visage) attacks the investigator with the highest [willpower] at Chulhu's location. If no attack was made, the investigator with the highest [willpower] draws the top card of the encounter deck. That card's effects cannot be canceled and it loses surge. If Cthulhu (Wicked Claw) is in play: The investigator with the highest [combat] at Cthulhu's location must test [combat] (X), where X is Cthulhu's Rage. If they fail, Cthulhu (Wicked Claw) attacks them.

name: Hurricane Force
text: If Cthulhu (Hoary Wings) is in play: Resolve Cthulhu's patrol keyword an additional time. If Cthulhu (Fierce Visage) is in play: The nearest investigator to Cthulhu must test [willpower] (X), where X is Cthulhu's Rage. If that investigator fails, Cthulhu (Fierce Visage) attacks them. If Cthulhu (Wicked Claw) is in play: Choose an investigator at Cthulhu's location to test [agility] (X), where X is Cthulhu's Rage. If that investigator fails, they must either increase the flood level of Cthulhu's location, or take 1 damage or 1 horror.

name: Dire Gale
text: If Cthulhu (Hoary Wings) is in play: Each investigator at Cthulhu's location discards 1 card at random from hand. Resolve Cthulhu's patrol keyword an additional time. If Cthulhu (Fierce Visage) is in play: The investigator with the highest [willpower] tests [willpower] (X), where X is Cthulhu's Rage. If they fail, they must either take 1 horror, or choose and discard a non-story asset they control. If Cthulhu (Wicked Claw) is in play: If Cthulhu did not move via his patrol keyword this round, Cthulhu (Wicked Claw) attacks each investigator at its location.

name: Dreadsight
text: If Cthulhu (Hoary Wings) is in play: The investigator with the highest [agility] tests [agility] (X), where X is Cthulhu's Rage. If they fail, they take 1 damage or 1 horror. If Cthulhu (Fierce Visage) is in play: Each investigator at Cthulhu's location loses 2 resources. If Cthulhu (Wicked Claw) is in play: The investigators must decide, as a group: - Each investigator loses 1 action during their next turn. - Cthulhu (Wicked Claw) attacks each investigator at its location. - Each investigator takes 1 direct horror.

name: Demolition
text: Place 1 damage token on the [[Rooftop]] location nearest to Cthulhu, as a ruin token. If there are 2 or more ruin tokens on that location,each investigator is killed and each enemy at that location is discarded. Then, remove that location and this card from the game. Otherwise, shuffle this card into the Cthulhu deck along with the Cthulhu discard pile.

name: Fifth Eye
text: Put this card into play next to the agenda deck. Forced - When the investigation phase ends: Place 1 doom on an enemy on the Cthulhu Board with no doom on it and discard this card.

name: Seismic Stomp
text: If there are no investigators at Cthulhu's location, discard this card and draw the top card of the Cthulhu deck. Otherwise, each investigator at Cthulhu's location tests [agility] or [willpower] (X), where X is Cthulhu's Rage. If they fail, they must either take 1 damage/horror, or discard 1 card from their hand at random.

name: Eldritch Call
text: If there are no investigators at Cthulhu's location, discard this card and draw the top card of the Cthulhu deck. Otherwise, each investigator at Cthulhu's location tests [willpower] (X), where X is Cthulhu's Rage. If 1 or more investigators fail, discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until an enemy is discarded and spawn it at Cthulhu's location.

name: Psychic Rebuke
text: If there are no [[Cthulhu]] enemies in the victory display, discard this card and draw the top card of the Cthulhu deck. Otherwise, choose an investigator to test [willpower] (X), where X is Cthulhu's Rage. If they fail, choose a [[Cthulhu]] enemy in the victory display and return it to the Cthulhu board, [[Enraged]] side faceup.

name: Rising Tides
text: Decrease the flood level of Cthulhu's location and choose another location (with an investigator, if able) that can have its flood level increased. Increase the flood level of the chosen location. Each investigator at a fully flooded location tests [agility] (X), where X is Cthulhu's Rage. If they fail, they must either take 1 damage or discard a non-story asset they control.

name: Hope Fades
text: Put this card into play next to the agenda deck. Search the chaos bag and all in- and out-of-play areas for the [elder_sign] token and seal it on this card. (If you cannot, search the chaos bag for the numbered token with the highest positive value and seal it on this card instead.) Forced - When the act advances: Discard this card (release the token sealed here) .

name: Lay Waste
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (X), where X is Cthulhu's Rage. If you fail, take 2 damage.

name: Eyes of Y'ch'lecht
text: Peril. Revelation - Test [willpower] (X), where X is Cthulhu's Rage. If you fail, take 1 direct horror and discard 1 card at random from your hand.

name: Gross Plasticity
text: Peril. Revelation - You must decide (choose one): - Place 1 doom on the current agenda. This effect can cause the agenda to advance. - Increase the flood level of your location. - Each investigator takes 1 damage or 1 horror.

name: Arkham Under Assault
text: Revelation - Each investigator tests [willpower] (X), where X is Cthulhu's Rage. If 1 or more investigators fail, draw the top card of the Cthulhu deck.

name: Stowaway Drone
text: Aloof. Patrol (nearest other enemy with no doom on it ). Forced - When the enemy phase ends: Place 1 doom on another non-[[Elite]] enemy at this location. Then, discard Stowaway Drone.

name: Infected!
text: Revelation - Put Infected! into play in your threat area. Limit 1 per investigator. Forced - After you end your turn at a location with another investigator or a [[Stowaway]] enemy: Place 1 doom on Infected! [action]: Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, take 1 damage. If you succeed, discard Infected!

name: Pilgrim Acolyte
text: Forced - After Pilgrim Acolyte attacks: Place 1 doom on it.

name: Pilgrim Leader
text: Aloof. Spawn - Any location (empty, if able). While Pilgrim Leader is ready, each other [[Cultist]] enemy gets +2 fight and gains hunter and relentless.

name: Monstrous Star Spawn
text: Hunter. Massive. Relentless. Prey - Highest [combat]. Forced - When you reveal an [elder_thing] token while fighting or evading this enemy: Heal 1 damage from it.

name: Infected Star Spawn
text: Hunter. Relentless. Prey - Highest [agility]. Forced - The first time this enemy would be defeated: Heal all damage from it and ready it. Forced - When you reveal an [elder_thing] token while fighting or evading Infected Star Spawn: Take 1 horror.

name: Coral Star Spawn
text: Hunter. Relentless. Prey - Highest [willpower]. While Coral Star Spawn has damage on it, it gains alert and retaliate. Forced - When you reveal an [elder_thing] token while fighting or evading this enemy: Take 1 damage.

name: Star Spawn Observer
text: Aloof. Hunter. Prey - Highest [intellect]. Forced - When you reveal an [elder_thing] token while investigating Star Spawn Observer's location: It engages you and makes an immediate attack.

name: Eye of the Deep

text: [action] Choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location: Parley. Test [willpower] (X), where X is that enemy's printed health value. If you succeed, that enemy disengages from each investigator and gains aloof until the end of the round.

text: Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You may use [agility] instead of [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. [reaction] After you fail a skill test while parleying with an enemy: Put British Bull Dog into play from your hand.

name: Fake Credentials
text: [action] Choose an enemy at your location and exhaust Fake Credentials: Parley. Test [intellect] (1). This test gets +1 difficulty for each suspicion on Fake Credentials. If you succeed, discover 1 clue at your location and place 1 resource on Fake Credentials, as suspicion. If you fail, you must either discard Fake Credentials, or the chosen enemy attacks you.

name: Fox Mask
text: Limit 1 [[Mask]] per investigator. Uses (2 offerings). Replenish 1 of these offerings after you move out of a location with an enemy. [fast] Spend 1 offering: You get +2 [intellect] or +2 [agility] for this skill test. (Limit once per test.)

name: Scrimshaw Charm
text: [action] Add 1-3 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag and exhaust Scrimshaw Charm: Gain 1 resource. For each token added, gain 1 additional resource.

name: Bank Job
text: As an additional cost to play Bank Job, spend an action. Investigators at your location gain a total of 8 resources, distributed as you wish.

name: False Surrender
text: Parley. Choose an enemy at your location and play a [[Weapon]] asset from your hand, reducing its cost by 1. You may then take a fight action with that weapon against the chosen enemy, using [agility] instead of the skill indicated.

name: Grift
text: Parley. Choose an enemy at your location and test [agility] (0). For each point you succeed by, gain 1 resource (to a maximum of 6). If you fail, that enemy attacks you.

name: "I'll Pay You Back!"
text: Fast. Play only during your turn. Choose another investigator at your location. Move all resources from that investigator's resource pool to your resource pool. At the end of the round, move all resources from your resource pool to that investigator's resource pool.

name: Stir the Pot
text: Parley. Choose an enemy at your location and test [intellect] (X), where X is the chosen enemy's combined damage and horror values. If you succeed, deal 2 damage to each enemy at your location. If you succeed by 2 or more, after this effect resolves you may disengage from each enemy and move to a connecting location.

name: Vamp
text: Parley. Choose an enemy at your location and test any skill (3). If you succeed and you tested... - ...[willpower], remove 1 doom from that enemy. - ...[intellect], discover 1 clue at your location. - ...[agility], automatically evade that enemy. If it is non-[[Elite]], move it to a connecting location. - ...[combat], deal 2 damage to that enemy.

name: Diabolical Luck
text: When you reveal a [curse] token during a skill test you are performing, you may commit Diabolical Luck to that skill test from your hand. If you do, Diabolical Luck gains [wild][wild][wild].

name: Lightfooted
text: If this skill test is successful during an evasion attempt, you may automatically evade another enemy at your location.

name: British Bull Dog
text: Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You may use [agility] instead of [combat] for this attack and you get +2 skill value. This attack deals +1 damage. Ignore the aloof keyword for this attack. [reaction] After you fail a skill test while parleying with an enemy: Put British Bull Dog into play from your hand.

name: Snitch
text: Fast. Play after you succeed at a skill test while parleying. Discover 2 total clues from among your location and connecting locations.

name: Bewitching
text: Permanent. Exceptional. [reaction] Before you draw your opening hand: Search your deck for up to 3 different [[Trick]] cards, and attach them facedown to Bewitching. Shuffle your deck. [reaction] When you engage an enemy, exhaust Bewitching: Either draw 1 attached card, or search the top 9 cards of your deck for a copy of an attached card, draw it, and shuffle your deck.

name: Dirty Deeds
text: As an additional cost to play Dirty Deeds, spend an action. Search your deck for an [[Illicit]] asset and play it, paying its cost. Then, you may resolve an [action] or [fast] ability on that asset, ignoring all costs (including its [action] cost, if any) . Playing this card does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Vamp
text: Parley. Choose an enemy at your location and any number of skills. One at a time, in any order, test each chosen skill (2). For each test you succeeded, if it was... - ...[willpower], remove 1 doom from that enemy. - ...[intellect], discover 1 clue at that enemy's location. - ...[agility], automatically evade that enemy. Move it to a connecting location if it is non-[[Elite]]. - ...[combat], deal 2 damage to that enemy.

name: Fake Credentials
text: [action] Choose an enemy at your location: Parley. Test [intellect](0). This test gets +1 difficulty for each suspicion on Fake Credentials. If you succeed, discover 1 clue at your location or a connecting location. If you did not succeed by 2 or more, place 1 resource on Fake Credentials, as suspicion. If you fail, return Fake Credentials to your hand.

name: Stir the Pot
text: Parley. Choose an enemy at your location and test [intellect] (X), where X is the chosen enemy's combined damage/horror values. If you succeed, deal X damage to each enemy at your location. After this effect resolves, you may disengage from each enemy and move to a connecting location.

name: Cat Mask
text: Limit 1 [[Mask]] per investigator. Uses (2 offerings). Replenish 2 of these offerings after doom is placed on a card with no doom. [fast] Spend 1 offering: You get +2 [willpower] or +2 [combat] for this skill test. (Limit once per test.)

name: Rod of Carnamagos
text: Limit 1 per deck. [fast] Choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at any location and exhaust Rod of Carnamagos: Reveal 5 random chaos tokens from the chaos bag. If a [curse] token is revealed, search your bonded cards for a random [[Rot]] event and attach it to that enemy.

name: Abyssal Rot
text: Bonded (Rod of Carnamagos). Attached enemy cannot attack. Forced - When attached enemy leaves play: Set Abyssal Rot aside, out of play.

name: Aember Rot
text: Bonded (Rod of Carnamagos). Forced - When attached enemy is defeated: Gain resources equal to its printed health (to a maximum of 5). Forced - When attached enemy leaves play: Set Aember Rot aside, out of play.

name: Putrescent Rot
text: Bonded (Rod of Carnamagos). Attached enemy gets -1 fight and -1 evade. Forced - When attached enemy leaves play: Set Putrescent Rot aside, out of play.

name: Scarlet Rot
text: Bonded (Rod of Carnamagos). Forced - At the end of the round: Attached enemy takes 1 damage. Forced - When attached enemy leaves play: Set Scarlet Rot aside, out of play.

name: Virescent Rot
text: Bonded (Rod of Carnamagos). Attached enemy cannot move. Forced - When attached enemy leaves play: Set Virescent Rot aside, out of play.

name: Speak to the Dead
text: Uses (6 offerings). [action] Spend any number of offerings: Parley. Choose a [[Spell]] or [[Ritual]] event in your discard pile and reveal tokens from the chaos bag equal to the number of offerings spent. If at least 1 [skull] or [curse] token was revealed, return the chosen event to your hand.

name: Wicked Athame
text: [action] Add 1-3 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack for each [curse] token added as part of this action's cost. If this attack defeats an enemy, replenish 1 charge or offering on an asset you control.

name: Antediluvian Hymn
text: As an additional cost to play Antediluvian Hymn, spend an action. Reveal the top 5 cards of the encounter deck. For each card revealed, you may add 1 [curse] token to the chaos bag to place that card on the bottom of the encounter deck. Return the rest to the top of the encounter deck in any order.

name: Drain Essence
text: Parley. Choose an enemy at your location and test [willpower] (X), where X is the chosen enemy's fight value. If you succeed, move 1 damage from your investigator to the chosen enemy (up to 2 damage instead if the chosen enemy is non-[[Elite]]).

name: Accursed
text: When you commit Accursed to a skill test, add up to 3 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag. During this skill test, treat the modifier of each [curse] token revealed as 0.

name: Mesmeric Influence
text: While this card is committed to a skill test, the performing investigator may ignore all keyword or location effects that would trigger during this test.

name: Olive McBride
text: [reaction] When you would reveal a chaos token, exhaust Olive McBride: Reveal 4 chaos tokens instead of 1. Choose 2 of those tokens to resolve, and ignore the rest.

name: Rod of Carnamagos
text: [fast] Choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at any location and exhaust Rod of Carnamagos: Reveal 5 random chaos tokens from the chaos bag. For each [curse] token revealed, you may search your bonded cards for a [[Rot]] event and attach it to that enemy.

name: Call the Beyond
text: As an additional cost to play Call the Beyond, add 3 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag. Choose an asset you control with "uses (charges)" or "uses (secrets)". Replenish all of that asset's charges or secrets. Then, you may resolve an [action] or [fast] ability on that asset without paying its [action] cost, if any.

name: Ethereal Form
text: Evade. Add your [willpower] value to your skill value for this evasion attempt. If you succeed, disengage from each other enemy engaged with you, and for the remainder of the round, you are ethereal (enemies cannot engage or be engaged with you, and you cannot attack or deal damage to enemies). If a symbol was revealed during this evasion attempt, return Ethereal Form to your hand at the end of your turn.

name: Read the Signs
text: Investigate. Add your [willpower] value to your skill value for this investigation. You may ignore any effect or keyword on your location which would trigger during this investigation. If you succeed, discover 1 additional clue at this location. If a symbol was revealed during this investigation, return Read the Signs to your hand at the end of your turn.

name: Spectral Razor
text: Fight. Add your [willpower] value to your skill value for this attack. Immediately before this attack, you may engage the attacked enemy. This attack deals +1 damage (+2 damage instead if the enemy is non-[[Elite]]). If a symbol was revealed during this attack, return Spectral Razor to your hand at the end of your turn.

name: Ethereal Weaving
text: As an additional cost to play Ethereal Weaving, spend an action. Reveal up to 3 different [[Spell]] events from your hand. One at a time, play each revealed event, reducing its cost by 1. While resolving each of these events, you get +2 skill value.

name: The Key of Solomon
text: [fast] If there are more [bless] than [curse] tokens in the chaos bag, remove 1 [bless] token from the chaos bag and exhaust The Key of Solomon: Heal up to 2 damage and/or horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset at your location. [fast] If there are more [curse] than [bless] tokens in the chaos bag, remove 1 [curse] token from the chaos bag and exhaust The Key of Solomon: Gain 2 resources.

name: Seal of the Elders
text: Fast. Play after a skill test at your location ends in which at least 2 [curse] tokens or 2 [bless] tokens were revealed. If 2 [curse] tokens were revealed, search your bonded cards for 1 copy of Servant of Brass and put it into play. If 2 [bless] tokens were revealed, search your bonded cards for Keeper of the Key and put it into play. If 2 [curse] tokens and 2 [bless] tokens were revealed, do both instead. Remove Seal of the Elders from the game.

name: Keeper of the Key
text: Bonded (Seal of the Elders). [reaction] When a [bless] token is revealed during a skill test at your location: Deal 1 horror to Keeper of the Key and discover 1 clue at your location or a connecting location. Forced - When Keeper of the Key would leave play: Set it aside, out of play.

name: Servant of Brass
text: Bonded (Seal of the Elders). [reaction] When a [curse] token is revealed during a skill test at your location: Deal 1 damage to Servant of Brass and 2 damage to an enemy at your location or a connecting location. Forced - When Servant of Brass would leave play: Set it aside, out of play.

name: Matchbox
text: Uses (3 supplies). If Matchbox has no supplies, discard it. [fast] During any investigator's turn, exhaust Matchbox and spend 1 supply: Your location gets -1 shroud until the end of this turn.

name: Pelt Shipment
text: While Pelt Shipment is in your hand, your maximum hand size is reduced by 3. [reaction] When the game ends or you resign, if Pelt Shipment is in your hand: Reduce the experience cost of the next new card you purchase before the next scenario by 1.

name: Pitchfork
text: [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] and deal +2 damage for this attack. If this attack is successful, lose control of Pitchfork and attach it to your location. Attached location gains: "[action]: Take control of Pitchfork. Any investigator at Pitchfork's location may trigger this ability."

name: Sparrow Mask
text: Limit 1 [[Mask]] per investigator. Uses (2 offerings). Replenish 1 of these offerings after you take 1 or more damage and/or horror. [fast] Spend 1 offering: You get +2 [willpower] or +2 [agility] for this skill test. (Limit once per test.)

name: Elaborate Distraction
text: As an additional cost to play Elaborate Distraction, spend an action. Playing Elaborate Distraction does not provoke attacks of opportunity. For each enemy at your location and at each connecting location (choose one) : - Automatically evade that enemy if it is non-[[Elite]]. - Deal 1 damage to that enemy.

name: Pushed to the Limit
text: Choose a [[Weapon]] or [[Tool]] asset in your discard pile. Resolve an [action] ability on that asset, ignoring all costs (including its [action] cost) . After this effect resolves, shuffle the chosen asset into your deck. Playing this card does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Stall for Time
text: Parley. Choose an enemy at your location. Test [willpower] (X), where X is the chosen enemy's fight or evade value, whichever is lower. If you succeed, exhaust the chosen enemy (but do not disengage from it) . If it is non-[[Elite]], it does not ready during the next upkeep phase. If you fail, return Stall for Time to your hand.

name: Wrong Place, Right Time
text: As an additional cost to play Wrong Place, Right Time, spend an action. Move up to 5 damage and/or horror from your investigator to assets controlled by investigators at your location. For each asset defeated by this effect, draw 1 card. Remove Wrong Place, Right Time from the game.

name: Long Shot
text: You may commit Long Shot to a fight or evasion test against an enemy at your location or a connecting location. If this test is successful, deal 1 damage to that enemy.

name: Hatchet
text: [action]: Fight. Add your [agility] to your skill value for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. If this attack defeats an enemy, discard Hatchet. Otherwise, lose control of Hatchet and attach it to the attacked enemy. Attached enemy gains: "[reaction] When attached enemy is defeated: Take control of Hatchet. Any investigator at Hatchet's location may trigger this ability."

name: Persistence
text: You may commit Persistence to a skill test from your discard pile. If you do, shuffle it into your deck after this test ends.

name: "Devil"
text: Forced - When your turn begins: Move 1 damage from your investigator to "Devil". Forced - When "Devil" is defeated: Deal 2 damage to each enemy and investigator at your location.

name: Fire Axe
