name: Hunting Jacket
text: [fast] Exhaust Hunting Jacket: Choose 1 non-weakness card in your hand and attach it facedown to Hunting Jacket (max 3 cards attached). Then, gain 1 resource for each attached card. [reaction] When Hunting Jacket is defeated: Draw each attached card.

name: Mariner's Compass
text: [action] Exhaust Mariner's Compass: Investigate. If you fail, ready Mariner's Compass. If you succeed and have no resources in your resource pool, discover 1 additional clue at your location. [fast] During an investigation using Mariner's Compass, spend 1 resource: You get +1 [intellect] for this skill test. (Limit three times per investigation.)

name: Survival Technique
text: [fast] Choose a card you own that is attached to your location and exhaust Survival Technique: Add that card to your hand. [fast] During a skill test on a location or on a treachery attached to your location, exhaust Survival Technique: You get +2 skill value for this test.

name: Keep Faith
text: Fast. Play during any [fast] window. Add 4 [bless] tokens to the chaos bag.

name: Providential
text: If this skill test is successful, add 1 [bless] token to the chaos bag for each damage or horror on you (whichever is less).

name: Token of Faith
text: [reaction] After a skill test ends in which 1 or more [curse] or [auto_fail] tokens were revealed, exhaust Token of Faith: Add that many [bless] tokens to the chaos bag. If this skill test failed, after resolving all effects from the failed test, the performing investigator may attempt that test again. (Max once per test.)

name: Dark Horse
text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. During the upkeep phase, you may choose to not gain resources. While you have no resources in your resource pool, you get +1 [willpower], +1 [intellect], +1 [combat], and +1 [agility].

name: Eldritch Tongue
text: Uses (4 charges). You may play events with "parley" from your discard pile as if they were in your hand. As an additional cost to play an event this way, spend 1 charge from Eldritch Tongue. After that event resolves, remove it from the game.

name: Bide Your Time
text: As an additional cost to play Bide Your Time, spend an action. During your next turn, you may take two additional actions.

name: Well-Dressed
text: While Well-Dressed is committed to a skill test during a parley action, it gains [wild] [wild] [wild].

name: Dawn Star
text: Fast. Play after revealing chaos tokens during a skill test at your location. Ignore the modifiers of each [curse] token revealed during this test. For each [curse] token ignored, deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location.

name: Occult Reliquary
text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. You have 1 additional hand, accessory, or arcane slot, which can only be used to hold a [[Blessed]] or [[Cursed]] asset.

name: Broken Diadem
text: Limit 1 per deck. Limit 1 [[Mask]] per investigator. [reaction] After a skill test at your location ends in which both a [bless] and [curse] token were revealed: Place 1 resource on this card, as an offering. Then, if there are 3 offerings on this card, search your bonded cards for Twilight Diadem and swap it with this card, moving all offerings from this card to Twilight Diadem.

name: Twilight Diadem
text: Bonded (Broken Diadem). Limit 1 [[Mask]] per investigator. [reaction] When you reveal either a [bless] or [curse] token during a skill test, spend 1 offering and exhaust this card: Treat the revealed token as an [elder_sign] token instead, returning it to the chaos bag. Then, if this card has no offerings, search your bonded cards for Broken Diadem and swap it with this card.

name: Maimed Hand
text: Revelation - You must either put Maimed Hand into play in your threat area, or take 1 damage and shuffle it into your deck. It cannot leave play except by the [action] [action] ability below. You get -1 health. [action] [action]: Discard Maimed Hand.

name: Back Injury
text: Revelation - You must either put Back Injury into play in your threat area, or take 1 damage and shuffle it into your deck. It cannot leave play except by the [action] [action] ability below. You get -1 health. [action] [action]: Discard Back Injury.

name: The Silver Moth
text: Revelation - You must either put The Silver Moth into play in your threat area, or take 1 horror and shuffle it into your deck. It cannot leave play except by the [action] [action] ability below. You get -1 sanity. [action] [action]: Discard The Silver Moth.

name: Vow of Drzytelech
text: Revelation - You must either put Vow of Drzytelech into play in your threat area, or take 1 horror and shuffle it into your deck. It cannot leave play except by the [action] [action] ability below. You get -1 sanity. [action] [action]: Discard Vow of Drzytelech.

name: Written in Rock
text: Easy / Standard - Act 1 [skull]: -X. X is your location's column number. [cultist]: -1. Place 1 resource on this card, as a scrap. [tablet]: -2. If you fail, remove 1 scrap from this card. [elder_thing]: -3. If you fail, take 1 damage.

name: Written in Rock
text: Hard / Expert - Act 1 [skull]: -X. X is twice your location's column number. [cultist]: -3. If you succeed, place 1 resource on this card, as a scrap. [tablet]: -4. Remove 1 scrap from this card. [elder_thing]: -5. Take 1 damage.

name: Underground Survey
text: Forced - When this agenda advances: Move all doom on it to the next agenda. [action] Draw the top card of the encounter deck: Move 1 resource from your location to the scenario reference card, as a scrap. If the enconter card just drawn was a [[Power]] treachery, gain 5 resources.

name: Dangerous Ride
text: Locations with a story asset on them cannot be slid or swapped. Each enemy gains the hunter keyword and resolves its hunter keyword an additional time during the enemy phase. When an enemy moves, each adjacent location is considered to be connected to its location.

name: Descent into the Mines
text: Objective - At the end of the round, if each surviving investigator is at Control Station, advance. (Hint: Get to the Control Station before the agenda advances!)

name: The Underground Maze
text: [fast] During your turn, spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Either slide a location into an empty adjacent space, or swap 2 adjacent locations. [action] Spend 1 [per_investigator] resources: Slide a revealed location into an empty adjacent space. (Group limit once per round.) [action] If the Prismatic Shard story asset is at your location: Take control of it. Objective - Get to the Rail Exit! When the Mine Card enters Rail Exit, immediately advance.

name: Mine Cart
text: Forced - At the end of the enemy phase: Move Mine Cart once. If it moves off the rail line, each investigator is defeated and suffers 1 physical trauma. [reaction] When Mine Cart moves, spend 1 switch: Either cancel the move, or move an additional time. (Group limit twice per phase.)

name: Control Station
text: [fast] During your turn: Swap 2 adjacent [[Rail]] locations. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Rail Exit
text: Rail Exit cannot be slid or swapped.

name: Left Turn
text: [action] [action]: Swap 2 adjacent [[Rail]] locations. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Left Turn
text: [action] Spend 2 resources: Slide a location into an empty space adjacent to it. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Right Turn
text: [action] [action]: Swap 2 adjacent [[Rail]] locations. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Right Turn
text: [action] Spend 2 resources: Slide a location into an empty space adjacent to it. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Alkaline Rail
text: Forced - At the end of the round: Deal 1 horror to each investigator and [[Resident]] asset at Alkaline Rail.

name: Warped Rail
text: Forced - After the Mine Cart enters Warped Rail: Move the Mine Cart once.

name: Sunken Rail
text: Forced - After Sunken Rail is revealed: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until an enemy is discarded. The lead investigator draws that enemy.

name: Forked Rail
text: Forced - At the end of the round, if the Mine Cart is at Forked Rail: Discard 1 switch from the scenario reference card.

name: Rail Bridge
text: X is Rail Bridge's column number. [action] Spend 1 [per_investigator] resources: Place 1 resource on the scenario reference card, as a switch. (Group limit once per round.)

name: Subterranean Beast
text: Hunter. Massive. Subterranean Beast gets +3 [per_investigator] health. If Subterranean Beast is ready and at the Mine Cart's location, the Mine Cart cannot move. [action] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues: Exhaust Subterranean Beast. It cannot ready this round.

name: Burrowing Hybrid
text: Hunter. Forced - After Burrowning Hybrid enters play, if the Mine Cart is facing a connecting location: Slide that location into an adjacent empty space. If you cannot, swap it with a location adjacent to it.

name: Frenzied Miner
text: Hunter. X is Frenzied Miner's column number. Forced - After Frenzied Miner attacks you: Deal 1 damage to each other investigator and [[Resident]] asset at this location.

name: Cave-In
text: Revelation - Attach Cave-In to the location the Mine Cart is facing. If you cannot, Cave-In gains surge. Forced - When the Mine Cart would move into attached location: Cancel the move and deal 2 damage to each investigator and [[Resident]] asset in the Mine Cart. [action]: Test [combat] or [agility] (2). If you succeed, discard Cave-In. An investigator at an adjacent location may trigger this ability.

name: Wild Ride
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (5). If you fail, put Wild Ride into play in your threat area. Forced - When the Mine Cart moves: Either move it 2 additional times, or deal 1 direct damage and 1 direct horror to each investigator, [[Ally]] asset, and [[Resident]] card they control. Discard Wild Ride.

name: Prismatic Shard
text: Uses (4 brilliance). [reaction] When a scenario card or weakness card effect would discard any number of cards from your hand, exhaust Prismatic Shard and spend 1 brilliance: Ignore that effect and draw that many cards, instead.

name: Hemlock House
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is your current floor number (to a minimum of 1). [cultist]: -1. If your location is an enemy, exhaust it. [tablet]: -3. If you fail, heal 1 damage from the nearest enemy-location. [elder_thing]: -4. If you fail, and it is agenda 2a or 3a, after this test resolves, remove this token from the chaos bag and add it to the predation bag.

name: The Predatory House
text: Create a separate bag consisting of the following tokens: [cultist], [tablet], and [elder_thing]. (If you do not have a second bag, you can use a cup, bowl, or other opaque container.) This is the predation bag, and these are predation tokens. They are not chaos tokens. Then, add the following tokens to the predation bag based on the current day: - Day 1: Add [cultist], [cultist] to the predation bag. - Day 2: Add [cultist] to the predation bag. - Day 3: No change is made. Some abilities will instruct investigators to make a predation test. A predation test may cause the house to come alive and prey on the investigators. To resolve a predation test, reveal a random token from the predation bag and resolve the effects for that token as indicated on the other side of this card. Flip this card over and place it next to the scenario reference card.

name: Predation Test
text: Use these results only when revealing tokens from the predation bag. [cultist]: Set this token aside. [tablet]: Each enemy-location attacks each investigator at that location. If no attack was made by this effect, the lead investigator draws the top card of the encounter deck. Return this token and each set-aside token to the predation bag. [elder_thing]: Set this token aside. Find the unsealed, [[Dormant]] location nearest to the lead investigator. Flip that location to its enemy-location side.

name: The House Stirs (v. I)
text: Forced - When the mythos phase ends: Make a predation test. [fast] Either place 1 [per_investigator] of your clues on your location or remove a seal from it: Ready it and flip it over.

name: The House Stirs (v.II)
text: Forced - When the mythos phase ends: Make a predation test. [fast] Either place 1 [per_investigator] of your clues on your location or remove a seal from it: Ready it and flip it over.

name: Living Walls
text: Forced - When the mythos phase ends: Make a predation test. [fast] Either place 1 [per_investigator] of your clues on your location or remove a seal from it: Ready it and flip it over.

name: Strange Infestation
text: Clues cannot be discovered from locations with no investigators. [action] If your location is unsealed and [[Dormant]], investigators at that location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Place 1 resource on it, as a seal. Objective - At the end of the round, if a total of 7 locations are sealed and/or in the victory display, advance.

name: Against the House
text: Clues cannot be discovered from locations with no investigators. Objective - Bring this house down! If no locations are in play, immediately advance (this occurs before investigators would be defeated by not being at a location) .

name: The Heart of the House
text: Clues cannot be discovered from locations with no investigators. [action] If your location is unsealed and [[Dormant]], investigators at that location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Place 1 resource on it, as a seal. Forced - After an enemy-location attacks you: Move (one location at a time) to Shapeless Cellar. Objective - When the Shapeless Cellar is in the victory display, advance.

name: Bedroom
text: X is 1 more than this location's floor number. [reaction] After you place a seal on this location: Draw 1 card or gain 2 resources.

name: Living Bedroom
text: Massive. Cannot make attacks of opportunity. Living Bedroom gets +2 [per_investigator] health. Forced - When this enemy-location is revealed: Place 1 doom on it.

name: Bedroom
text: X is 1 more than this location's floor number. [reaction] After you place a seal on this location: Draw 1 card or gain 2 resources.

name: Living Bedroom
text: Massive. Cannot make attacks of opportunity. Living Bedroom gets +2 [per_investigator] health. Forced - When this enemy-location is revealed: It attacks each investigator at this location.

name: Bedroom
text: X is 1 more than this location's floor number. [reaction] After you place a seal on this location: Draw 1 card or gain 2 resources.

name: Living Bedroom

text: Token Effects Enemies that ignore a token's effects do not trigger its Forced abilities. Resource Forced - When an enemy would move via a keyword and 1 or more barriers are between its location and the location it is moving to: Remove one of those barriers. Cancel the effects of the move. Horror Forced - When an enemy enters a location with a decoy: Remove the decoy. Deal 1 damage to that enemy, disengage it from each investigator, and exhaust it. That enemy cannot ready for the remainder of the round. Damage Forced - When an enemy enters a location with a trap: Remove the trap. Deal 2 damage to that enemy.

name: The Abyss
text: This card must always cover the top of The Abyss. Cards are always drawn and revealed from the bottom of The Abyss. When a non-weakness encounter card is discarded, it is always placed on top of The Abyss. Forced - When you draw a card from The Abyss, if that card is ... - ...a treachery or an enemy: Draw it. - ...a [[Resident]] card: Flip it to its enemy side. It gains " Revelation - This enemy attacks you (without engaging you) . Discard this enemy." - ...a player card: Add it to its owner's hand. - ...a location: Put it into play, unrevealed, adjacent to the nearest Mirror Nest (that is not already connected to a [[Cave]] location, if able). For the remainder of this scenario, the two locations are connected to one another. - ...any investigator's "true" investigator card: Its owner heals all damage and horror and takes control of it. Then, they flip their Shattered Self investigator card to its Old Memory side and put it into play under their control.

text: Surge. Revelation - Put Captivating Gleam into play in your threat area. Limit 1 per investigator. Forced - If you have no cards in hand: Take 5 horror and discard Captivating Gleam.

name: Poisonblossom
text: Retaliate. (Day [day]) Poisonblossom gets +1 health and +1 damage value for each overgrowth on it. (Night [night]) Poisonblossom gets +1 fight and +1 damage value for each overgrowth on it. Forced - At the end of the round: Place 1 resource on Poisonblossom, as overgrowth.

name: Forest Watcher
text: Aloof. (Night [night]) Elusive. Spawn - Any location (empty, if able). Forced - After Forest Watcher enters play: Place 1 doom on it.

name: Cochleal Stag
text: Elusive. (Night [night]) Hunter. Each investigator at Cochleal Stag's location and each connecting location gets -2 to all skills during the mythos phase.

name: Bloom
text: Revelation - Choose the nearest [[Flora]] enemy and heal all damage from it (if that enemy is [[Elite]], heal 2 [per_investigator] damage from it instead). If no damage was healed by this effect, discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a [[Flora]] card is discarded and draw it.

name: Wall of Thorns
text: Revelation - Attach Wall of Thorns to the nearest location without Wall of Thorns attached. (Day [day]) Forced - When you move into attached location: Take 2 damage. Discard Wall of Thorns. (Night [night]) Forced - When you move into or out of attached location: Take 1 damage.

name: Call of the Wild
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (3). If you fail, choose the nearest enemy. That enemy attacks you. If you failed and no enemy was chosen, take 2 damage instead.

name: Black Amanita
text: (Day [day]) Aloof. (Night [night]) Massive. Forced - After you discover a clue at Black Amanita's location or a connecting location, if it is ready: Take 1 direct horror.

name: Corpse Lichen
text: (Day [day]) Corpse Lichen cannot move. (Night [night]) Hunter. Alert. Forced - After Corpse Lichen attacks: Heal 1 damage from it.

name: Psychotropic Spores
text: Revelation - Put Psychotropic Spores into play in your threat area. Limit 1 per investigator. Forced - The first time you draw 1 or more cards from your deck each round: Take 1 direct horror. [action]: Test [intellect] (3). If you succeed, discard Psychotropic Spores. (You may take 1 direct horror for this test to automatically succeed.)

name: Sudden Mutation
text: Revelation - Attach to the nearest non-[[Elite]] enemy. If you cannot, search the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[Mutated]] enemy and draw it. Forced - When attached enemy is defeated: Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until an enemy is discarded and spawn it at this location.

name: Unnatural Growth
text: Revelation - Place 1 doom on the nearest enemy with no doom on it. If no doom was placed by this effect, discard 2 cards at random from your hand.

name: Fire!
text: Revelation - Attach Fire! to the nearest location with no copy of Fire! attached (connected to a location with Fire! attached, if able). [action]: Test [agility] (4). If you succeed, discard Fire! Forced - At the end of the round: Each card with health at this location takes 1 direct damage.

name: Riddles and Rain
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -1 (-3 instead if you have 2 or more clues). [tablet]: -1. If there is a concealed mini-card at your location, reveal another chaos token. [elder_thing]: -3. If you fail, you must either spend 1 clue or place 1 doom on an enemy in the shadows.

name: When It Rains...
text: Forced - When this agenda advances: Move all doom on it to the next agenda.

name: Figures in the Fog
text: Forced - When this agenda advances: Move all doom on it to the next agenda.

name: Clues and Capers
text: Objective - As a group, spend the requisite number of clues to advance before the agenda advances.

name: The Game is Afoot!
text: Objective - Chase down the mysterious figure before the agenda advances. If an investigator engages The Red-Gloved Man, advance.

name: Eyes in the Tower
text: Objective - Only investigators at the Tower of London may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: Caught Red-Handed
text: The Red-Gloved Man gains: "[action]: Parley. Test [willpower] or [intellect] (5) to interrogate The Red-Gloved Man. If you succeed, place 1 resource on him." Objective - Stop The Red-Gloved Man from stealing The Eye of Ravens. If he is defeated, or if there are 1 [per_investigator] resources on him, advance.

name: Rainy London Streets
text: Rainy London Streets gets +X shroud. X is the current act number. Forced - If there are no clues on Rainy London Streets: Add clues to it until it has 1 [per_investigator] clues on it. [action]: Resign. "We should wait for Inspector Flint..."

name: Big Ben
text: [fast]: Choose a concealed mini-card at Big Ben or a connecting location and test [agility] (2). If you succeed, look at the revealed side of that concealed mini-card (without exposing it) . If you fail, take 1 horror. (Limit once per turn.)

name: Westminster Abbey
text: [action]: Parley. Choose a location and test [willpower] (1) to ask around the abbey. For each point you succeed by, look at the revealed side of a concealed mini-card at the chosen location (without exposing it) . (Group limit once per game.)

name: Kensington Gardens
text: [reaction] After you expose a decoy at Kensington Gardens: Heal 1 horror. Forced - After you expose an enemy at Kensington Gardens: Take 1 horror.

name: The Tower Bridge
text: [action]: "Maybe there is another way in..." Test [willpower] or [intellect] (5). If you succeed, put the set-aside Traitors' Gate location into play.

name: Traitors' Gate
text: [action]: Test [combat] or [agility] (5). If you succeed, reveal the Tower of London. If you fail, take 1 damage.

name: Tower of London
text: Forced - After you end your turn at the Tower of London: You must either lose 2 resources, or each enemy in the shadows attacks you.

name: Tower Prison
text: [fast] While an investigator at Tower Prison is performing a skill test, spend 1 clue: That investigator gets +2 skill value for this test. Forced - When a concealed mini-card would enter play anywhere other than Tower Prison: Put it into play at Tower Prison, instead.

name: The Red-Gloved Man
text: Concealed 1 [per_investigator]. Retaliate.

name: The Eye of Ravens
text: Shift - During a skill test at your location, the performing investigator sets their base skill value for this test to 6. Flip this key to its [[Unstable]] side.

name: The Eye of Ravens
text: Shift - Draw the top card of the encounter deck. Then, if an investigator shifted this key, flip it to its [[Stable]] side.

name: Dead Heat
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -1 for every 1 [per_investigator] civilians slain. [cultist]: -4. If you fail, choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location. That enemy readies and attacks you. [tablet]: -1. You may take 1 damage. If you do not, a civilian at your location is slain. [elder_thing]: -3. If you fail, choose and discard 1 card from your hand.

name: Gnashing Teeth
text: Each [[Risen]] enemy and each [[Ghoul]] enemy gains " Spawn - Random location."

name: Empty Streets
text: Each [[Risen]] enemy and each [[Ghoul]] enemy gains hunter and " Spawn - Random location."

name: Find Amaranth
text: Objective - At the end of the round, investigators at a [[Ritual Site]] location may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: Ritual of Life and Death
text: Forced - After a civilian is slain, if 4[per_investigator] or more civilians have been slain: Advance this act. Objective - If Amaranth would be defeated, advance.

name: Queen of Nothing at All
text: Objective - If neither Amaranth nor Razin Farhi are in play, advance.

name: Marrakesh Railway Station
text: [fast]: Move (to a connecting location) . (Group limit once per turn.) [action]: Resign. You flee the city. (Note: If there are no investigators in play, all remaining civilians in play will be slain.) Forced - If Marrakesh Railway Station has no civilians on it: Swap it with its set-aside [[Abandoned]] version.

name: Jemaa el-Fnaa Square
text: [action] If 1 or more civilians are on this location: Reveal the top 6 cards of your deck. You may play an asset from among those cards (paying its cost) . Shuffle the rest into your deck. (Limit once per game.) Forced - If Jemaa el-Fnaa Square has no civilians on it: Swap it with its set-aside [[Abandoned]] version.

name: Saadian's Tombs
text: Saadian's Tombs gets +1 shroud for each civilian on it. Forced - When a non-[[Elite]] enemy enters or spawns at Saadian's Tombs, before it engages any investigators: Exhaust it. Forced - If Saadian's Tombs has no civilians on it: Swap it with its set-aside [[Abandoned]] version.

name: Tanneries
text: [fast] Choose a [[Risen]] enemy from the encounter discard pile and spawn it engaged with you: Place clues on Tanneries (from the token pool) equal to that enemy's health. Forced - If Tanneries has no civilians on it: Swap it with its set-aside [[Abandoned]] version.

name: Bahia Palace Gardens
text: [reaction] After you rescue a civilian on Bahia Palace Gardens: Heal 1 damage or 1 horror. Forced - If Bahia Palace Gardens has no civilians on it: Swap it with its set-aside [[Abandoned]] version.

name: Marrakesh Railway Station
text: As an additional cost for you to move out of Marrakesh Railway Station, you must spend 1 resource. [action]: Resign. You run for your life. (Note: If there are no investigators in play, all remaining civilians in play will be slain.)

name: Jemaa el-Fnaa Square
text: While you are at Jemaa el-Fnaa Square, increase the cost of each asset you play by 2.

name: Saadian's Tombs
text: Forced - When a non-[[Elite]] enemy enters Saadian's Tombs, before it engages any investigators: Heal all damage from it.

name: Tanneries
text: Each [[Risen]] enemy at Tanneries gets +1 fight and +1 evade.

name: Bahia Palace Gardens
text: Forced - When you end your turn at Bahia Palace Gardens: Take 1 damage or 1 horror.

name: Save the Civilians
text: The civilians of Marrakesh are under attack! By getting them out of harm's way, you may be able to avert a massacre. (Note: Civilians still on locations are neither rescued nor slain.) [action] Spend 1 clue: Rescue a civilian from your location (place it on this card) . Forced - When the game ends: flip this card (keep all tokens on it) .

name: Aftermath
text: Compare the number of rescued civilians on Aftermath with the number of slain civilians on the Scenario Reference card. (Note: Civilians still on locations are neither rescued nor slain.) - If the number of rescued civilians is more than the number of slain civilians, each investigator earns 2 bonus experience. If the number of rescued civilians is more than twice the number of slain civilians, each investigator earns 2 additional bonus experience. - If the number of slain civilians is more than the number of rescued civilians, each investigator suffers 1 mental trauma. If the number of is more than twice the number of rescued civilians, each investigator suffers 1 additional mental trauma. - If it is a tie, nothing happens.

name: Amaranth
text: Hunter. Forced - When damage or horror from Amaranth's attack is assigned to an asset: Defeat that asset and Amaranth shifts each of her attached keys.

name: Amaranth
text: Hunter. Retaliate. Forced - When Amaranth attacks: She shifts each of her attached keys. If damage and/or horror from this attack is assigned to an asset, defeat that asset.

name: Razin Farhi
text: Alert. Hunter. Retaliate. Forced - After any key is shifted: If Razin Farhi is exhausted, ready him. Otherwise, he makes an immediate attack against the engaged investigator.

name: Thrall
text: The first copy of Thrall drawn each round gains surge. [fast] During your turn: Attempt to evade Thrall. It gains alert for this evasion attempt. (Limit once per turn).

name: Ancient Raider
text: Hunter. Retaliate. Forced - After Ancient Raider attacks you: 1 civilian at your location is slain.

name: Khalid
text: Hunter. Forced - After Khalid enters play: Move each other non-[[Elite]] enemy and civilian from its location to a connecting location (distributed as evenly as possible).

name: Famine
text: Revelation - Put Famine into play next to the agenda deck. Increase the cost of each card you play by 1. Forced - At the end of the round: Discard Famine from play.

name: Cornered!
text: Revelation - Test [combat] (3). If you fail, either (choose one): - 1 civilian at your location is slain. - Take 1 damage for each point you fail by.

name: The Last Blossom
text: Shift - Heal 1 damage and 1 horror from each investigator at your location. Flip this key to its [[Unstable]] side.

name: The Last Blossom
text: Shift - Heal 1 damage from each enemy in play. Then, if an investigator shifted this key, flip it to its [[Stable]] side.

name: Sanguine Shadows
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the number of targets on this card. [cultist]: -5. If you fail by 2 or more, shuffle each concealed mini-card at your location and at each connecting location facedown, then place them at random in the positions they were in. [tablet]: -1. Cancel the effects and icons of each card committed to this skill test. [elder_thing]: -2. If you fail, you must either place 1 doom on the current agenda, or the nearest [[Coterie]] enemy attacks you (even if it is in the shadows) .

name: Where is She...?
text: Forced - At the start of the game, or after the agenda deck resets: Set the amount of doom on this agenda to 1 [per_investigator]. Forced - After you expose a decoy: La Chica Roja attacks you. (Hint - when this agenda advances, La Chica Roja will collect one of the pieces she seeks!)

name: The Scarlet Shadow
text: Objective - Expose the thief's whereabouts. If an investigator engages La Chica Roja, advance.

name: In the Searchlight
text: La Chica Roja gains: "[action] Parley. Test [intellect] or [agility] (6) to outsmart the thief. You may spend 1 clue to reduce this test's difficulty by 2. If you fail, La Chica Roja attacks you." Objective - If La Chica Roja would be defeated, instead advance. Objective - If an investigator successfully parleys with La Chica Roja, advance.

name: Avenida de Mayo
text: If your difficulty level is... - ...Easy, X is 2. - ...Standard, X is 3. - ...Hard, X is 4. - ...Expert, X is 5. [action]: Resign. Looks like La Chica Roja wins this game.

name: Casa Rosada
text: [action] Spend 1 clue: Test [intellect] (4) to observe the staff. You may spend 1 additional clue to reduce the difficulty of this test by 2. If you succeed, look at the revealed side of a concealed mini-card at this location (without exposing it) . For every 2 points you succeed by, look at an additional mini-card at this location.

name: Catedral Metropolitana
text: [action] Spend 1 clue: Test [agility] (4) to watch the rooftops of the cathedral. You may spend 1 additional clue to reduce the difficulty of this test by 2. If you succeed, look at the revealed side of a concealed mini-card at this location (without exposing it) . For every 2 points you succeed by, look at an additional mini-card at this location.

name: Cementario de la Recoleta
text: [action] Spend X clues and take X horror: Look at the revealed side of X concealed mini-cards at this location (without exposing them) .

name: Palacio Errázuriz
text: [action] Spend 1 clue: Test [combat] (4) to break into the mansion. You may spend 1 additional clue to reduce the difficulty of this test by 2. If you succeed, look at the revealed side of a concealed mini-card at this location (without exposing it) . For every 2 points you succeed by, look at an additional mini-card at this location.

name: The Cabildo
text: [fast]: Look at the revealed side of a concealed mini-card at this location (without exposing it) . Then, draw the top card of the encounter deck. You may spend 2 clues to cancel this card's effects and discard it.

name: Banco de la Provincia
text: [action] Spend X clues and thrice as many resources: Look at the revealed side of X concealed mini-cards at this location (without exposing them) .

name: Teatro Colón
text: [action] Spend 1 clue: Test [willpower] (4) to stake out the rafters of the opera house. You may spend 1 additional clue to reduce the difficulty of this test by 2. If you succeed, look at the revealed side of a concealed mini-card at this location (without exposing it) . For every 2 points you succeed by, look at an additional mini-card at this location.

name: La Chica Roja
text: Concealed 5. Forced - When an investigator engaged with La Chica Roja moves: Disengage her from that investigator.

name: La Chica Roja
text: [reaction] When your turn ends, exhaust La Chica Roja: Place your investigator mini-card in the shadows. While you are in the shadows, you are not at any location. Enemies that would spawn engaged with you instead spawn at your previous location. At the start of your turn, move back to your previous location (or any revealed location if you cannot).

name: Bound Nightgaunt
text: Hunter. While attacking Bound Nightgaunt, double the negative modifier of each revealed chaos token.

name: Cat and Mouse
text: Peril. Surge. Revelation - If there is a concealed mini-card at your location, you may expose it. If an enemy's mini-card would be exposed by this effect, instead flip it back over and shuffle it facedown with the concealed mini-cards at your location.

name: Calling Card
text: Revelation - Attach to a location without a target, and without a copy of Calling Card attached. While Calling Card is in play, clues cannot be spent (at any location) . [reaction] After you successfully investigate attached location by 2 or more: Discard Calling Card. Look at the revealed side of a concealed mini-card at any location (without exposing it) .

name: Outsmarted
text: Revelation - Test [intellect] (4). If you fail, you must decide (choose one): - Place 1 doom on the current agenda. This effect can cause the agenda to advance. - The nearest [[Coterie]] enemy attacks you.

name: Seeing Red
text: Forced - After a decoy is exposed: Place 1 doom on this agenda. Forced - When this agenda would advance by reaching its doom threshold: Each investigator is defeated and suffers 1 mental trauma. Objective - If the Sanguine Watcher is defeated, advance.

name: The Sanguine Watcher
text: Retaliate. Forced - At the end of the enemy phase, if The Sanguine Watcher is ready: Each investigator must either take 2 damage or 2 horror.

name: Apportioned Ka
text: Concealed 4. Forced - After Apportioned Ka is exposed: Deal 5 damage to the Sanguine Watcher. Return Apportioned Ka to the shadows and resolve its concealed keyword, distributing those concealed mini-cards as evenly as possible among each non-[[Central]] location without a target.

name: The Weeping Lady
text: Shift - Discover 1 clue at your location or a connecting location. Flip this key to its [[Unstable]] side.

name: The Weeping Lady
text: Shift - Each investigator must discard an asset they control, if able. Then, if an investigator shifted this key, flip it to its [[Stable]] side.

name: Dealings in the Dark
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the highest number of clues on a [[Cultist]] enemy in play, to a maximum of 3. (If it is act 3, X is 3.) [cultist]: -5. You may place 1 doom on the nearest [[Cultist]] enemy to change this token's modifier to -1. [tablet]: -3. If you fail, place 1 of your clues on your location. [elder_thing]: -2. If you fail, place 1 doom on the nearest [[Cultist]] enemy.

name: Agents of the Dark
text: Each non-weakness [[Cultist]] enemy gains concealed 1. Forced - After you evade a [[Cultist]] enemy, return it to the shadows and resolve its concealed keyword: Take control of 1 of its clues.

name: Search for the Manuscript
text: Objective - Find the talisman before the cult does! If either the cult, or investigators at any location(s), possess the requisite number of clues as a group, advance. (Do not spend any clues when you advance.)

name: Search for the Talisman
text: Objective - Find the talisman before the cult does! If either the cult, or investigators at the location designated as the east gate, possess the requisite number of clues as a group, advance. (Do not spend any clues when you advance.)

name: The Chase
text: Objective - "Get this thing out of here!" If an investigator with The Twisted Antiprism is at Galata Docks, you may proceed to (→R1) (page 25) . Objective - "Don't let them get away with the Key!" If an enemy with The Twisted Antiprism is at Galata Docks, or if the investigator with The Twisted Antiprism is defeated, proceed to (→R6) (page 25) .

name: The Unveiling
text: Forced - After 1 or more doom is placed on a [[Cultist]] enemy: Flip them to their clue side. If an enemy has more than 3 clues on it, move the clues in excess of 3 to Clues Unveiled, below. The number of clues possessed by the cult is equal to the total number of clues on [[Cultist]] enemies in play plus the number of clues on Clues Unveiled, below.

name: The Unsealing
text: Each non-weakness enemy gains: "Hunter. Prey - Investigator with The Twisted Antiprism." If The Twisted Antiprism is attached to that enemy, it instead gains "Patrol (Galata Docks)." Forced - When 1 or more doom would be placed on an enemy: It instead moves and attacks as if it were the enemy phase (without exhausting). Forced - After a non-weakness enemy attacks the investigator with The Twisted Antiprism: Attach The Twisted Antiprism to that enemy, [[Unstable]] side faceup. Then, that enemy shifts it. [reaction] After you evade or defeat the enemy with The Twisted Antiprism: Take control of The Twisted Antiprism, attaching it to your investigator.

name: Galata Docks
text: You can only enter Galata Docks from Galata. As an additional cost for you to do so, you must discard any combination of cards from your hand or assets from your play area with at least 3 matching skill icons.

name: Galata
text: [fast] Spend 3 resources: Parley. Expose a concealed mini-card at any location. (Group limit once per round.)

name: Obelisk of Theodosius
text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating the Obelisk of Theodosius: Move 1 of your clues to the nearest [[Cultist]] enemy.

name: Istanbul University
text: [action]: Test [willpower] or [intellect] (6). If you succeed, take control of 1 clue on Clues Unveiled. (Max one success per game.)

name: Hagia Sophia
text: Hagia Sophia gets +3 shroud for each study token on it. [action]: Place 1 [per_investigator] clues on Hagia Sophia (from the token pool) . Place 1 resource on Hagia Sophia (also from the token pool) , as a study token.

name: Grand Bazaar
text: Increase the difficulty to fight or evade each concealed mini-card at this location by 2.

name: Grand Bazaar
text: While you are at this location, treat the text box of each [[Weapon]] asset you control as if it were blank (except for [[Traits]]).

name: Grand Bazaar
text: [fast]: Parley. Take control of 1 clue from a [[Cultist]] enemy at this location. Then, return that enemy to the shadows and resolve its concealed keyword. (Limit once per round.)

name: Grand Bazaar
text: Forced - After you expose a decoy at this location: Move 1 clue from this location to the nearest [[Cultist]] enemy.

name: Grand Bazaar
text: Forced - When you would move out of this location: Test [agility] (3). If you fail, you must either lose 1 action or cancel the effects of the move.

name: Grand Bazaar
text: [reaction] After you move to this location from a connecting location: Test [agility] (4). If you succeed, move again. Forced - After an enemy moves to this location via hunter or patrol: Resolve that keyword again.

name: Grand Bazaar
text: [action]: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, you may play a [[Charm]] or [[Relic]] asset from your hand, reducing its cost by 1 for each point you succeeded by (to a minimum of 0) .

name: Ece Şahin
text: [fast] Exhaust Ece Şahin: Look at the top card of any investigator's deck. If it is not a weakness, you may place it facedown beneath Ece Sahin (limit 5 cards beneath her). Forced - After any key is shifted: The owner of each card beneath Ece Şahin draws that card.

name: Umbral Harbinger
text: Hunter. Forced - When Umbral Harbinger is dealt damage: Place 1 doom on the [[Cultist]] enemy nearest to it.

name: Sinister Aspirant (A)
text: Alert. Forced - At the end of the enemy phase, if Sinister Aspirant is ready: Place 1 doom on it.

name: Sinister Aspirant (B)
text: Alert. Forced - At the end of the enemy phase, if Sinister Aspirant is ready: Place 1 doom on it.

name: Sinister Aspirant (C)
text: Alert. Forced - At the end of the enemy phase, if Sinister Aspirant is ready: Place 1 doom on it.

name: Shadowed
text: Revelation - If there are no [[Cultist]] enemies in play, take 1 horror and Shadowed gains surge. Otherwise, find the [[Cultist]] enemy nearest to you. Place 1 doom on that enemy and test [willpower] (X), where X is that enemy's fight value. If you fail, take 2 horror.

name: Accosted
text: Revelation - If there are no [[Cultist]] enemies in play, take 1 damage and Accosted gains surge. Otherwise, find the [[Cultist]] enemy nearest to you. Place 1 doom on that enemy and test [agility] (X), where X is that enemy's evade value. If you fail, take 2 damage.

name: Light Out of Void
text: Peril. Revelation - You must either (choose one): - Place 1 doom on the [[Cultist]] enemy in play with the highest evade. - Take 1 damage and 1 horror. If the investigators possess more clues than the cult, or if it is act 3, resolve this revelation ability a second time.

name: The Twisted Antiprism
text: Shift - Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Draw 1 of those cards and shuffle the rest back into your deck. Flip this key to its [[Unstable]] side.

name: The Twisted Antiprism
text: Shift - The nearest investigator must place 1 doom on an asset they control, an encounter card at their location, or the current agenda. Then, if an investigator shifted this key, flip it to its [[Stable]] side.

name: Dancing Mad
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the number of enemies in the shadows (max 3). [cultist]: -4. If you fail, put a decoy into play at your location, flip it over, and shuffle each concealed mini-card at your location facedown. [tablet]: -3. If you fail, set each non-weakness card committed to this test aside, out of play, as a hollow. [elder_thing]: -1. If there is a concealed mini-card at your location, either take 1 damage or treat this token's modifier as -3.

name: Silence Speaks
text: Forced - If there are 5 [per_investigator] or more set-aside hollows: Choose and remove 3 [per_investigator] of them from the game and place 1 doom on this agenda. This effect may cause this agenda to advance.

name: Easy Prey
text: Forced - If there are 4 [per_investigator] or more set-aside hollows: Choose and remove 2 [per_investigator] of them from the game and place 1 doom on this agenda. This effect may cause this agenda to advance.

name: A Betrayal of Eyes
text: Forced - If there are 3 [per_investigator] or more set-aside hollows: Choose and remove 1 [per_investigator] of them from the game and place 1 doom on this agenda. This effect may cause this agenda to advance.

name: False Step (v. I)
text: [action]: Resign. "The deal's off!" You leave Desi and his crew to their fate. Forced - If Desiderio Delgado Álvarez leaves play: Set him aside, out of play. Each investigator takes 1 horror.

name: False Colors (v. I)
text: [reaction] When an investigator would resolve an enemy's concealed X keyword, spend X clues, as a group: Spawn it engaged with that investigator instead. [action]: Resign. You leave Desi and his crew to their fate. Objective - If there are no enemies in the shadows, investigators may spend the requisite clues to advance.

name: False Step (v. II)
text: Forced - At the end of the enemy phase: Deal X total damage to investigators at Café Luna, divided as they wish. X is the number of enemies in the shadows. [reaction] After a [[Coterie]] enemy takes any amount of damage: Discover half that many clues at Café Luna (rounded down).

name: False Colors (v. II)
text: [action] As a group, investigators at your location place clues they control on a [[Coterie]] enemy at your location equal to that enemy's remaining health: Parley. You gain some insight into the situation. Remove all doom from that enemy and automatically evade it. [action]: Resign. "I thought we had a deal!" You get out of the city while you still can. Objective - Discover why your contacts are after you. If there are 4 [per_investigator] total clues among enemies in play, advance.

name: False Light
text: Each copy of Desiderio Delgado Álvarez loses concealed X, loses hunter, gains aloof, and gains the following ability: "[action]: Parley. Check the Campaign Log. If the cell knows Desi's past , you ask a question only he can answer. Look at the other side of this enemy." Objective - If either copy of Desiderio Delgado Álvarez is defeated, advance. (Do not look at its other side.)

name: Café Luna
text: Café Luna gets -1 shroud for each [[Outsider]] enemy in play. Forced - If there are no clues on Café Luna: Add clues to it until it has 1 [per_investigator] clues on it.

name: El Malecón
text: [reaction] After you expose a decoy at El Malecón: Expose another concealed mini-card at El Malecón. (Group limit once per round.)

name: Jardines de la Tropical
text: [reaction] After you successfully investigate Jardines de la Tropical by 3 or more: Choose a set-aside hollow. Its owner draws it. Forced - After you fail by 3 or more while investigating Jardines de la Tropical: Choose a non-weakness card in your hand and set it aside, out of play, as a hollow.

name: Gran Teatro de La Habana
text: [fast] During your turn, spend 2 resources: Reduce Gran Teatro de La Habana's shroud by 2 until the end of your turn. (Limit once per turn.)

name: Miramar Yacht Club
text: [action]: Investigate. Instead of discovering clues, look at the revealed side of a concealed mini-card at Miramar Yacht Club. For every 2 points you succeed by, look at the revealed side of an additional concealed mini-card at Miramar Yacht Club.

name: Plaza Hotel
text: [fast] Take 1 horror: Look at the revealed side of a concealed mini-card at Plaza Hotel or at a connecting location (without exposing it) . (Group limit once per round.)

name: Desiderio Delgado Álvarez
text: Alert. Concealed 1 [per_investigator]. Hunter. Retaliate. Desiderio Delgado Álvarez gets +2 [per_investigator] health. Forced - When Desiderio Delgado Álvarez takes damage during act 1 or 2: Instead, automatically evade him. [reaction] After Desiderio Delgado Álvarez is evaded by 2 or more and there is another copy of him at your location, that copy deals this one 2 damage.

name: Desiderio Delgado Álvarez
text: Alert. Concealed 1 [per_investigator]. Hunter. Retaliate. Desiderio Delgado Álvarez gets +2 [per_investigator] health. Forced - When Desiderio Delgado Álvarez takes damage during act 1 or 2: Instead, automatically evade him. [reaction] After Desiderio Delgado Álvarez is evaded by 2 or more and there is another copy of him at your location, that copy deals this one 2 damage.

name: Desiderio Delgado Álvarez
text: [reaction] When an attack from a [[Monster]] enemy deals damage to Desiderio Delgado Álvarez, exhaust him: Cancel 1 of that damage and deal 1 damage to the attacking enemy.

name: Body Snatched
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (4). If you fail, choose an [[Ally]] or [[Item]] asset you control and set it aside, out of play, as a hollow (if you cannot, take 2 horror instead).

name: On Thin Ice
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the number of [[Hazard]] treacheries in play. [cultist]: -4. If you fail, choose a non-weakness card in your hand and set it aside, out of play, as a hollow. [tablet]: -2 (-5 instead if Void Chimera is at your location). [elder_thing]: -3. If you fail, look at the top card of your deck. If it is not a weakness, set it aside, out of play, as a hollow.

name: Quest for the Sable Glass
text: Objective - Only investigators at the Condemned Gold Mine may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: If It Bleeds...
text: [action] If your location has the [[Wilderness]] trait and investigators at your location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Place 1 resource on your location, as a scouting report. (Limit 1 scouting report per [[Wilderness]] location.) Objective - You may advance at the end of any round. (Hint: You will lure out the predator when you advance. Advance when you believe you are prepared.)

name: Prowling Nightmare
text: Objective - After Void Chimera (True Form) is exposed, advance the act.

name: Outsiders' Lair
text: Revelation - Put Outsiders' Lair into play and move Void Chimera (True Form) and each investigator at its location to Outsiders' Lair. While Outsiders' Lair has no clues on it, Void Chimera (True Form) gets -1 fight and -1 evade.

name: Last Stand
text: The location where Void Chimera (True Form) was exposed is connected to Outsiders' Lair (but not vice versa.) Objective - If Void Chimera (True Form) is defeated, advance the act.

name: Anchorage
text: [action]: Choose a set-aside hollow. Its owner draws it. (Limit once per round.) [action]: Resign. "I thought Alaska was supposed to be nice this time of year!"

name: Fairbanks
text: [reaction] When an investigator at Fairbanks draws a [[Hazard]] treachery: Spend 2 resources to cancel that treachery's effects and discard it.

name: Mountain Stream
text: Forced - After you enter Mountain Stream: Test [intellect] or [agility] (1). If you fail, take 1 damage. Forced - After the last clue is discovered from Mountain Stream: Put the 3 set-aside Outer Wilderness locations into play adjacent to it.

name: Frozen Lake
text: Forced - After an investigator at this location reveals a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing] symbol during a skill test they are performing: They must either choose and discard 1 card from their hand, or take 1 horror.

name: Isolated Road
text: The first [[Hazard]] treachery revealed by an investigator at this location each round gains surge.

name: Forgotten Outpost
text: [action]: Draw 3 cards. (Limit once per game.)

name: Hunter's Lodge
text: Forced - When you reveal Hunter's Lodge: Test [willpower] or [intellect] (3) to talk the hunter down. If you fail, take 1 damage. Forced - When a [[Monster]] enemy enters this location: Deal 1 damage to it.

name: Condemned Gold Mine
text: [action]: Reveal 1 random chaos token from the chaos bag plus 1 additional token for each depletion token on Condemned Gold Mine. If you did not reveal any [skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing] symbols in this way, gain 4 resources and place 1 resource (from the token pool) on Condemned Gold Mine, as a depletion token.

name: Thorne
text: Hunter. Retaliate. Thorne gets +2 [per_investigator] health. Forced - After a [[Hazard]] treachery is drawn: Thorne shifts each of their attached keys. Forced - When Thorne is defeated: If The Sable Glass is attached to Thorne, attach it to any investigator, under that investigator's control.

name: Thorne
text: [reaction] After an investigator at your location sets a card aside as a hollow, exhaust Thorne: That investigator may take an immediate action as if it were their turn.

name: Void Chimera
text: Concealed 4. Massive. You cannot expose any concealed mini-cards while one of Void Chimera's other forms is in play. Forced - After you expose one of Void Chimera's decoys: Find the set-aside version of Void Chimera with the matching subtitle and spawn it at your location.

name: Void Chimera
text: Patrol ([[Wilderness]] location with the most investigators). Retaliate. Void Chimera (Fellbeak) gets +1 [per_investigator] health.

name: Void Chimera
text: Alert. Hunter. Void Chimera (Earsplitter) gets +1 [per_investigator] health.

name: Void Chimera
text: Hunter. Void Chimera (Gorefeaster) gets +1 [per_investigator] health. Forced - After Void Chimera (Gorefeaster) attacks you: Look at the top card of your deck. If it is not a weakness, set it aside, out of play, as a hollow, and heal damage from Void Chimera (Gorefeaster) equal to that hollow's printed cost.

name: Void Chimera
text: Hunter. Void Chimera (Fellhound) gets +1 [per_investigator] health. While you are attacking or attempting to evade Void Chimera (Fellhound) , if you own any set-aside hollows, it gains alert and retaliate.

name: Ravenous Grizzly
text: Hunter. Retaliate. Spawn - Nearest [[Wilderness]] location. Ravenous Grizzly cannot enter non-[[Wilderness]] locations. While Ravenous Grizzly is moving, it skips over connecting non-[[Wilderness]] locations.

name: Cracking Ice
text: Revelation - Put Cracking Ice into play next to the agenda deck. Then, if there are 3 or more copies of Cracking Ice next to the agenda deck, discard them all and each investigator at a [[Wilderness]] location tests [agility] (4). Each investigator who fails must take 1 damage, take 1 horror, or lose 1 action for each point they failed by.

name: Snowslide
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (3). If you fail, you and each asset with health you control takes 1 direct damage.

name: The Sable Glass
text: Shift - Look at the revealed side of each concealed mini-card at your location (without exposing them) . Flip this key to its [[Unstable]] side.

name: The Sable Glass
text: Shift - Each investigator sets the non-weakness card in their hand with the highest printed cost aside, out of play, as a hollow. Then, if an investigator shifted this key, flip it to its [[Stable]] side.

name: Dogs of War
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -1 (-3 instead if you are at a location with a Key Locus). [cultist]: -3. If you fail, either take 1 damage and 1 horror, or place 1 doom on the nearest Key Locus or [[Locus Site]] location. [tablet]: -2. If this is an attack against an enemy with patrol, after this attack, it disengages and resolves its patrol keyword. [elder_thing]: -2. For each point you fail by, lose 1 resource (max 3).

name: Brewing Catastrophe (v. I)
text: Each enemy loses hunter and gains patrol (nearest location with a Key Locus). While there are no other Key Locuses in play, The Claret Knight counts as a Key Locus for the purposes of card abilities. When checking the doom threshold, doom on cards other than this agenda subtract from the total doom in play instead of adding to it. Objective - Defend the Knight! If The Claret Knight is defeated, advance this agenda.

name: Brewing Catastrophe (v. II)
text: While there are no other Key Locuses in play, The Bourse counts as a Key Locus for the purposes of card abilities.

name: Brewing Catastrophe (v. III)
text: While there are no other Key Locuses in play, Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa counts as a Key Locus for the purposes of card abilities.

name: Rabbits Who Run (v. I)
text: During the "enemies attack" step of the enemy phase, in addition to their standard attacks, each ready enemy attacks each Key Locus at its location as if it were an engaged investigator. Horror dealt by these attacks is dealt as damage, instead. Objective - Defend the Key and hold out for as long as you can. (The agenda represents how long you must defend it. You will be instructed when to advance.)

name: Rabbits Who Run (v. II)
text: Objective - If The Claret Knight is defeated, or if an investigator controls The Light of Pharos, advance.

name: Rabbits Who Run (v. III)
text: Objective - If The Beast in a Cowl of Crimson is defeated, or if an investigator controls The Light of Pharos, advance.

name: The Bourse
text: Unless The Claret Knight is the only Key Locus in play, enemies cannot enter The Bourse (if an enemy would spawn here, spawn it at a connecting location instead). [action] Investigators at The Bourse spend 1[per_investigator] clues, as a group: Remove 1 doom from any location or from an asset you control. Any player may trigger this ability.

name: The Bourse
text: [action]: Test [willpower] or [agility] (4). If you succeed, investigators at this location may spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to place 1 resource on the Light of Pharos. Then, if there are 3 resources on the Light of Pharos, choose an investigator at this location to take control of it.

name: The Bourse
text: [action]: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, gain 4 resources. You may reduce the difficulty of this test by 2. If you do, gain 2 fewer resources if you succeed. (Group limit once per round.)

name: Windsor Palace Hotel
text: While you are at Windsor Palace Hotel... - ...if there is a Key Locus here, increase the cost of each [[Item]] or [[Ally]] asset you play by 1. - ...if there is no Key Locus here, reduce the cost of each [[Item]] or [[Ally]] asset you play by 1.

name: Victoria College
text: [reaction] When you would draw exactly 1 card from your deck while you are at Victoria College: Instead, look at the top 2 cards of your deck, choose 1 to draw, and shuffle the other back into your deck. (Limit once per round.)

name: Qaitbay Citadel
text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating Qaitbay Citadel: You cannot discover clues or expose concealed mini-cards at Qaitbay Citadel for the remainder of the round.

name: The Corniche
text: Forced - After The Corniche is successfully investigated: Increase the difficulty of each other test performed at The Corniche this round by 2.

name: Zan'et el Settat
text: Forced - When you fight an enemy while at Zan'et el Settat: You must either spend 1 action or increase that enemy's fight by 2 for this attack.

name: Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa
text: [action]: Test [willpower] or [agility] (4). If you succeed, investigators at this location may spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to place 1 resource on the Light of Pharos. Then, if there are 3 resources on the Light of Pharos, choose an investigator at this location to take control of it.

name: Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa
text: [action]: Test [willpower] (6). If you succeed, automatically evade The Beast in a Cowl of Crimson (regardless of its current location) . (Group limit once per game.)

name: Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa
text: [action]: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, draw 3 cards. You may reduce the difficulty of this test by 2. If you do, draw 1 fewer card if you succeed. (Group limit once per round.)

name: Key Locus
text: You may attack Key Locus as if it were an enemy with 4 fight. [action] Spend 1 clue: Deal 2 damage to Key Locus. Forced - If Key Locus is defeated: Add it to the victory display.

name: Key Locus
text: [action] Spend 1 clue: Test [willpower] (2). Heal 1 damage from Key Locus, plus 1 additional damage for each point you succeed by. Forced - If Key Locus is defeated: Remove it from the game (do not add it to the victory display) .

name: The Claret Knight
text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while at The Claret Knight's location, if he is ready: He shifts each of his attached keys.

name: The Claret Knight
text: [fast] Exhaust The Claret Knight: Move up to 3 resources from your resource pool to The Claret Knight. [fast] Exhaust The Claret Knight: Move up to 3 resources from The Claret Knight to your resource pool, or to an asset you control as charges, ammo, supplies, or secrets.

name: The Beast in a Cowl of Crimson
text: Patrol (nearest location with a Key Locus). Retaliate. Forced - When The Beast in a Cowl of Crimson would be defeated: Instead, heal all damage from it, exhaust it, and move it to Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa, unengaged.

name: The Beast in a Cowl of Crimson
text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while at The Beast in a Cowl of Crimson's location, if it is ready: It shifts each of its attached keys.

name: Scarlet Beast
text: Alert. Hunter. Retaliate. Scarlet Beast gets +2 fight and -2 evade while it is at a [[Locus Site]] location.

name: Coterie Provocateur
text: Aloof. Patrol (nearest location with a Key Locus). Spawn - Nearest location with a Key Locus. While Coterie Provocateur is ready, investigators at its location cannot attack anything with a title other than Coterie Provocateur.

name: Locus Pulse
text: Revelation - Attach Locus Pulse to the nearest location with a Key Locus. Each investigator at that location takes 1 damage and 1 horror. Forced - If there is no Key Locus at attached location: Discard Locus Pulse.

name: The Light of Pharos
text: Shift - Play a card from your hand, at -3 cost. Flip this key to its [[Unstable]] side.

name: The Light of Pharos
text: Shift - Each investigator must discard 2 random non-weakness cards from their hand. Then, if an investigator shifted this key, flip it to its [[Stable]] side.

name: Shades of Suffering
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is half the number of charges on The Shade Reaper, rounded up (X cannot be greater than 6). [cultist]: -4. If you fail by 2 or more, place 1 charge on The Shade Reaper. [tablet]: -1. If you are at a location with a [[Geist]] enemy, reveal an additional chaos token. [elder_thing]: -4. You may place 1 charge on The Shade Reaper to treat this token's modifier as 0 instead.

name: Restless Dead
text: If there is only one investigator in the game, this agenda gets +1 doom threshold. Forced - When you engage Tzu San Niang: Investigators at your location must spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group. If they cannot, draw the top card of the encounter deck instead. (Hint: When this agenda advances, Tzu San Niang will harvest a nearby spirit if her location is unknown!)

name: Fear The Reaper
text: Each [[Geist]] enemy gain hunter and retaliate and cannot be flipped over. Forced - When doom is placed on this agenda: Remove 1 [[Geist]] enemy from beneath Tzu San Niang and spawn it faceup at her location.

name: The Lady with the Red Parasol
text: Objective - Find Tzu San Niang before the agenda advances. When you engage Tzu San Niang, investigators must spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance. If they cannot, return her to the shadows and resolve her concealed keyword.

name: Ghost Light
text: [[Geist]] enemies cannot leave [[Haunted]] locations. Objective - Quell the restless spirits before they are consumed by Tzu San Niang! At the end of the round, if there are no non-weakness [[Geist]] enemies in play, advance.

name: Harvester of Woe
text: [reaction] When you are dealt damage and/or horror from Tzu San Niang's forced effect, investigators at your location may spend any number of clues: Cancel that much damage/horror. Objective - If Tzu San Niang is defeated, advance.

name: Kuala Lumpur Station
text: [fast] During your turn, pay 2 resources: Move (to a connecting location) . (Limit once per turn.) [action] Discard an asset you control from play: Gain resources equal to half the discarded asset's printed cost, rounded down, and remember that you "traded for a kitten." (Group limit once per game.)

name: Kuala Lumpur Station
text: [action]: Resign. "There's nothing more we can do here." You hastily book passage out of the city. [action] Investigators at this location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Heal 2 horror. Remember that you "found a cheap memento."

name: Selangor Club
text: Each investigator at Selangor Club does not collect resources during the upkeep phase. [action] Spend 2 resources: Parley. You enjoy a pleasant meal and drinks. Heal 1 damage and 1 horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset at your location. (Limit once per round.)

name: Selangor Club Padang
text: [action]: Parley. Test [combat] (4) to join the games. If you fail, remember that you "embarrassed the consulate." If you succeed, gain 3 resources. (Max one success per round.)

name: Melati's Shop
text: [action] Investigators at Melati's Shop spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Remember that you "peered beyond." Look at the revealed side of a concealed mini-card or the other side of a [[Geist]] enemy in play.

name: Wayang Kulit Theater
text: X is equal to half the charges on The Shade Reaper, rounded up (to a max of 8). [action] Investigators at Wayang Kulit Theater spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Heal 2 damage. Remember that you "shared a deep pain."

name: Tin Mine
text: [action]: Test [agility] (6). Investigators at Tin Mine may spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to automatically succeed. If you succeed, draw 2 cards and remember that you "found hidden bones." (Group limit once per game.) Forced - After you fail a skill test while at Tin Mine: Take 1 damage.

name: Uncanny Shadow
text: Uncanny Shadow gets +1 [per_investigator] health. [action] Discard 1-3 cards from your hand at random: Parley. Test [willpower] (6). Reduce the difficulty of this test by 1 for each card you discarded as part of this action's cost. If you succeed, flip this card and resolve the text on its other side. Forced - When Uncanny Shadow would be defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

name: Playful Shadows
text: If an investigator has "embarrassed the consulate," read the following (otherwise, flip this card back to its enemy side, heal all damage from it, disengage it from all investigators, and exhaust it): The sound of laughter turns to weeping, then turns back to laughter. "It is the spirit of a boy," Melati tells you. A round ball rolls out from the darkness to your feet as you look up at the trembling forms. "The padang where he once played is now the ground of one of Ms. Tzu's endeavors. Your small gesture amused him. I think he will be at peace now." Add this card to the victory display.

name: Uncanny Shadow
text: Uncanny Shadow gets +1 [per_investigator] health. [action] Discard 1-3 cards from your hand at random: Parley. Test [willpower] (6). Reduce the difficulty of this test by 1 for each card you discarded as part of this action's cost. If you succeed, flip this card and resolve the text on its other side. Forced - When Uncanny Shadow would be defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

name: Timorous Shadows
text: If an investigator has "peered beyond," read the following (otherwise, flip this card back to its enemy side, heal all damage from it, disengage it from all investigators, and exhaust it): "It is the spirit of a girl. She watched many stories unfold in this very theater," says Melati. The shadow on the screen forms a hungry smile filled with sharp teeth that turns to a fearful frown. "She is loathe to let go of this place, for she does not know if her story will continue." As Melati translates, you assure the spirit that you have looked beyond the veil and she can leave this plane of existence. As the hoary shadows dissipate, you feel a coldness as you reflect on what you saw - and didn't see - in the beyond. Was it wrong to reassure her? Add this card to the victory display.

name: Buried Miner
text: Buried Miner gets +1 [per_investigator] health. [action] Take 1-3 horror: Parley. Test [combat] (6). Reduce the difficulty of this test by 1 for each horror you took as part of this action's cost. If you succeed, flip this card and resolve the text on its other side. Forced - When Buried Miner would be defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

name: A Lost Memento
text: If an investigator has "found a cheap memento," read the following (otherwise, flip this card back to its enemy side, heal all damage from it, disengage it from all investigators, and exhaust it): "These are the spirits of fallen miners," says Melati, holding onto the flimsy tin figurine you found. "This belonged to one of them. It is sculpted from tin from this very mine. Tzu San Niang's heartless business separated the workers from their families. And now, they will never be reunited, except in death." She holds the tin figurine over the surface of the water and lets go of it. You think you can see the outline of wispy, spectral hands grasping at it as it sinks to the bottom of the pit. Add this card to the victory display.

name: Buried Miner
text: Buried Miner gets +1 [per_investigator] health. [action] Take 1-3 horror: Parley. Test [combat] (6). Reduce the difficulty of this test by 1 for each horror you took as part of this action's cost. If you succeed, flip this card and resolve the text on its other side. Forced - When Buried Miner would be defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

name: Exhume the Bones
text: If an investigator has "found hidden bones," read the following (otherwise, flip this card back to its enemy side, heal all damage from it, disengage it from all investigators, and exhaust it): "These are the spirits of fallen miners," says Melati, gesturing to the oily dark water. "Compelled by Tzu San Niang's relentless greed, the foreman of the mine has worked them... well, literally to the bone. Their bodies lie, unburied, in these deep pits." With her help, you begin exhuming the bones of the fallen miners. It is gruesome, awful work, but as you do it, you can feel a sense of gratitude wash over you. Only when you are finished can you feel a final wave of relief emanate from your surroundings. Add this card to the victory display.

name: Slain Foreman
text: Slain Foreman gets +1 [per_investigator] health. [action] Discard an asset you control: Parley. Test [intellect] (6). Reduce the difficulty of this test by the printed cost of the asset discarded as part of this action's cost. If you succeed, flip this card and resolve the text on its other side. Forced - When Slain Foreman would be defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

name: Sympathy Pain
text: If an investigator has "shared a deep pain," read the following (otherwise, flip this card back to its enemy side, heal all damage from it, disengage it from all investigators, and exhaust it): Melati prepares a ritual of banishment as you stare into the spirit's eyes. While the bomoh chants, you feel a ripple of pain resonate in your own mind, and for a moment you glimpse a memory from the rail worker's life: them, holding a sledgehammer, as a shadowy figure stood above them, smiling cruelly. A sudden blur of motion, followed by an awful screech. As the memory fades, so too does the spirit. Add this card to the victory display.

name: Slain Foreman
text: Slain Foreman gets +1 [per_investigator] health. [action] Discard an asset you control: Parley. Test [intellect] (6). Reduce the difficulty of this test by the printed cost of the asset discarded as part of this action's cost. If you succeed, flip this card and resolve the text on its other side. Forced - When Slain Foreman would be defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

name: Familial Pain
text: If an investigator has "traded for a kitten," read the following (otherwise, flip this card back to its enemy side, heal all damage from it, disengage it from all investigators, and exhaust it): Melati gestures for you to hold the kitten out to the spirit. "This one had two daughters and many cats," the bomoh says. "They simply want to know their loved ones are cared for." The spirit reaches out and strokes the kitten's fur with a glimmering, spectral hand. After speaking rapidly in Malay, Melati looks to you. "Bringing this animal to the family of the departed would comfort them. I have told the spirit I will bring it as a gift soon." When you look, the spirit has vanished. Add this card to the victory display.

name: Excruciate
text: Revelation - Place 1 charge on The Shade Reaper. Test [willpower] (3) (6 instead if there are 8 or more charges on The Shade Reaper). If you fail, you must either discard 1 card from your hand for each point you fail by, or take 2 damage.

name: Spirit Harvest
text: Peril. Revelation - Either (choose one): - Each investigator takes 1 damage and 1 horror. - Tzu San Niang shifts The Shade Reaper and then places 2 charges on it.

name: Tzu San Niang
text: Concealed 2. Forced - When Tzu San Niang would be defeated: Instead, heal all damage from her, remove all doom from play, return her to the shadows, and resolve her concealed keyword, distributing each of those concealed mini-cards as evenly as possible among each location with a non-weakness [[Geist]] enemy.

name: Tzu San Niang
text: Hunter. Retaliate. Tzu San Niang gets +2 [per_investigator] health. Forced - When you succeed at a skill test while attempting to fight or evade Tzu San Niang: Remove 1 charge from The Shade Reaper for each point you succeeded by. Take damage and/or horror equal to the number of charges removed, divided as equally as possible.

name: The Shade Reaper
text: Shift - Choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location. You may move that enemy to a connecting location. You may force that enemy to attack another enemy at its location, dealing its horror as damage. Flip this key to its [[Unstable]] side.

name: The Shade Reaper
text: Shift - Each investigator loses 1 action (or if it is not their turn, loses 1 action during their next turn). Then, if an investigator shifted this key, flip it to its [[Stable]] side.

name: Without a Trace
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is half the number of locations in play, rounded down. [cultist]: -4. If you fail, the nearest [[Outsider]] enemy readies, moves once toward you, and attacks you if it is at your location. [tablet]: -X. X is the number of set-aside hollows you own (max 5). [elder_thing]: -3. If you fail, choose a non-weakness card in your hand and set it aside, as a hollow.

name: Otherworldly Horror
text: As an additional cost to enter an unrevealed location, investigators at your location must spend 1[per_investigator] clues, as a group. [reaction] After you expose a location: Move to that location (from an adjacent location) .

name: Otherworldly Lambs
text: As an additional cost to enter an unrevealed location, investigators at your location must spend 1[per_investigator] clues, as a group. [reaction] After you expose a location: Move to that location (from an adjacent location) .

name: Otherworldly Slaughter
text: As an additional cost to enter an unrevealed location, investigators at your location must spend 1[per_investigator] clues, as a group. [reaction] After you expose a location: Move to that location (from an adjacent location) . [fast] Take 1 direct damage or 1 direct horror: Look at the revealed side of a concealed mini-card (without exposing it) . (Group limit once per round.)

name: Traversing the Outside
text: Objective - Find the heart of the Outsiders' domain. When the Outsiders' Lair is revealed, advance.

name: Red Ruin
text: The Red-Gloved Man cannot be discarded or drawn. [action] If Mimetic Nemesis is at your location, spend 1 clue: Deal 2 damage to it. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity from Mimetic Nemesis. Objective - When The Red-Gloved man enters play, advance.

name: Escaping the Otherworld
text: Each [[Outsider]] enemy loses aloof. Forced - If The Red-Gloved Man is defeated: Remove him from the game. Objective - Time to get the hell out of here! If each surviving investigator has resigned, advance.

name: Court of the Outsiders
text: [action]: Resign. Test [willpower] or [agility] (4). If you succeed, you resign, adding each [[Conspirator]] asset you control to the victory display. If you fail, you remain trapped here, and this test gets -1 difficulty until the end of your turn. If each surviving investigator has resigned, immediately advance to act 3b.

name: Outsiders' Lair
text: Each [[Outsider]] enemy at this location loses aloof and gets +1 fight and +1 evade. [fast] If The Red-Gloved Man is the only set-aside hollow: Put him into play under the control of any investigator at Outsiders' Lair.

name: Mimetic Nemesis
text: Alert. Hunter. Massive. Retaliate. Forced - When you would deal damage to this enemy: Instead, choose and discard that many set-aside hollows. Forced - At the end of the round: Each investigator at this enemy's location must either choose a non-weakness card in their hand and set it aside, as a hollow, or this enemy attacks them.

name: Protoplasmic Reassembler
text: Massive. Spawn - Location farthest from all investigators. Forced - At the end of the enemy phase, if this enemy is ready: Spawn the top card of the nearest investigator's deck facedown at its location as a Golem enemy. Golems have: "[[Monster. Outsider.]] Hunter. 1 fight, 1 health, 1 evade, 1 damage value. If Golem is defeated, set it aside, out of play, as a hollow."

name: The Red-Gloved Man
text: [reaction] After you successfully fight or evade an [[Outsider]] enemy by 2 or more, exhaust The Red-Gloved Man: Deal 1 damage to that enemy and discover 1 clue at your location.

name: Aliki Zoni Uperetria
text: [reaction] After a concealed mini-card is exposed, exhaust Aliki Zoni Uperetria: Choose a set-aside hollow. Its owner draws it.

name: Congress of the Keys
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the current act number. [cultist]: -5. You may flip a [[Stable]] key you control to its [[Unstable]] side to treat this token's modifier as -2, instead. [tablet]: -2. If this is an attack against a ready [[Outsider]] enemy, you automatically fail, instead. [elder_thing]: -3. Cancel the effects and icons of each card committed to this test and set each of them aside, out of play, as hollows.

name: Conflux of Consequence
text: Forced - When this agenda advances, if it is act 2, 3, or 4: Skip the "b" side of this agenda and proceed directly to agenda 2a.

name: Secrets and Lies (v. I)
text: The Red-Gloved Man gains concealed 1 [per_investigator] and cannot be damaged. Objective - At the end of the round, if each investigator is at the same location as The Red-Gloved Man, they may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: Secrets and Lies (v. II)
text: Do not draw cards from the encounter deck during the mythos phase. Objective - Prepare for your journey into the Outside, and proceed when you are ready. At the end of any round, if each investigator is at the same location, they may advance. The sooner, the better. (Hint - You will also be forced to advance automatically when the agenda advances.)

name: Secrets and Lies (v. III)
text: The Red-Gloved Man gains concealed 1 [per_investigator] and cannot be damaged. Objective - At the end of the round, if each investigator is at the same location as The Red-Gloved Man, they may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: To the Tower
text: Locations and concealed mini-cards cannot be placed adjacent to [[Tower]] locations. Objective - Find a way into the tower where the infiltrator lies in wait. If an investigator enters the Gravity-Defying Climb, advance.

name: The Ascent
text: Objective - Ascend. If an investigator enters The Towering Vertex, advance.

name: The Final Err
text: [action] Flip a [[Stable]] key you control to its [[Unstable]] side: Remove an exposed decoy from the game. Objective - If Mimetic Nemesis is defeated, advance.

name: Scarlet Halls
text: [fast] Exhaust a [[Conspirator]] asset you control: Move (to a connecting location) .

name: Scarlet Halls
text: Forced - After you enter Scarlet Halls: For the remainder of your turn, as an additional cost for you to move from Scarlet Halls to a connecting location, you must either exhaust a [[Conspirator]] asset you control or spend an additional action.

name: Congress Chamber
text: [action] Exhaust a [[Conspirator]] asset you control: Search the top 6 cards of your deck for an asset, draw it, and shuffle the rest into your deck.

name: Congress Chamber
