text: Revelation - Test [agility] (4). If you fail and you are at a... - ...[[Past]] location, exhaust all assets at it. - ...[[Present]] location, take 1 direct damage. Deal 1 damage to each [[Ally]] asset at your location. - ...[[Future]] location, take 1 direct horror. Deal 1 horror to each [[Ally]] asset at your location.

name: Lost in Time
text: Revelation - Shuffle a non-story asset you control into your deck, moving all damage and horror from that asset to your investigator. If no asset is shuffled into your deck by this effect, choose and discard 3 cards from your hand.

name: Merging Timelines
text: Revelation - Discard the top 5 cards of your deck. For each card in your hand that matches one of the discarded cards (by title) , discard that card from your hand and lose 1 action. Shuffle each weakness discarded by this effect into your deck.

name: Open Portal
text: Revelation - Take 1 damage. Test [agility] (3). If you fail, take 1 additional damage and move to Tindalos.

name: Temporal Distortion
text: Revelation - Attach to the current agenda. Abilities on story cards cannot be triggered. [action]: If you are at a [[Past]] location, you may test [willpower] (2). If you are at a [[Present]] location, you may test [agility] (3). If you are at a [[Future]] location, you may test [combat] (4). If you succeed at 1 or more of these tests, discard Temporal Distortion.

name: Vanishing History
text: Revelation - You must decide (choose one): - Discard a non-story [[Item]] asset you control. - Choose and discard 3 non-weakness cards from your hand.

name: Film Fatale
text: Standard [skull]: -X. X is 1 more than the current agenda number. [cultist]: -3 (-5 instead if there is a [[Monster]] enemy at your location). [tablet]: -3. If there is a [[Saturnite]] enemy at your location, reveal another token. [elder_thing]: -3. If you fail and there is a [[Dinosaur]] enemy at your location, ready that enemy. That enemy attacks you.

name: Showbusiness As Usual
text: As you walk with André, he mentions the trouble around the lot all started when the producer, Erika Strand, found the "deal of the century" on three props for the films. Ever since then, people have been acting strange, things have been disappearing, and the world just doesn't seem right.

name: Colliding Realities
text: Forced - The first time each round an investigator draws a copy of Bleeding Reality: After resolving its effects, that investigators draws the top card of the Reel deck.

name: André's Request
text: Each Possessed Extra gains aloof. Objective - Investigate as many of the cursed props as you can. At the end of the round, if there are 2 or more [[Prop]] assets in the victory display, the investigators may advance.

name: Helios Telescope
text: Uses (0 shards). [action] Spend 1 shard: Discard an exhausted non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location. Then, for each remaining shard on Helios Telescope, deal 1 damage to an [[Elite]] enemy at any location.

name: Staff of the Serpent
text: Damage cannot be assigned to Staff of the Serpent except by the ability below. [action] If it is act 3: Fight. Add your [willpower] to your skill value for this attack. If this attack defeats an enemy, deal 1 damage to Staff of the Serpent (2 damage instead of the defeated enemy is [[Elite]]).

name: Accursed Cape
text: Accursed Cape gets +2 [per_investigator] health. When damage would be placed on attached enemy, place 1 of that damage on Accursed Cape. Forced - When Accursed Cape is defeated: Place it in the victory display.

name: Central Lot
text: [action] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Add the topmost card beneath Central Lot to the victory display.

name: Central Lot
text: Forced - When the round ends, if there are no clues on Central Lot: Place clues on Central Lot up to its clue value.

name: Space Set
text: Forced - After you discover 1 or more clues at this location: Test [willpower] (2). If you fail, lose 1 action. [action]: Play an asset from your hand, reducing its cost by 2. (Limit once per game.)

name: Jungle Set
text: Forced - After you discover 1 or more clues at this location: Test [agility] (2). If you fail, you must either take 1 damage or discard an asset you control. [action]: Reveal the top 6 cards of your deck. Choose a revealed [[Item]] asset and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck. (Limit once per game.)

name: Gothic Set
text: Forced - After you discover 1 or more clues at this location: Test [combat] (2). If you fail, ready the nearest enemy. It moves towards, engages, and attacks the nearest investigator. [reaction] After you defeat an enemy at Gothic Set: Heal 1 horror.

name: Flip the Script
text: Revelation - Test [intellect] (0). Each matching skill icon committed to this test subtracts from your skill value instead of adding to it. For each point you succeed by, you must either take 1 horror or place 1 of your clues on your location (to a maximum of 3).

name: Found Footage
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (X), where X is equal to your location's shroud value. If you fail, take 2 horror.

name: Action!
text: Peril. Revelation - You must decide (choose one): - Lose 2 actions. - Each investigator at your location takes 1 damage and 1 horror.

name: "Break a Leg!"
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (3). If you fail, you must either take 2 damage, or choose and discard a non-story [[Item]] asset you control.

name: Bleeding Reality
text: Revelation - Test [intellect] (X), where X is 1 more than the current act number. For each point you fail by, discard 1 card at random from your hand (to a maximum of 3).

name: Last Looks
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (2). This test gets +2 difficulty if there is 3 or more damage on you. If you fail, take 1 direct horror and discard 1 card at random from your hand.

name: Creature Feature
text: Revelation - Test [intellect] + [combat] (5). If you fail, draw the topmost [[Creature]] or [[Monster]] enemy in the encounter discard pile. If you failed and no enemy was drawn by this effect, take 1 horror and Creature Feature gains surge.

name: Erika Strand
text: Forced - When the enemy phase begins, if Erika Strand is ready: Reveal 1 random token from the chaos bag. If a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] token is revealed, ready each other [[Possessed]] enemy. Those enemies gain hunter and lose aloof until the end of the round.

name: Ghost Light
text: Hunter. Cannot be damaged except by [[Spell]], [[Relic]], [[Charm]], or encounter cards. [reaction] After Ghost Light is successfully evaded: Deal 1 damage to it.

name: André Patel
text: You get +1 [agility]. [reaction] After you succeed at a skill test in which 2 or more cards were committed, exhaust André Patel: Immediately take an action as if it were your turn (this action does not count toward the number of actions you can take each turn).

name: A Cosmic Journey
text: Each Possessed Extra gets +2 health. Objective - Rebuild the telescope. When the round ends, if there are 3 shards on Helios Telescope, advance. (Hint: Explore the cosmos to rebuild the telescope.)

name: From Whence They Came
text: Each Possessed Extra gets +2 health, +1 fight, +1 evade, and gains elusive and the [[Saturnite]] trait. [action] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Place 1 shard on Helios Telescope. Forced - If Helios Telescope has no shards on it, advance. Objective - Dethrone the monarch. If the Saturnite Monarch is defeated, advance.

name: High Ruler's Bastion
text: Forced - At the end of the round, if there are no clues on High Ruler's Bastion: Place clues on this location up to its clue value. [fast] If the Saturnite Monarch is in the victory display: Place 1 shard on Helios Telescope. (Max once per game.)

name: Teetawn Passage
text: Teetawn Passage gets -X shroud, where X is the combined cost of each asset beneath Teetawn Passage. [fast] If there are no clues on Teetawn Passage: Place 1 shard on Helios Telescope. (Max once per game.)

name: Ritual Site Teetawn
text: [action]: Make a sacrifice. Test [willpower] + [agility] (5). If you succeed, you may place up to two non-story assets from your hand or play area under Teetawn Passage. Then, discard the top card of the encounter deck. If it is an enemy, draw it.

name: Tothis Barrens
text: Forced - At the end of the enemy phase, if there are any ready enemies at Tothis Barrens: Discard 1 shard on Tothis Barrens. [action] If there are no clues on Tothis Barrens: Move 1 shard on Tothis Barrens to Helios Telescope (Max once per game.)

name: Ritual Site Tothis
text: [fast] If there is no shard on Tothis Barrens: Disturb the ritual site. Discard the top 1 [per_investigator] cards from the encounter deck. Spawn each enemy discarded by this effect at Tothis Barrens. Place 1 resource token (from the token pool) on Tothis Barrens, as a shard.

name: Saturnite Monarch
text: Aloof. [action]: Parley. Test [willpower] (4). If you succeed, place 1 resource (from the token pool) on Saturnite Monarch. If there are 1 [per_investigator] resources on Saturnite Monarch, add it to the victory display.

name: Saturnite Monarch
text: Alert. Hunter. Massive. Saturnite Monarch gets +1 fight for each other enemy in play (to a max of +3). Forced - At the end of the enemy phase, if Saturnite Monarch is at the same location as Helios Telescope, remove 1 shard from Helios Telescope.

name: Saturnite Drudge Militia
text: Elusive. Retaliate. [action]: Parley. Test [willpower] (3) to make loud noises. For each point you succeed by, deal 1 damage to Saturnite Drudge Militia. If you succeed by 2 or more, exhaust it.

name: Lost Asteroid
text: Revelation - Disengage from each enemy, put Lost Asteroid into play, and move to it. Investigators at Lost Asteroid get -1 to all skills during the mythos phase. [action]: Test [agility] (4). If you succeed, move to a revealed location and discard Lost Asteroid. (You may spend 4 resources to automatically succeed.)

name: Celestial Shower
text: Revelation - Test [intellect] + [agility] (6). If you fail, investigators at your location take a combined total of X damage, divided as you choose. X is the number of investigators at your location.

name: Rocket Ship
text: Vehicle. [fast] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Blast off! Move Rocket Ship to a [[Cosmos]] location. Reveal a token from the chaos bag. If a symbol token is revealed, each investigator leaves Rocket Ship. Then, flip this card over.

name: Curious Moon
text: Massive. Forced - If Curious Moon is successfully attacked or evaded, flip this card over.

name: The Forgotten Island
text: Each Possessed Extra gets +1 health, +1 evade, and gains alert. [fast] Investigators at the same [[Jungle]] location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Move 1 seal from Ruins of the Serpent King to Allosaurus. Objective - When the round ends, if each surviving investigator and the Staff of the Serpent are at Jungle Set, advance.

name: Destroy the Source
text: Each Possessed Extra gets +2 health, +2 evade, and gains alert and the [[Dinosaur]] trait. [fast] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Search the top 6 cards of the encounter deck for an enemy and spawn it at the location with the most investigators. Objective - Shatter the staff. If the Staff of the Serpent is defeated, advance.

name: Western Ridge
text: [reaction] When you attempt to evade an enemy at Western Ridge, choose and discard 2 cards from your hand: That enemy gets -2 evade for this evasion attempt. (Limit once per round.)

name: Tar Pit
text: Forced - When you end your turn at this location: Test [combat] (2). If you fail, you must either take 1 direct horror or discard an [[Ally]] or [[Footwear]] asset you control.

name: Eastern Ridge
text: [reaction] When you attempt to fight an enemy at Eastern Ridge, spend 3 resources: That enemy gets -2 fight for this attack. (Limit once per round.)

name: Jungle River
text: Forced - When you leave this location: Test [agility] (2). If you fail, you must either take 1 direct damage or discard a [[Weapon]] or [[Clothing]] asset you control.

name: Ruins of the Serpent King
text: [action] Choose an enemy at Ruins of the Serpent King and spend X clues, where X is that enemy's fight value: Exhaust that enemy. [action]: You attempt to wrest the staff from the altar. Test [willpower] + [combat] (6). If you succeed, take control of the Staff of the Serpent.

name: Allosaurus
text: Alert. Hunter. Massive. Retaliate. Allosaurus cannot be damaged or defeated. Forced - After a seal is placed on Allosaurus, if there are 4 seals on it: Remove each seal from Allosaurus and flip it over.

name: Allosaurus
text: Alert. Hunter. Massive. Retaliate. Allosaurus gets +2 [per_investigator] health. Forced - After Allosaurus enters your location: You must either take 1 direct damage and 1 direct horror, or Allosaurus defeats an [[Ally]] asset at your location.

name: Dromaeosaurus
text: Elusive. Hunter. Forced - After Dromaeosaurus engages you: You must either choose or discard 1 card from your hand, or Dromaeosaurus attacks you.

name: Primordial Terror
text: Revelation - Test [intellect] (3). For each point you fail by, take 1 horror. If you fail by 3 or more, search the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[Dinosaur]] and spawn it engaged with you. If the encounter deck was searched, shuffle it.

name: Unexpected Transformation
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (X), where X is the highest resource cost among non-story assets you control. If you fail, you must either discard that asset, or take 1 horror for each [willpower] and [intellect] skill icon on that asset and 1 damage for each [combat] and [agility] skill icon on that asset.

name: The Abominable Contessa
text: Each Possessed Extra gets +1 fight, +1 health, and gains elusive. Exhausted enemies cannot be damaged. Objective - When the round ends, if the Accursed Cape is in the victory display, advance.

name: Bloodbath
text: Each Possessed Extra gets +2 fight, +2 health, and gains patrol (The Contessa) and the [[Monster]] trait. [fast] Spend 1 clue: Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location. Objective - Finish her! If The Contessa is defeated, advance.

name: Castle Hallways
text: Haunted - Choose and discard 1 card with at least 1 [knowledge] skill icon from your hand. If you cannot, ready The Contessa and move her to this location. [fast] Spend 1 resource: Move to any revealed [[Castle]] location.

name: Catacombs
text: Haunted - Ready the nearest enemy. It moves and attacks as if it were the enemy phase. Forced - When an enemy would be defeated in the Catacombs: Instead, heal all damage from it, disengage it from each investigator, and exhaust it.

name: Clock Tower
text: Haunted - Choose and discard 1 card with at least 1 [agility] skill icon from your hand. If you cannot, take 2 damage. This location is investigated using [agility] instead of the skill indicated by the investigation attempt.

name: Moonlit Garden
text: Haunted - Heal 2 damage from the nearest enemy. If no damage was healed by this effect, ready The Contessa and move her to this location. [reaction] After you successfully evade a non-[[Elite]] enemy at Moonlit Garden by 2 or more: Move that enemy to a connecting location. (Group limit once per round.)

name: Throne of Blood
text: The Contessa cannot leave Throne of Blood. Forced - When you reveal this location: Search all in- and out-of-play areas for The Contessa and move her to Throne of Blood. Heal all damage from The Contessa and attach the set-aside Accursed Cape story asset to her. [fast] Spend 1 clue: Deal 1 damage to an enemy at Throne of Blood

name: The Contessa
text: Elusive. Prey - Most remaining health. Forced - After you evade The Contessa: Ready her. She cannot attack you for the rest of the round. Forced - When The Contessa moves via her elusive keyword: Move her to the Throne of Blood instead.

name: The Contessa
text: Elusive. While the Accursed Cape is attached to The Contessa, she gets +1 damage and gains hunter and retaliate.

name: Vampire Thrall
text: Elusive. Hunter. Prey - Least remaining health. Forced - After Vampire Thrall attacks: Heal 1 damage from it.

name: Werewolf
text: Elusive. Hunter. Retaliate Prey - Most remaining health. This enemy moves twice via its hunter keyword.

name: Hellfire
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (1) three times. For each of these skill tests you fail, take 1 damage.

name: Vampire's Kiss
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). This test gets +2 difficulty if you have 3 or fewer damage on you. If you fail, take 1 damage. For each point you fail by, heal 1 damage from the nearest eligible enemy.

name: The Blob That Ate Everything
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -1 for every 5 cards Subject 8L-08 has devoured. [cultist]: -2. If this token is revealed during an attack against an enemy, that enemy gains retaliate for this attack. [tablet]: -3. After this skill test ends, Subject 8L-08 devours each card that was committed to the test. [elder_thing]: -5. Choose up to 5 cards from your hand. Subject 8L-08 devours each of those cards. You get +1 skill value for this test for each card devoured in this way.

name: The Anomaly Spreads
text: Each location is connected to each location adjacent to it (orthogonally) .

name: The Anomaly Swells
text: Each location is connected to each location adjacent to it (orthogonally) .

name: The Anomaly Consumes
text: Each location is connected to each location adjacent to it (orthogonally) .

name: Expose the Anomaly
text: *This act has a global clue threshold (see page 6 of the rules for details) . Only clues on copies of this act among all groups contribute to the global clue threshold. [fast] Place up to 3 of your clues on this act. (Limit once per round.) Objective - At the start of the round, if the global clue threshold has been reached, you must advance. The event organizer will announce when this threshold has been reached. (Beware - advancing will expose the anomaly's weak spot. Be ready for a fight.)

name: Expose the Anomaly
text: Objective - At the start of the round, investigators may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance. (Beware - advancing will expose the anomaly's weak spot. Be ready for a fight.)

name: Extraterrestrial Physiology
text: Forced - After any amount of damage is placed on Vulnerable Heart: Place twice that much damage on Subject 8L-08 as well. [fast] While an investigator at your location is attacking Vulnerable Heart, spend 1 clue: That investigator gets +2 [combat] for this attack. Objective - At the end of the round, you must advance.

name: Blackwater's Bane
text: Each [[Ooze]] enemy gains retaliate and loses the Blob X keyword. Objective - At the end of the round, you must advance. (The scenario will not end when this act advances.)

name: Blackwater's Bane
text: Each [[Ooze]] enemy gains retaliate and loses the Blob X keyword. Objective - At the end of the round, you must advance. (The scenario will not end when this act advances.)

name: The Crater
text: [action] Spend 1 countermeasure: Deal 3 damage to Subject 8L-08 or a [[Manifold]] enemy at any location. Forced - At the end of the round: Each investigator at The Crater takes 1 damage.

name: Research Site
text: [action] Spend 2 clues: Gain 1 countermeasure. [action] Spend 1 countermeasure: Place 2 clues on Research Site (from the token pool) .

name: Temporary HQ
text: [action] Spend 1 countermeasure: Choose one - - Heal 3 damage. - Heal 3 horror. - Gain 5 resources. - Draw 3 cards.

name: Fungus Mound
text: [action] Spend 1 countermeasure: Choose a [[Mi-Go]] enemy at any location and test [intellect] (0). For each point you succeed by, deal 1 damage to the chosen enemy (to a maximum of 5).

name: Sewer
text: [action]: Test [intellect] (1). If you succeed, move to a location up to X connections away from Sewer, where X is the amount you succeeded by.

name: Bridge
text: [fast]: Choose an exhausted [[Manifold]] enemy at Bridge and test [intellect] (X), where X is that enemy's evade value. If you succeed, defeat the chosen enemy. (Max one success per game.)

name: Water Tower
text: [action] If there are no clues on Water Tower: Test [intellect] (3) to find the structure's weakness. If you succeed, deal 3 damage to each [[Ooze]] enemy at Water Tower and at each connecting location. (Max one success per game.)

name: Church
text: [action] If there are no clues on Church: Choose an [[Ooze]] enemy at Church, or a connecting location. Move the chosen enemy one location away from Church and automatically evade it. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Oozy Lakebed
text: Forced - After a [[Manifold]] enemy spawns at Oozy Lakebed: Place 1 clue on Oozy Lakebed. That enemy cannot take damage this round.

name: Slimy Streets
text: Forced - After you discover any number of clues from Slimy Streets: Reveal that many random tokens from the chaos bag. For each [skull] or [auto_fail] token revealed by this effect, take 1 damage or 1 horror.

name: Desiccated Farmland
text: While you are at Desiccated Farmland, you cannot gain resources. Forced - After you end your turn at Desiccated Farmland: Lose 1 resource.

name: Rescue the Chemist
text: Revelation - Spawn the set-aside Mi-Go Abductor at the Fungus Mound. Put the set-aside University Chemist asset into play at the location farthest from all investigators. Put this card into play, next to the act deck. Forced - After an investigator who controls University Chemist enters the Temporary HQ: Remember that "the chemist was saved." Flip this card over. Forced - If University Chemist is defeated or devoured: Remember that "the formula was not completed." Flip this card over.

name: Recover the Sample
text: Revelation - Spawn the set-aside Mi-Go Harvester at the Fungus Mound. Put the set-aside Meteorite Sample asset into play at The Crater. Put this card into play, next to the act deck. Forced - After an investigator who controls a Meteorite Sample enters the Research Site: Remember that "the sample was recovered." Flip this card over. Forced - If Meteorite Sample is attached to the Mi-Go Harvester and it is at the Fungus Mound: Remember that "the sample was lost." Flip this card over.

name: Drive Off the Mi-Go
text: Revelation - Spawn the set-aside Mi-Go General at the Fungus Mound. Place 1 [per_investigator] clues on the Fungus Mound. Put this card into play, next to the act deck. Forced - If Mi-Go General is defeated, or if there are no clues on the Fungus Mound: Remember that "the Mi-Go were driven off." Flip this card over. Forced - If there are 4 [per_investigator] or more clues on Fungus Mound: Remember that "the secret of the ooze was stolen." Flip this card over.

name: Defuse the Explosives
text: Revelation - Spawn the set-aside Mi-Go Meddler at the Fungus Mound. Put this card and the set-aside The Military's Plan asset into play next to the act deck, with 5 damage tokens on it. Place 1 horror token on 1 [per_investigator] different [[Oozified]] locations farthest from the Crater. Horror tokens on locations represent explosives. Forced - If there are no explosives among locations in play: Remember that "the explosives were defused." Flip this card over. Forced - If The Military's Plan has no damage on it: Remember that "the explosives were detonated." Flip this card over.

name: University Chemist
text: [action]: Parley. Test [willpower] or [intellect] (3). If you succeed, place 1 resource (from the token pool) on University Chemist. Then, if there are 1 [per_investigator] resources on it, take control of it.

name: Meteorite Sample
text: If uncontrolled and unattached, attach Meteorite Sample to its location. If attached to a location with no clues on it, Meteorite Sample gains: "[action] Test [willpower] or [agility] (6). If you succeed, detach Meteorite Sample and take control of it."

name: Mi-Go General
text: Hunter. Forced - After Mi-Go General attacks you: Move 1 of your clues to Fungus Mound.

name: The Military's Plan
text: Horror tokens on locations represent explosives. Each location with explosives gains: "[action]: Test [intellect] or [agility] (3). If you succeed, remove the horror token on this location." Forced - At the end of the round: Remove 1 damage from this card.

name: Universal Solvent
text: Uses (4 supplies). [action] Spend 1 supply: Test [intellect] (1). If you succeed, discard an [[Obstacle]] treachery at your location. [action] Spend 1 supply: Choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location and test [intellect] (X), where X is 1 more than that enemy's remaining health. If you succeed, that enemy is defeated. Does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Pet Oozeling
text: [fast] Defeat a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location with 2 or less remaining health. Then, heal all damage from Pet Oozeling, place 1 resource on it, and reveal X chaos tokens, where X is the number of resources on it. If an [auto_fail] symbol is revealed, you are defeated and suffer 1 physical trauma.

name: Mi-Go Weapon
text: Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. The device fires a blast of entropic energy. You get +2 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack. If you succeed and the enemy is not defeated, move it one location away from you. (If you succeed by 3 or more, deal +1 damage and move the enemy an additional location away.)

name: Lt. Wilson Stewart
text: [fast] Exhaust Lt. Wilson Stewart: Discard a card from your hand or from the top of your deck. Then, for each... ...[willpower] icon on that card, get +1 for your next test this round. ...[intellect] icon on that card, draw 1 card. ...[combat] icon on that card, heal 1 damage or horror from him. ...[agility] icon on that card, gain 1 resource.

name: Mi-Go Drone
text: Spawn - Location with the most clues (other than Fungus Mound). Surge. Forced - At the start of the enemy phase, if Mi-Go Drone is ready: Move 1 clue from Mi-Go Drone's location to Fungus Mound.

name: Mi-Go Harvester
text: While Mi-Go Harvester is ready, it gains: " Forced - At the start of the enemy phase: If Meteorite Sample is attached to Mi-Go Harvester, move it once toward the Fungus Mound. Otherwise, move Mi-Go Harvester once toward Meteorite Sample's location. Then, if it is at the same location as Meteorite Sample, attach Meteorite Sample to it."

name: Mi-Go Meddler
text: While Mi-Go Meddler is ready, it gains: " Forced - At the start of the enemy phase: If Mi-Go Meddler is at a location with explosives, remove 1 damage from The Military's Plan. Otherwise, move Mi-Go Meddler once toward a location with explosives."

name: Mi-Go Abductor
text: While Mi-Go Abductor is ready, it gains: " Forced - At the start of the enemy phase: If Mi-Go Abductor is at University Chemist's location, deal 1 direct damage to University Chemist. Otherwise, move Mi-Go Abductor once toward University Chemist's location."

name: Subject 8L-08
text: *Subject 8L-08 has a global health pool (see page 6 of the rules for details) . If Subject 8L-08 is defeated, proceed to (→R2) .

name: Subject 8L-08
text: Subject 8L-08 gets +15 health. If Subject 8L-08 is defeated, proceed to (→R2) .

name: Oozeling
text: Spawn - Any empty [[Oozified]] location. Blob 1.

name: Grasping Ooze
text: Spawn - Nearest [[Oozified]] location. Hunter. Forced - After you perform an attack against Grasping Ooze using a [[Melee]] card: Subject 8L-08 devours that card. Blob 3.

name: Cubic Ooze
text: Revelation - Immediately attempt to evade Cubic Ooze (without spending an action) . If you fail, spawn Cubic Ooze engaged with you, and it attacks you. If you succeed, spawn Cubic Ooze at your location, exhausted and unengaged. Blob 2.

name: Oozewraith
text: Spawn - Farthest [[Oozified]] location. Alert. Hunter. Retaliate. Blob 5.

name: Vulnerable Heart
text: Massive. Retaliate. X is the amount of damage on Vulnerable Heart. Vulnerable Heart cannot be evaded and cannot make attacks of opportunity. Vulnerable Heart cannot have more than 15 damage on it. All excess damage is canceled.

name: Reality Acid
text: Revelation - Subject 8L-08 devours a random aspect of reality. Reveal two random chaos tokens from the chaos bag and consult pages 16-19 of the rules to determine what it devoured. (If the combination of chaos tokens revealed is not listed, or if the listed aspect cannot be devoured, reveal two new chaos tokens and consult the chart again.)

name: Devouring Ooze
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (4). If you fail, choose an [[Ally]] or [[Item]] asset you control. Subject 8L-08 devours that asset. (If you cannot, take 2 damage instead.)

name: Corrosive Slime
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (4). For each point you fail by, Subject 8L-08 devours either one of your resources or a random card from your hand.

name: Consuming Maw
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (3). Take 1 damage for each point you fail by. Subject 8L-08 devours each card defeated by this effect.

name: Wave of Ooze
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). Take 1 horror for each point you fail by. Subject 8L-08 devours each card defeated by this effect.

name: Caustic Dissemination
text: Revelation - Put Caustic Dissemination into play next to the agenda deck. Forced - At the end of the round: Each investigator at an [[Oozified]] location takes 1 damage and 1 horror. Subject 8L-08 devours each card defeated by this effect. Discard Caustic Dissemination. (Max once per round.)

name: Sticky Feet
text: Revelation - Attach to the nearest [[Oozified]] location. As an additional cost to enter or leave attached location, an investigator must spend an action. [action] Spend 1 countermeasure: Discard Sticky Feet.

name: Replication
text: Revelation - Find the [[Manifold]] enemy with the most damage on it. Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until another [[Manifold]] enemy with equal or lower printed health is discarded. Spawn that enemy at the same location, then distribute the damage that is on both enemies so that the remaining health on both enemies is as equal as possible. If no enemy is spawned by this effect, Replication gains surge.

name: "It's got me!"
text: Revelation - Put "It's got me!" into play in your threat area. Forced - At the end of the round: Place 1 resource on "It's got me!" Then, if there are 6 or more resources on it, Subject 8L-08 devours you. [action] If you are at the Research Site, spend 1 countermeasure: Discard "It's got me!"

name: Alien Food Chain
text: Revelation - If there are no [[Manifold]] enemies in play, Alien Food Chain gains surge. Otherwise, attach to the [[Manifold]] enemy with the least remaining health and fully heal that enemy. Attached enemy gets +1 fight, +1 evade, and gains hunter.

name: The Midwinter Gala
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the current agenda number. [cultist]: -X. X is the number of [[Guest]] assets at your location (to a maximum of 5). [tablet]: -2. (-4 instead if you are at a [[Private]] location). [elder_thing]: -3. If you fail or if The Bloodless Man is at your location, take 1 horror.

name: Masked Revelers
text: Each [[Lantern Club]] enemy cannot be dealt damage. Doom cannot be removed from this agenda by card effects. Forced - When a single-sided [[Guest]] asset would leave play: It becomes spellbound instead (flip it facedown, lose control of it, and heal all damage and horror from it) .

name: Unexpected Guests
text: Parley abilities on each [[Lantern Club]] enemy cannot be triggered. Doom cannot be removed from this agenda by card effects. Forced - When a single-sided [[Guest]] asset would leave play: It becomes spellbound instead (flip it facedown, lose control of it, and heal all damage and horror from it) .

name: A Killer Party
text: Parley abilities on each [[Lantern Club]] enemy cannot be triggered. Doom cannot be removed from this agenda by card effects. Forced - When a single-sided [[Guest]] asset would leave play: It becomes spellbound instead (flip it facedown, lose control of it, and heal all damage and horror from it) .

name: Meet and Greet
text: [[Guest]] assets do not take up ally slots. [action] Choose a [[Guest]] asset and a skill icon on it at your location: Parley. Test that skill (3). If you succeed, take control of that asset. [action] If you control a [[Guest]] asset: Give control of it to another investigator at your location. Objective - If each undefeated investigator controls a [[Guest]] asset and the current agenda is 2a or 3a, they may spend the requisite amount of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: Finding the Jewel
text: [[Guest]] assets do not take up ally slots. [action] Choose a [[Guest]] asset and a skill icon on it at your location: Parley. Test that skill (3). If you succeed, take control of that asset. Objective - Complete the objective on your faction story card, and try to accomplish as many tasks as you can (see page 24 of the rulebook) .

name: Lobby
text: [fast] If the current agenda is 2a or 3a, spend 1 [per_investigator] resources: Someone is fashionably late. Reveal the top card of the Guest deck and put it into play at this location. (Group limit once per round.)

name: Lantern Chamber
text: [fast] During your turn, name a card: Draw the top card of the encounter deck. If it is the named card, cancel its effects and discard it. Discover 1 clue at this location. (Limit once per turn.) [action] If this location has no clues: Test [willpower] (4). If you succeed, flip over any spellbound card.

name: Art Gallery
text: [action]: There's more to be discovered in this room full of strange works of art. Place up to 2 clues (from the token pool) on this location. Gain 2 resources. (Group limit once per round.)

name: Ballroom
text: [action]: Parley. You persuade two of the guests to have a dance. Exhaust 2 [[Guest]] assets at this location. Then, heal 1 horror from each of them.

name: Barroom
text: [fast] Spend 1 resource: Buy a drink! Heal 1 damage or 1 horror from an investigator or [[Guest]] asset at this location. (Group limit once per round.)

name: Bedroom
text: [action] Choose an enemy at any [[Second Floor]] location: Fight. You may use [agility] instead of [combat] for this attack. If you succeed, you may spend 1 clue for this attack to deal +2 damage. (Limit once per turn.)

name: Library
text: You get +1 skill value while parleying at this location. [fast] If the Jewel of Sarnath is at this location: Test [intellect] (3). If you succeed, either place 1 damage on the Jewel of Sarnath or remove 1 token from it. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Parlor
text: This location gets -1 shroud for each [[Guest]] asset at it (to a minimum of 1 shroud). [fast] If you control the Jewel of Sarnath: Exhaust an enemy at any location. (Group limit once per game.)

name: The Foundation [guardian]
text: Forced - When The Bloodless Man (Unleashed) is defeated: If the Jewel of Sarnath is attached to him, attach it to his location. [action] If the Jewel of Sarnath is at your location and The Bloodless Man is not in play: Take control of the Jewel of Sarnath and place 1 damage on it. Objective - At the end of the round, if the investigators control the Jewel of Sarnath, they may spend 2 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to advance the act. End of game scoring: 4 points if no non-weakness enemies are in play (2 points instead if exactly one non-weakness enemy is in play).

name: The Foundation [guardian]
text: Setup: Shuffle the set-aside Rookie Cop enemy into the encounter deck. Put the set-aside Valeriya Antonova card into play at the lead investigator's location, enemy side faceup. [action] If Valeriya Antonova is at your location: Parley. Test [combat] (3). If you succeed, place 1 of your clues on this story card. Forced - When there are 1 plus 1 [per_investigator] clues on this story card: Add it and Valeriya Antonova to the victory display. Search the encounter deck, encounter discard pile, and all play areas for Rookie Cop and remove it from the game. If the encounter deck was searched, shuffle it.

name: Valeriya Antonova
text: You get +1 [combat]. [action] Exhaust Valeriya Antonova: Ready another [[Guest]] asset at your location. You get +1 to your next skill test this round for each [[Guest]] asset at your location. Forced - When Valeriya Antonova leaves play: Remove her from the game.

name: Valeriya Antonova
text: Aloof. Hunter. Valeriya Antonova cannot be damaged. Each investigator at this location gets -1 to each of their skills if they control an exhausted [[Guest]] asset. Forced - When the round ends: Exhaust each [[Guest]] asset at this location.

name: Archibald Hudson
text: [fast] During your turn, exhaust Archibald Hudson: Search the top 9 cards of the encounter deck for an enemy, draw it, and shuffle the encounter deck. Then, exhaust that enemy and gain 3 resources. [action] Spend 1 resource: Move 1 damage from an asset at your location to a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location.

name: Special Agent Callahan
text: [action]: Fight. Reduce the difficulty of this test by 1. [reaction] After you trigger an [action] ability on an [[Ally]] or [[Weapon]] asset, exhaust Special Agent Callahan: Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location.

name: Horacio Martinez
text: While you control Horacio Martinez, he may be assigned damage dealt to other investigators at your location. [reaction] After a non-[[Elite]] enemy attacks you, exhaust Horacio Martinez: Exhaust that enemy and it cannot ready this round (do not disengage from it) .

name: Rookie Cop
text: Surge. Aloof. Hunter. Forced - After an investigator at this location attacks another enemy: Deal 1 damage to that investigator.

name: Miskatonic University [seeker]
text: Declan Pearce cannot be damaged or leave play while the Jewel of Sarnath is attached to him. [action] If Declan Pearce is at your location: Parley. Place up to 2 of your clues on Declan Pearce. Then, if 3 [per_investigator] or more clues are on him, take control of the Jewel of Sarnath and add Declan Pearce to the victory display. Objective - At the end of the round, if the investigators control the Jewel of Sarnath, they may advance the act. End of game scoring: 1 point per 2 [per_investigator] total cards in hand among all investigators (to a maximum of 4 points).

name: Miskatonic University [seeker]
text: Setup: Shuffle the set-aside Confusion treachery into the encounter deck. Put the set-aside Caldwell Philips card into play at the lead investigator's location, enemy side faceup. [action] If Caldwell Philips is at your location: Parley. Test [intellect] (3). If you succeed, place 1 of your clues on this story card. Forced - When there are 1 plus 1 [per_investigator] clues on this story card: Add it and Caldwell Philips to the victory display. Search the encounter deck and discard pile for Confusion and remove it from the game. Shuffle the encounter deck.

name: Caldwell Philips
text: You get +1 [intellect]. [reaction] After you discover 1 or more clues, exhaust Caldwell Philips: Draw that number of cards (to a maximum of 3). Forced - When Caldwell Philips leaves play: Remove him from the game.

name: Caldwell Philips
text: Aloof. Hunter. Caldwell Philips cannot be damaged. Forced - When you end your turn at this location: Choose and discard a non-weakness card from your hand.

name: Dr. Mya Badry
text: Your maximum hand size is increased by 2. [action] Exhaust Dr. Mya Badry: Investigate. Your base [intellect] value for this investigation is equal to the number of cards in your hand.

name: Lucas Tetlow
text: [reaction] After the last clue is discovered at your location, exhaust Lucas Tetlow: Search the top 9 cards of your deck for an [[Item]] asset and draw it. If it is a [[Relic]], gain 2 resources. If it is a [[Tome]], you may play it (paying its cost) . If it is a [[Tool]], discover 1 clue at a connecting location. Shuffle your deck.

name: Elizabeth Conrad
text: [reaction] After you draw a card during your turn, exhaust Elizabeth Conrad: Choose an investigator at your location to move to a connecting location.

name: Confusion
text: Surge. Confusion cannot be canceled. Revelation - Place 2 of your clues on your location. For each clue you cannot place, take 1 horror.

name: The Syndicate [rogue]
text: [action] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues: Look at a mystery (a facedown card) beneath your location. [fast] During your turn, if there are 1 [per_investigator] or fewer clues on a location with a mystery: Draw that mystery. Objective - Find the Jewel of Sarnath and escape. At the end of the round, if an investigator at the Lobby controls the Jewel of Sarnath, the investigators may spend 4 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to advance the act. End of game scoring: 1 point per 3 [per_investigator] resources among all investigators (to a maximum of 4 points).

name: The Syndicate [rogue]
text: Setup: Shuffle the set-aside Cold Streak treachery into the encounter deck. Put the set-aside Johnny Valone card into play at the lead investigator's location, enemy side faceup. [action] If Johnny Valone is at your location: Parley. Test [agility] (3). If you succeed, place 1 of your clues on this story card. Forced - When there are 1 plus 1 [per_investigator] clues on this story card: Add it and Johnny Valone to the victory display. Search the encounter deck and discard pile for Cold Streak and remove it from the game. Shuffle the encounter deck.

name: Johnny Valone
text: You get +1 [agility]. [reaction] After you gain 1 or more resources via a card effect, exhaust Johnny Valone: Draw 1 card and gain 1 resource. Forced - When Johnny Valone leaves play: Remove him from the game.

name: Johnny Valone
text: Aloof. Hunter. Johnny Valone cannot be damaged. Forced - When you end your turn at Johnny Valone's location: Lose 2 resources.

name: Miranda Keeper
text: Uses (3 supplies). [fast] Spend 1 supply: Place 1 resource on your location, as an antiquity. You get +2 to your next skill test this round. [reaction] After you succeed at a skill test by 2 or more, remove an antiquity from your location: Gain 2 resources.

name: Arsène Renard
text: [fast]: Place 1 resource on each location, as an antiquity. (Group limit once per game.) [fast]: If there is an exhausted enemy at your location, remove an antiquity from your location: Either draw 1 card or gain 2 resources.

name: Nova Malone
text: [action] Exhaust Nova Malone: Fight. Your base [combat] value for this fight is equal to the number of resources in your resource pool (to a maximum of 7). This attack deals +1 damage. [reaction] After you defeat an enemy: Gain 1 resource. (Limit once per round.)

name: Cold Streak
text: Surge. Cold Streak cannot be canceled. Revelation - Lose 4 resources. For each resource you cannot lose, take either 1 damage or 1 horror.

name: Silver Twilight Lodge [mystic]
text: [action]: You try to sense the Jewel's presence. Discard the top card of the encounter deck. You may draw that card. (Group limit twice per round.) Objective - Find the Jewel of Sarnath. At the end of the round, if the investigators control the Jewel of Sarnath, they may spend 5 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to advance the act. End of game scoring: 1 point for each treachery with no victory points in the victory display (to a maximum of 4 points).

name: Silver Twilight Lodge [mystic]
text: Setup: Shuffle the set-aside Ward of Preservation treachery into the encounter deck. Put the set-aside Carl Sanford card into play at the lead investigator's location, enemy side faceup. [action] If Carl Sanford is at your location: Parley. Test [willpower] (3). If you succeed, place 1 of your clues on this story card. Forced - When there are 1 plus 1 [per_investigator] clues on this story card: Add it and Carl Sanford to the victory display. Search the encounter deck, encounter discard pile, and all play areas for Ward of Preservation and remove it from the game. Shuffle the encounter deck.

name: Carl Sanford
text: You get +1 [willpower]. You have one additional arcane slot. [reaction] After a revelation effect on a non-weakness treachery is canceled, exhaust Carl Sanford: Add that treachery to the victory display. Draw 1 card. Forced - When Carl Sanford leaves play: Remove him from the game.

name: Carl Sanford
text: Aloof. Hunter. Carl Sanford cannot be damaged. Each investigator at this location gets -1 [willpower].

name: Prudence Douglas
text: Uses (3 portents). [fast] During your turn, spend 1 portent and exhaust Prudence Douglas: Look at the top 4 cards of the encounter deck. Discard up to 2 non-[[Elite]] cards from among them and put the rest back on top in any order.

name: Sarah Van Shaw
text: [action] Spend up to 2 resources and exhaust Sarah Van Shaw: Fight. Add your [willpower] value to your skill value for this attack. For each resource spent, this attack deals +1 damage.

name: Raymond Loggins
text: Uses (4 truths). [reaction] When you draw a non-weakness treachery, spend 1 truth: Cancel that card's revelation effect and discard it. Then, take 1 horror.

name: Ward of Preservation
text: Surge. Ward of Preservation cannot be canceled. Revelation - Put Ward of Preservation into play in your threat area. Forced - When you play an event: Cancel its effects and take 1 horror. Then, discard Ward of Preservation.

name: Locals of Kingsport [survivor]
text: Forced - When Declan Pearce is defeated: Attach the Jewel of Sarnath to his location. [action] If the Jewel of Sarnath is attached to your location: You attempt to purge the corruption from the Jewel. Test [combat] or [agility] (3). If you succeed, remove 1 token from it. You may take control of it. Objective - At the end of the round, if the investigators control the Jewel of Sarnath and it has no tokens on it, they may spend 3 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to advance the act. End of game scoring: 4 points, minus 1 point for each card in the guest deck (to a minimum of 0 points).

name: Locals of Kingsport [survivor]
text: Setup: Shuffle the set-aside Unlucky treachery into the encounter deck. Put the set-aside William Bain card into play at the lead investigator's location, enemy side faceup. [action] If William Bain is at your location: Parley. Test any skill (4). If you succeed, place 1 of your clues on this story card. Forced - When there are 1 plus 1 [per_investigator] clues on this story card: Add it and William Bain to the victory display. Search the encounter deck, encounter discard pile, and all play areas for Unlucky and remove it from the game. Shuffle the encounter deck.

name: William Bain
text: While there are 1 or more cards committed to a skill test you are performing, you get +1 to each of your skills. [reaction] After you commit 1 or more cards to a skill test, spend 1 [per_investigator] resources and exhaust William Bain: Reveal the top card of the Guest deck and put it into play at the Lobby. Forced - When William Bain leaves play: Remove him from the game.

name: William Bain
text: Aloof. Hunter. William Bain cannot be damaged. Each investigator at this location cannot commit cards to skill tests.

name: Delores Gadling
text: While investigating and parleying, you get +1 [intellect] for each [[Humanoid]] enemy at your location. You may ignore each attack of opportunity made by [[Humanoid]], non-[[Elite]] enemies against you.

name: Thomas Olney
text: [fast] Name a [[Trait]] and exhaust Thomas Olney: Discard the top card of the encounter deck. If that card has the named [[Trait]], gain 2 resources. [fast] During a skill test at your location, exhaust Thomas Olney: Discard the top card of your deck. You may commit that card to this skill test, if able.

name: Claire Wilson
text: [reaction] After you commit 1 or more cards to a skill test you are performing, exhaust Claire Wilson: You get +1 skill value for this test.

name: Unlucky
text: Surge. Unlucky cannot be canceled. Revelation - Put Unlucky into play in your threat area. You get -2 to each of your skills. Forced - When the round ends: Discard Unlucky.

name: The Bloodless Man
text: Aloof. Patrol (nearest location with a [[Guest]]). Forced - When this enemy is defeated: Instead flip him over, exhaust him, and heal all but 3 [per_investigator] damage from him. Forced - When the investigation phase ends, if this enemy is ready: Deal 1 horror to each investigator and [[Guest]] asset at this location. If The Pale Lantern is attached to this enemy, each [[Guest]] asset at this location becomes spellbound.

name: The Bloodless Man
text: Hunter. Massive. Forced - After this enemy attacks you: Remove a [[Guest]] asset you control from the game, ignoring the agenda's Forced effect.

name: The Pale Lantern
text: [action] If The Bloodless Man has 1 or more damage on him or is in the victory display: Test [combat] or [agility] (3). If you succeed, take control of The Pale Lantern and flip it over. Any investigator at this location may trigger this ability. Forced - When The Pale Lantern would leave play: Attach it to its location instead.

name: The Pale Lantern
text: [action]: Flip over a spellbound card at your location. [action] Exhaust The Pale Lantern: Test [combat] or [agility] (2). If you succeed, place 1 damage on it. Then, if there is 4 damage on it, you break it; add it to the victory display (ignoring its Forced effect) and flip over each spellbound card. Forced - When The Pale Lantern would leave play: Flip it over and attach it to its location instead.

name: Enraged Gug
text: Alert. Hunter. Horror dealt by this enemy must be assigned to [[Guest]] assets you control, if able.

name: Abhorrent Moon-Beast
text: Hunter. Retaliate. Damage dealt by this enemy must be assigned to [[Guest]] assets you control, if able.

name: Savage Shantak
text: Hunter. Savage Shantak gets +1 fight and +1 evade for each [[Guest]] asset at its location.

name: Vicious Ambush
text: Revelation - If no [[Monster]] enemies are in play, Vicious Ambush gains surge. Otherwise, the nearest [[Monster]] enemy readies, moves (one location at a time) until it reaches your location, engages you, and makes an immediate attack.

name: Declan Pearce
text: Hunter. Declan Pearce gets +2 [per_investigator] health. While Declan Pearce is engaged with you, you get 1 fewer action during your turn. Forced - At the end of the enemy phase, if Declan Pearce is ready: Heal 1 damage from each enemy in play.

name: Jewel of Sarnath
text: Revelation - Put Jewel of Sarnath into play under your control with 3 damage and 1 doom on it. Forced - When Jewel of Sarnath leaves play: Shuffle it into the encounter deck. [fast] Exhaust Jewel of Sarnath: Test [willpower] or [agility] (1). If you succeed, move 1 token on it to an enemy at your location.

name: Lantern Club Member
text: [action] Spend 1 resource: Parley. Automatically evade this enemy (you may spend 2 additional resources to discard it instead).

name: Bleeding Walls
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (X). X is the shroud value of your location. If you fail, lose 1 action and take 1 horror.

name: Entrap
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (3). If you fail and... - ...The Bloodless Man is at your location, a [[Guest]] asset you control becomes spellbound. - ...The Bloodless Man is at another location, he readies, moves (one location at a time) until he reaches your location, and engages you. - ...The Bloodless Man is not in play, Entrap gains surge.

name: Inexplicable Cold
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (4). For each point you fail by, you must choose one: - Choose and discard 1 card from your play area. - Choose and discard 1 card from your hand. - Take 1 damage.

name: Mind Extraction
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (X). X is 1 plus the current agenda number. If you fail, take 2 horror. Then, if The Bloodless Man is in play and an investigator controls The Pale Lantern, flip it over and attach it to The Bloodless Man (leaving all tokens on it) .

name: Noxious Fumes
text: Revelation - In player order, each investigator at your location must choose: - Test [agility] (3) to attempt to flee before the gas fills the room. If you succeed, move to a connecting location. If you fail, take 2 damage. - Test [combat] (3) to attempt to hold your breath. For each point you fail by, take 1 damage.

name: Pushed into the Beyond
text: Revelation - Choose and shuffle a non-story asset you control into its owner's deck. Discard the top 3 cards of that deck. If a copy of that asset is discarded, take 2 horror.

name: Secret Door
text: Revelation - Attach to the location with the most investigators, and without a Secret Door attached. Investigators cannot leave this location. [action]: Test [willpower] (3) to search for the passage or [intellect] (3) to discern the way out. If you succeed, discard Secret Door.

name: Terror Gate
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (2). This test gets +2 difficulty if a [[Rival]] enemy is in play. If you fail and you allied with... - ...the [guardian] faction, take 2 damage. - ...the [seeker] faction, discard 2 cards from your hand. - ...the [rogue] faction, lose 3 resources. - ...the [mystic] faction, take 2 horror. - ...the [survivor] faction, lose 1 action.

name: Violent Commands
text: Revelation - Put Violent Commands into play in your threat area. [action]: Deal 2 damage to an investigator at your location and discard Violent Commands. Forced - At the end of your turn: Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, take 1 horror.

name: Curse of the Rougarou
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -2 (-4 instead if you are at a [[Bayou]] location). [cultist]: -2. If the Rougarou is in your location, reveal another token. [tablet]: Reveal another token. If you fail, until the end of the round, you cannot move. [elder_thing]: -4. If the Rougarou is at your location, it attacks you.

name: The Curse Spreads
text: Forced - At the end of the investigation phase, if The Rougarou is not engaged with an investigator: Add 1 doom to this agenda.

name: Finding Lady Esprit
text: Objective - Only investigators at a [[Bayou]] location may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: Hunting the Rougarou
text: Forced - After The Rougarou leaves a location: Place 1 clue from the token bank on that location. Objective - "We have to destroy the beast!" If The Rougarou is defeated: ( →R2 ) Objective - "Maybe there's another way..." While an investigator is engaged with The Rougarou, he or she may choose to advance. (Limit once per phase.)

name: Cursed Shores
text: [action]: Take 1 damage. You get +2 to your skill value for the next skill test you make this turn. Forced - When you leave Cursed Shores: Choose and discard a skill card from your hand.

name: Garden District
text: [action]: Test [agility] (7) to try to break into a nearby greenhouse and take a look around. If you succeed, remember that the investigators have "found a strange doll."

name: Broadmoor
text: [action]: Resign. "We can't catch the beast!" You make your way to safety, letting the beast roam free.

name: Brackish Waters
text: While you are at Brackish Waters, you cannot play assets. [action] Discard 2 assets from your hand or from play: Test [agility] (3) to wade through the dark waters and retrieve an abandoned fishing net. If you succeed, take control of the set-aside Fishing Net asset.

name: Audubon Park
text: Forced - When you evade an enemy at Audubon Park: Discard a random card from your hand.

name: Faubourg Marigny
text: While you are at Fauborg Marigny, reduce the cost of each asset you play by 1. [action]: Resign. "We can't catch the beast!" You make your way to safety, letting the beast roam free.

name: Forgotten Marsh
text: Forced - When you leave Forgotten Marsh: Lose 2 resources.

name: Trapper's Cabin
text: While you are at Trapper's Cabin, you cannot gain resources. [action] Spend 5 resources: Test [intellect] (3) to convince an old trapper to sell you his last bear trap. If you succeed, take control of the set-aside Bear Trap asset.

name: Twisted Underbrush
text: [action]: Gain 2 resources and take 1 horror.

name: Foul Swamp
text: While you are at Foul Swamp, you cannot heal horror or cancel horror. [action] Take up to 3 horror: Test [willpower] (7) to search the boneyard. You get +1 [willpower] for this test for each horror taken as part of this ability's cost. If you succeed, remember that the investigators have "found an ancient binding stone."

name: Ritual Grounds
text: Forced - After you end your turn at Ritual Grounds: Draw 1 card and take 1 horror.

name: Overgrown Cairns
text: [action] Spend 2 resources: Heal 2 horror. (Limit once per game.)

name: Lady Esprit
text: [action] Exhaust Lady Esprit and deal her 1 horror: Heal 2 damage or gain 2 resources. Any investigator at Lady Esprit's location may activate this ability.

name: Bear Trap
text: [fast]: Attach Bear Trap to your location. Forced - After The Rougarou enters attached location: Attach Bear Trap to The Rougarou. Attached enemy gets -1 fight and -1 evade.

name: Fishing Net
text: [fast] If The Rougarou is exhausted and at your location: Attach Fishing Net to The Rougarou. Attached enemy loses retaliate.

name: Bog Gator
text: Prey - Lowest [agility]. While Bog Gator is at a [[Bayou]] location, it gets +2 fight and +2 evade.

name: Swamp Leech
text: Spawn - Any [[Bayou]] location. Swamp Leech cannot be evaded. Forced - When Swamp Leech enters a non-[[Bayou]] location: Discard it.

name: Cursed Swamp
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). For each point you fail by, take 1 damage. If you are at a [[Bayou]] location, you cannot commit cards to this skill test.

name: Spectral Mist
text: Revelation - Attach to a [[Bayou]] location. Limit 1 per location. Each skill test performed at attached location gets +1 difficulty. [action]: Test [intellect] (2) to disrupt the source of the mist. If you succeed, discard Spectral Mist.

name: Dragged Under
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (3). If you fail, add Dragged Under to your threat area. Forced - When you leave your current location: take 2 damage and discard Dragged Under. Forced - At the end of your turn: Test [agility] (3). If you succeed, discard Dragged Under.

name: Ripples on the Surface
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). For each point you fail by, take 1 horror. If you are at a [[Bayou]] location, you cannot commit cards to this skill test.

name: The Rougarou
text: Aloof. Retaliate. As an additional cost for an investigator to engage The Rougarou, the investigators must spend 1 clue, as a group (2 clues instead if there are 3 or 4 investigators). Forced - After The Rougarou takes 1 [per_investigator] damage during a single phase: Find the location that is farthest from all investigator. Move The Rougarou (one location at a time) until it enters that location.

name: Curse of the Rougarou
text: Revelation - Put Curse of the Rougarou into play in your threat area. Forced - At the end of your turn, if you have not dealt any damage this turn: Take 1 horror.

name: Monstrous Transformation
text: Fast. Set the base value of your [willpower] and [intellect] to 2. Set the base value of your [combat] and [agility] to 5. [action] Exhaust Monstrous Transformation: Fight. You deal +1 damage for this attack.

name: Slime-Covered Dhole
text: Spawn - Any non-[[Bayou]] location. Prey - Lowest remaining health. Hunter. Forced - When Slime-Covered Dhole enters a location: Each investigator at that location takes 1 horror.

name: Marsh Gug
text: Spawn - Any [[Bayou]] location. Hunter.

name: Dark Young Host
text: Spawn - Any [[Bayou]] location. Forced - When 1 or more clues are placed on Dark Young Host's location: Place those clues on Dark Young Host. Forced - When Dark Young Host is defeated: Move all clues on Dark Young Host to its location.

name: On the Prowl
text: Surge. Revelation - Find a non-[[Bayou]] location with the fewest clues on it. Move The Rougarou (one location at a time) until it enters that location.

name: Beast of the Bayou
text: Revelation - The Rougarou makes an immediate attack against each investigator at The Rougarou's location and each connecting location. If no attacks were made by this effect, place 1 doom on the current agenda.

name: Insatiable Bloodlust
text: Revelation - Attach to The Rougarou. The Rougarou gets +1 fight, +1 damage, +1 horror, and cannot be evaded. Forced - After The Rougarou takes damage: Discard Insatiable Bloodlust.

name: Subject 5U-21
text: You begin the game with Ravenous (Controlled Hunger) in play. During each upkeep phase, draw 1 additional card and devour a non-weakness player card in your hand. [fast]: Devour a non-story card controlled by an investigator at your location. (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +2. After this test ends, you may add a devoured card to its owner's hand.

name: Ravenous
text: Subject 5U-21 deck only. Permanent. Each time you devour a card, place it facedown beneath Ravenous. You get +1 to each of your skills for each card beneath Ravenous (max +5). Forced - If there are 5 or more cards beneath Ravenous: Flip it over.

name: Ravenous
text: Subject 5U-21 deck only. Permanent. Each time you devour a card, set it aside, out of play. You get +1 to each of your skills for each card beneath Ravenous (max +5). Forced - At the end of your turn: Devour a non-story card beneath Ravenous or controlled by an investigator at your location. If there is nothing beneath Ravenous, flip it over.

name: Regurgitation
text: Subject 5U-21 deck only. Fast. Play only during your turn. If Ravenous (Uncontrolled Hunger) is face up, flip it over. Choose and return up to 3 cards you devoured (beneath Ravenous or set-aside) to their owners' hands. For each card returned in this way, heal 1 damage or 1 horror.

name: Reality Acid
text: Revelation - If Ravenous (Controlled Hunger) is face up, flip it over. You devour a random aspect of reality. Reveal a random chaos token from the chaos bag and consult Reality Acid reference card to determine what you devoured.

name: Reality Acid
text: Subject 5U-21 Devours... (If the chaos token revealed is not listed, or if the listed aspect cannot be devoured, reveal a new chaos token and consult the list again.) - [elder_sign]: ...a non-[[Elite]] enemy or treachery, at your location and worth no victory points. - +1 : ...the top card of each investigator's discard pile. - 0 : ...the top card of each investigator's deck. - -1 : ...1 card at random from your hand. - -2 : ...a non-story, non-weakness asset controlled by an investigator at your location. - -3 : ...a player card attached to your location, or attached to an encounter card at your location. - -4 : ...the top 2 cards of each investigator's deck. - -5 : ...-3 cards of your choice from your hand.

name: Reality Acid
text: - -6 : ...all events from each investigator's hand. - -7 : ...a non-story, non-weakness asset from each investigator's play area. - -8 : ...a non-weakness siganture card in any player's deck, hand, discard pile, or play area. - [skull]: ...1 card beneath Ravenous, at random. - [cultist]: ...each card committed to each skill test at your location (after the test ends) , until the end of the next investigation phase. - [tablet]: ...each event played by investigators at your location, until the end of the next investigation phase. - [elder_thing]: ...the player card at your location with the most evidence, supplies, ammo, charges, or secrets on it. - [auto_fail]: Reveal 3 more chaos tokens and resolve each of those devour effects.

name: Carnevale of Horrors
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -2. This token has an additional -1 for each Innocent Reveler underneath the agenda deck. [cultist]: Reveal another token. If you fail this test, draw the top card of the encounter deck. [tablet]: -3. If you fail, deal 1 damage or 1 horror to the nearest Innocent Reveler in play. [elder_thing]: -4. If you fail and Cnidathqua is in play, it attacks you.

name: Baleful Reveler
text: Spawn - The nearest location with no investigators counter-clockwise from the lead investigator. Hunter. Retaliate. Forced - After Baleful Reveler moves from the hunter keyword, reveal a random token from the chaos bag. If you reveal a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol, resolve its hunter keyword again. (Limit once per round.)

name: Chaos at the Carnevale
text: Forced - After a Writhing Appendage enters play: Place 2 doom on it.

name: The Carnevale Conspiracy
text: [action] The investigators spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Look at the other side of a Masked Carnevale-Goer at any location. Objective - If there are a total of 3 Innocent Revelers underneath the act and/or agenda decks, advance.

name: Get to the Boats!
text: Forced - After the mythos phase begins: Choose a Masked Carnevale-Goer in play and flip it to its other side. Objective - If each undefeated investigator is at Canal-side, advance.

name: Gondola
text: Revelation - Put Gondola into play and move each investigator to it. Then, remove all other locations from the game. Remove from the game each enemy and asset at those locations, as well. [action]: Test [combat] or [agility] (2) to row as hard as you can. If you succeed, place 1 resource from the token bank on this location.

name: Row!
text: Forced - When you would draw the top card of the encounter deck: Instead look at the top 5 cards of the encounter deck and put each Writhing Appendage among those cards into play, engaged with you. Discard the rest of those cards. Objective - If there are 4 [per_investigator] resources on Gondola, advance.

name: San Marco Basilica
text: San Marco Basilica is connected to the location in the clockwise direction. [action]: Place an Innocent Reveler you control underneath the act deck, out of play.

name: Canal-side
text: Canal-side is connected to the location in the clockwise direction. [reaction] After you enter Canal-side: Place 1 clue on Canal-side from the token bank.

name: Streets of Venice
text: Streets of Venice is connected to the location in the clockwise direction. [fast]: Move (to the location in the clockwise direction).

name: Rialto Bridge
text: Rialto Bridge is connected to the location in the clockwise direction. Forced - After you leave Rialto Bridge: Lose 1 action.

name: Venetian Garden
text: Venetian Garden is connected to the location in the clockwise direction. [action] [action] Spend 2 resources: Heal 2 horror. (Limit once per game.)

name: Bridge of Sighs
text: Bridge of Sighs is connected to the location in the clockwise direction. Forced - After you leave Bridge of Sighs: Take 1 horror.

name: Flooded Square
text: Flooded Square is connected to the location in the clockwise direction. [action]: Automatically evade a non-[[Elite]] enemy at the location in the counter-clockwise direction. (Group limit once per turn.)

name: Accademia Bridge
text: Accademia Bridge is connected to the location in the clockwise direction. Forced - After you leave Accademia Bridge: Lose 2 resources.

name: The Guardian
text: The Guardian is connected to the location in the clockwise direction. [reaction] After you enter The Guardian: Draw 1 card.

name: Masked Carnevale-Goer
text: [action] Spend 1 clue: Flip Masked Carnevale-Goer. If its other side is an enemy, it attacks each investigator in its location.

name: Don Lagorio
text: Hunter. While resolving the hunter keyword on Don Lagorio, his location is connected to the location in the counter-clockwise direction, as well as the clockwise direction.

name: Elisabetta Magro
text: Aloof. Forced - When you look at Elisabetta Magro using the ability on Act 1a: Flip her to this side. Forced - When the mythos phase ends: Place 1 doom on Elisabetta Magro.

name: Salvatore Neri
text: Retaliate. Salvatore Neri's fight value is equal to the attacking investigator's base [combat]. Salvatore Neri's evade value is equal to the evading investigator's base [agility].

name: Savio Corvi
text: Hunter. While resolving the hunter keyword on Savio Corvi, his location is connected to the location across from him, as well as in the clockwise direction.

name: Innocent Reveler
text: [action]: Parley. Test [intellect] (2) to convince the reveler to follow you to safety. If you succeed, take control of Innocent Reveler. Forced - When Innocent Reveler would be discarded: Place it underneath the agenda deck, out of play. Each investigator takes 1 horror.

name: Abbess Allegria Di Biase
text: [fast]: Exhaust Abbess Allegria Di Biase: Move from her location to a connecting location, or to her location from a location connected to it. Any investigator may trigger this ability.

name: Bauta
text: Limit 1 [[Mask]] per investigator. [reaction] After Bauta enters play: Gain 2 resources. [reaction] When you initiate a non-[combat] test, discard Bauta: Use [combat] for this test, instead of the skill indicated.

name: Medico Della Peste
text: Limit 1 [[Mask]] per investigator. [reaction] After Medico Della Peste enters play: You heal 1 damage or 1 horror. [reaction] When you initiate a non-[willpower] test, discard Medico Della Peste: Use [willpower] for this test, instead of the skill indicated.

name: Pantalone
text: Limit 1 [[Mask]] per investigator. [reaction] After Pantalone enters play: Draw 2 cards. [reaction] When you initiate a non-[intellect] test, discard Pantalone: Use [intellect] for this test, instead of the skill indicated.

name: Gilded Volto
text: Limit 1 [[Mask]] per investigator. [reaction] After Gilded Volto enters play: Treat the next asset you play this turn as if it has fast. [reaction] When you initiate a non-[agility] test, discard Gilded Volto: Use [agility] for this test, instead of the skill indicated.

name: Cnidathqua
text: You may fight Cnidathqua as if it were at your location (it is not engaged with you). Cnidathqua cannot be evaded. Forced - After you fail a test while attacking Cnidathqua: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for a Writhing Appendage and spawn it engaged with you. Objective - If Cnidathqua is defeated, (→R2) .

name: Poleman
text: Spawn - Canal-side. Prey - Most Innocent Revelers controlled. Hunter.

name: Carnevale Sentinel
text: Spawn - The location across from you. Retaliate. You cannot look at the other side of Masked Carnevale-Goers at Carnevale Sentinel's location using the ability on Act 1a.

name: Writhing Appendage
text: Retaliate. Forced - After Writhing Appendage attacks you: Discard a random card from your hand. Forced - When Writhing Appendage is defeated, if Cnidathqua is in play: Deal 1 damage to Cnidathqua.

name: Mass Hysteria
text: Peril. Revelation - You must either take 2 damage or take each Masked Carnevale-Goer, shuffle them so the investigators do not know which is which, and place 1 in each location, starting with the location clockwise from you (Masked Carnevale-Goer side face-up).

name: Lost in Venice
text: Peril. Revelation - You must either take 2 horror or move to the location across from you.

name: Watchers' Gaze
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (4). Each investigator who controls an Innocent Reveler must also perform this skill test. Each investigator who fails takes 1 horror, which must be assigned to Innocent Reveler first, if able.

name: Chaos in the Water
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (4). Each investigator who controls an Innocent Reveler must also perform this skill test. Each investigator who fails takes 1 damage, which must be assigned to an Innocent Reveler first, if able.

name: Mesmerize
text: Revelation - If there are no Masked Carnevale-Goers at your location, Mesmerize gains surge. If there is a Masked Carnevale-Goer at your location, flip it. If it is an Innocent Reveler, move it to the farthest location clockwise from you with no investigators, then deal it 1 damage and 1 horror.

name: Abduction
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, you must either lose all of your resources or choose and discard an [[Ally]] asset you control.

name: Acrid Miasma
text: Revelation - Attach to the nearest location in the clockwise direction with no Acrid Miasma. Forced - After an investigator enters attached location, he or she tests [willpower] (2). If failed, that investigator must either take 1 damage and 1 horror, or resolve the hunter keyword on each enemy in play.

name: Main Street
text: While an investigator is moving, Main Street is connected to each Slimy Streets location, and vice versa. [action]: You and an investigator in another group who is at another copy of Main Street disengage from each engaged enemy and swap groups. Both investigators must activate this ability simultaneously. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Old Burial Hill
text: Forced - After a [[Manifold]] enemy spawns at Old Burial Hill: Exhaust that enemy. For the remainder of the round, if that enemy is defeated, discover clues at Old Burial Hill equal to the value of its Blob X keyword, instead of dealing X damage to Subject 8L-08.

name: Abandoned Windmill
text: [action]: Investigate. Abandoned Windmill gets -4 shroud for this investigation. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, move each clue you would discover to a Research Site or Temporary HQ in any group.

name: Abbatoir
text: [action] If there are no clues on Abbatoir: Test [agility] (3) to bait the creatures here. If you succeed, move each [[Ooze]] enemy twice toward Abbatoir. For the remainder of the round, increase the Blob X value of each enemy moved by this effect by 2. (Max one success per game.)

name: Replicating Aberration
text: Replicate - If you spot a [[Manifold]] enemy with exactly 1 remaining health, discard it and spawn this enemy exhausted in its place (unless the investigators spend a countermeasure). Hunter. Forced - When Replicating Aberration leaves play: Return it to the event organizer. Blob 3.

name: Replicating Aberration
text: Replicate - If you spot an Oozeling failing to spawn because its spawn location does not exist, discard it and spawn this enemy exhausted at any location instead (unless the investigators spend a countermeasure). Hunter. Forced - When Replicating Aberration leaves play: Return it to the event organizer. Blob 3.

name: Replicating Aberration
text: Replicate - When you spot a [[Manifold]] enemy being defeated with excess damage, spawn this enemy exhausted in its place (unless the investigators spend a countermeasure). Hunter. Forced - When Replicating Aberration leaves play: Return it to the event organizer. Blob 3.

name: Replicating Aberration
text: Replicate - After you spot the last clue being discovered from an [[Oozified]] location, spawn this enemy exhausted at that location (unless the investigators spend a countermeasure). Hunter. Forced - When Replicating Aberration leaves play: Return it to the event organizer. Blob 3.

name: Replicating Aberration
text: Replicate - If you spot an investigator 3 or more locations away from the nearest other investigator, spawn this enemy exhausted and engaged with the investigator (unless the investigators spend a countermeasure). Hunter. Forced - When Replicating Aberration leaves play: Return it to the event organizer. Blob 3.

name: Replicating Aberration
text: Replicate - After you spot an asset being defeated by an [[Ooze]] enemy’s attack, discard that enemy and spawn this enemy exhausted in its place (unless the investigators spend a countermeasure). Hunter. Forced - When Replicating Aberration leaves play: Return it to the event organizer. Blob 3.

name: Replicating Aberration
text: Replicate - If you spot a copy of "It’s got me!" in an investigator’s threat area with 3 or more resources on it, spawn this enemy exhausted and engaged with them (unless the investigators spend a countermeasure). Hunter. Forced - When Replicating Aberration leaves play: Return it to the event organizer. Blob 3.

name: Replicating Aberration
text: Replicate - If you spot an enemy with a copy of Alien Food Chain attached, spawn this enemy exhausted at any location and attach that copy of Alien Food Chain to it (unless the investigators spend a countermeasure). Hunter. Forced - When Replicating Aberration leaves play: Return it to the event organizer. Blob 3.

name: Replicating Aberration
text: Replicate - If you spot an investigator at a location with a copy of Sticky Feet attached to it, spawn this enemy exhausted at that location (unless the investigators spend a countermeasure). Hunter. Forced - When Replicating Aberration leaves play: Return it to the event organizer. Blob 3.

name: Escort the Car
text: Revelation - Put the set-aside Armored Car into play at the location farthest from the Fungus Mound. Spawn the set-aside Mi-Go Destroyer enemy at the Fungus Mound. Put this card into play next to the act deck. Forced - After Armored Car enters the Fungus Mound: Remember that "the car reached its target." Flip this card over. Forced - If Armored Car is defeated or devoured: Remember that "the escort failed." Flip this card over.

name: Armored Car
text: During the enemy phase, each ready enemy at Armored Car’s location attacks it, instead of any other target. During the investigation phase, investigators at this location may spend 1 [per_investigator] actions, as a group, to move Armored Car to a connecting location.

name: Mi-Go Destroyer
text: While Mi-Go Destroyer is ready, it gains: " Forced - At the start of the enemy phase: Move Mi-Go Destroyer once toward Armored Car." While attacking Armored Car, Mi-Go Destroyer deals +2 damage.

name: Reclaim the Brain
text: Revelation - Spawn the set-aside Mi-Go Scientist enemy at the location farthest from the Fungus Mound. Attach the set-aside Brain Case asset to Mi-Go Scientist. Put this card into play next to the act deck. Forced - If Brain Case is at Research Site and under an investigator’s control: Remember that "the brain was recovered." Flip this card over. Forced - If Brain Case is at Fungus Mound and attached to Mi-Go Scientist: Remember that "the brain was taken." Flip this card over.

name: Mi-Go Scientist
text: While Mi-Go Scientist is ready, it gains: " Forced - At the start of the enemy phase: If Brain Case is attached to Mi-Go Scientist, move Mi-Go Scientist once toward the Fungus Mound. Otherwise, move Mi‑Go Scientist once toward Brain Case’s location, and if it is at Brain Case’s location, attach Brain Case to it (if it is under an investigator’s control, they lose control of it) ."

name: Brain Case
text: If uncontrolled and unattached, attach Brain Case to its location. While attached to a location or an exhausted enemy, Brain Case gains: "[action]: Test [intellect] or [agility] (6). If you succeed, detach Brain Case and take control of it."

name: Prevent Their Research
text: Revelation - Spawn both set-aside Mi-Go Researcher enemies, one at the Fungus Mound, and the other at the location farthest from the Fungus Mound. Put this card into play next to the act deck. Forced - If there are no Mi-Go Researcher enemies in play: Remember that "the Mi-Go research was stopped." Flip this card over. Forced - If there are 6 resources on this story card: Remember that "the Mi-Go completed their research." Flip this card over.

name: Mi-Go Researcher
text: Aloof. While Mi-Go Researcher is ready, it gains: " Forced - At the start of the enemy phase: Move Mi-Go Researcher once toward the nearest [[Ooze]] enemy that has not been researched. For each such enemy at its location, place 1 resource on Prevent Their Research and 1 resource on that enemy; that enemy is 'researched.'"

name: G-Men
text: You get +1 to all skills. [reaction] When you would fail a skill test by exactly 1: Play G-Men from your hand. (This may cause the test to succeed.) Forced – At the end of the phase: Return G-Men to your hand.

name: Corrosive Cloud
text: Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Evade. If you succeed, automatically evade each enemy at your location and deal 1 damage to each of them.
