From now on, whenever Dr. Amy Kensler is included or used during a scenario, use the set-aside [[Resolute]] version instead of the version from the Expedition Team encounter set. If she is currently in play, switch her with that version now. Add this card to the victory display. The investigators may advance the current act or continue playing.

name: Horrifying Shade
text: Aloof. Hunter. While Horrifying Shade is at a location that is cleared of mirages, it loses aloof. Forced - After you discover or take control of 1 or more clues at Horrifying Shade's location: Place an equal amount of doom on Horrifying Shade.

name: Evanescent Mist
text: Revelation - Attach Evanescent Mist to the nearest location that is not cleared of mirages. Place 2 clues on attached location. In order to flip attached location over, investigators at attached location must either spend 2 additional clues as a group, or each take 2 damage. Forced - If attached location is cleared of mirages: Discard Evanescent Mist.

name: Anamnesis
text: Peril. Revelation - You must either (choose one): - Take 2 horror. - Place 1 doom on the current agenda. This effect can cause the current agenda to advance.

name: Professor William Dyer
text: Partner. Uses (3 secrets). [fast] Spend 1 secret and exhaust Professor William Dyer: Heal 2 horror from an investigator or another [[Ally]] asset at your location.

name: Danforth
text: Partner. Uses (5 secrets). [reaction] After an investigator at your location resolves a Tekeli-li weakness, exhaust Danforth and spend 1 secret: That investigator draws 3 cards. Discard each Tekeli-li weakness drawn by this effect without resolving its effects.

name: Eliyah Ashevak
text: Partner. Uses (3 secrets). [fast] During your turn, spend 1 secret and exhaust Eliyah Ashevak: Evade. Attempt to evade with a base [agility] skill of 6. If you succeed, you may move to a connecting location.

name: Dr. Mala Sinha
text: Partner. Uses (3 supplies). [fast] Spend 1 supply and exhaust Dr. Mala Sinha: Heal 2 damage from an investigator or another [[Ally]] asset at your location.

name: Avery Claypool
text: Partner. Uses (3 supplies). [reaction] When an investigator at your location reveals a [frost] token during a skill test, exhaust Avery Claypool: Cancel that token. Then, you must either reveal a new chaos token, or spend 1 supply.

name: James "Cookie" Fredericks
text: Partner. Uses (3 ammo). [fast] During your turn, spend 1 ammo and exhaust James "Cookie" Fredericks: Fight. Fight with a base [combat] skill of 6. If you succeed and the attacked enemy is non-[[Elite]], it cannot attack for the remainder of the round.

name: Dr. Amy Kensler
text: Partner. Uses (3 secrets). [fast] During your turn, spend 1 secret and exhaust Dr. Amy Kensler: Investigate. Investigate with a base [intellect] skill of 6. If you succeed, look at the top card of any investigator's deck or the encounter deck. You may discard that card.

name: Roald Ellsworth
text: Partner. Uses (3 supplies). [fast] During an investigator's turn, either exhaust Roald Ellsworth or spend 1 supply: Choose a non-weakness treachery in play. Treat that treachery's text box as if it were blank until the end of this turn.

name: Takada Hiroko
text: Partner. Uses (9 resources). [action] Exhaust Takada Hiroko: Gain 1 resource. Move up to 3 resources from Takada Hiroko to your resource pool.

name: To the Forbidden Peaks
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the level of your location. [cultist]: -1. If you fail, after this test ends move to the location directly below you. [tablet]: -3. If you fail, lose control of an [[Expedition]] asset and place it at your location. [elder_thing]: -4. If you fail, the nearest [[Elder Thing]] enemy moves once toward you. If it is engaged with you, it attacks.

name: Forbidden Peaks
text: Forced - After you move to a location: Return all of your clues to the token pool.

name: Terror Descends
text: Forced - After you move to a location: Return all of your clues to the token pool.

name: Ascend the Mountain
text: [action]: Take control of an [[Expedition]] asset at your location. Objective - Get to the top of the mountain. If each undefeated investigator has resigned, advance.

name: Deep Drifts
text: Forced - After you move to Deep Drifts from a location below it: Discard the top 3 cards of your deck. Draw each weakness discarded this way.

name: White Bluff
text: Forced - After you move to White Bluff from a location below it: Test [agility] (X). X is 1 plus this location's level. If you fail, lose control of an [[Expedition]] asset and place it at White Bluff.

name: Steep Incline
text: Forced - After you move to Steep Incline from a location below it: Take 1 damage.

name: Narrow Ridge
text: Forced - After you move to Narrow Ridge from a location below it: Take 1 horror.

name: Rocky Ledge
text: Forced - After you move to Rocky Ledge from a location below it: Shuffle the top card of the Tekeli-li deck into your deck without looking at it.

name: Snow-Covered Crag
text: Forced - After you move to Snow-Covered Crag from a location below it: Exhaust each asset you control.

name: Windswept Path
text: Forced - After Windswept Path is revealed: If it is at level 0, place 1 [per_investigator] clues on it (from the token pool) . Forced - After you move to Windswept Path from a location below it: Place 1 clue on it (from the token pool) .

name: The Summit
text: Clues on The Summit can only be discovered by investigating. Forced - When The Summit is revealed: Add 1 [frost] token to the chaos bag. [action]: Resign. Add each [[Expedition]] asset you control to the victory display. Return all of your clues to the token pool.

name: Terror of the Stars
text: Hunter. Massive. Terror of the Stars gets +3 [per_investigator] health. X is the level of your location (to a minimum of 1). Forced - At the end of the round: Move all investigators at Terror of the Stars's location to the location directly below it.

name: Constricting Elder Thing
text: Hunter. X is the level of your location (to a minimum of 1). While Constricting Elder Thing is engaged with you, you cannot move to locations above your location.

name: Snowfall
text: Revelation - Place 2 clues on your location (from the token pool) .

name: Avalanche
text: Revelation - If the level of your location is 1-4, move to the location directly below you. Then test [willpower] (X). X is the level of your location. If you fail, repeat this process. If you did not move by this effect, Avalanche gains surge.

name: Hanging on the Edge
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (3). If you fail, take 2 damage, lose control of each [[Expedition]] asset you control (placing it at your location), and move to the location directly below you.

name: Hypothermia
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). If the level of your location is 4 or 5, reveal 1 additional chaos token for this skill test. If you fail, either add 1 [frost] token to the chaos bag, or take 1 horror for each point you failed by.

name: Green Soapstone
text: Uses (4 charges). [reaction] When you perform a successful attack, spend 1 charge and exhaust Green Soapstone: Deal +1 damage for that attack.

name: Wooden Sledge
text: [action] Exhaust Wooden Sledge: An investigator at this location searches the top 6 cards of their deck for up to 3 non-weakness [[Item]] or [[Supply]] cards and attaches them facedown to Wooden Sledge. Shuffle their deck. While Wooden Sledge is under an investigator's control, facedown cards attached to it may be played as if they were in the hand of any investigator at its location.

name: Dynamite
text: Uses (2 supplies). [action] Spend 1 supply and exhaust Dynamite: Choose either your location or a connecting location. Deal 3 damage to each enemy and investigator at the chosen location.

name: Miasmic Crystal
text: Uses (3 charges). [reaction] When an investigator at your location draws a Tekeli-li weakness, spend 1 charge: That investigator cancels the effects of that weakness, places it on the bottom of the Tekeli-li deck, and draws 1 card.

name: Mineral Specimen
text: Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Investigate. Investigate with a base [intellect] skill of 5. Cancel each [frost] token revealed during this test. If you succeed, discover 1 additional clue at your location.

name: Small Radio
text: Uses (3 supplies). You may trigger abilities on assets from the Expedition Team encounter set that are not in play, but whose names are not crossed off in the Campaign Log. Instead of paying that ability's non-[action] costs, exhaust Small Radio and spend 1 supply.

name: Spare Parts
text: Uses (3 supplies). [fast] Spend 1 supply and exhaust Spare Parts: Add 1 supply to another asset at your location, or choose an investigator at your location to gain 1 resource.

name: City of the Elder Things
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -X. X is the number of keys you control. [cultist]: -2. If you fail, place a key you control on your location. [tablet]: -3. If a [frost] token was revealed during this test, you automatically fail, instead. [elder_thing]: -4. If you fail, the nearest enemy moves once toward you. If it is engaged with you, it attacks.

name: Lurking Horrors
text: [fast] During your turn, spend 1 clue: Look at the revealed side of a City Landscape in your column or row. (Limit once per round.) [fast] During your turn, spend 3 clues: Move to any location in your column or row. (Limit once per round.)

name: Doom from Below
text: [fast] During your turn, spend 1 clue: Look at the revealed side of a City Landscape in your column or row. (Limit once per round.) [fast] During your turn, spend 3 clues: Move to any location in your column or row. (Limit once per round.)

name: Sprawling City (v. I)
text: [action] Spend two [elder_thing] keys: Remember that the team "studied the history of the Elder Things." [action] Spend two [tablet] keys: Remember that the team "discerned the origin of the Shoggoths." Objective - If the team has "studied the history of the Elder Things" and "discerned the origin of the Shoggoths," advance.

name: Sprawling City (v. II)
text: [action] Spend two [elder_thing] keys: Remember that the team "studied the history of the Elder Things." [action] Spend two [cultist] keys: Remember that the team "discovered a hidden power." Objective - If the team has "studied the history of the Elder Things" and "discovered a hidden power," advance.

name: Sprawling City (v. III)
text: [action] Spend two [tablet] keys: Remember that the team "discerned the origin of the Shoggoths." [action] Spend two [cultist] keys: Remember that the team "discovered a hidden power." Objective - If the team has "discerned the origin of the Shoggoths" and "discovered a hidden power," advance.

name: Pursuit of the Unknown (v. I)
text: [action] Spend two [cultist] keys: Each investigator may heal 1 damage, 1 horror, and 1 trauma. Objective - If each undefeated investigator is at the Hidden Tunnel and it has no clues, advance.

name: Pursuit of the Unknown (v. II)
text: [action] Spend two [tablet] keys: Each investigator searches their deck for each Tekeli-li weakness, shuffles each of them into the Tekeli-li deck, then shuffles their deck. Objective - If each undefeated investigator is at the Hidden Tunnel and it has no clues, advance.

name: Pursuit of the Unknown (v. III)
text: Forced - When a [[Shoggoth]] or [[Elite]] enemy enters a location: Defeat each [[Elder Thing]] enemy at that location. [action] Spend two [elder_thing] keys: Remove each [elder_thing] token from the chaos bag. Objective - If each undefeated investigator is at the Hidden Tunnel and it has no clues, advance.

name: Hidden Tunnel
text: Clues on Hidden Tunnel cannot be discovered or moved to other locations. [action]: Test a skill of your choice (4). You may spend a [skull] key to get +5 skill value for this test. If you succeed, return 1 clue on Hidden Tunnel to the token pool (2 clues instead if you spent a [skull] key).

name: Ancient Planetarium
text: [action] Spend two "0" keys: Add one of the spent "0" keys to the chaos bag (as a chaos token) for the remainder of the campaign. Record in the Campaign Log the team photographed the astronomical charts.

name: Stone Bridge
text: [action]: Test [combat] (4) or [agility] (4). If you succeed, discover 1 clue from Stone Bridge. [action]: Move to another Stone Bridge location.

name: Cylindrical Tower
text: [action] Spend two "-2" keys: Draw 2 cards, gain 2 resources, and remove 2 [frost] tokens from the chaos bag. Record in the Campaign Log the team studied the mural carvings.

name: Labyrinthine Chamber
text: Each time a chaos token is revealed during a skill test at this location, double its modifier if a key matching that chaos token is on this location or under the control of an investigator at this location.

name: Map Room
text: [action] Spend two "-3" keys: Choose 3 locations other than Hidden Tunnel and reveal them. Discover 1 clue from each of these locations. Record in the Campaign Log the team read the map.

name: Roofless Rampart
text: [action] Spend two "-1" keys: Either remove 1 doom from the agenda, or choose and discard from play 1 non-[[Elite]] enemy or treachery. Record in the Campaign Log the team discovered an ancient vault.

name: Ruinous Streets
text: Forced - After you reveal 1 or more [frost] tokens during a skill test at Ruinous Streets: Take 1 damage. [reaction] After you discover the last clue from Ruinous Streets: Discover 1 clue on a connecting location.

name: Cyclopean Spires
text: [action]: Move 1 key on another location in this row to Cyclopean Spires. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Submerged Passageway
text: [action]: Move 1 clue from this location to an unrevealed location in this column or row.

name: Temple of the Elder Things
text: Forced - After you reveal 1 or more [frost] tokens during a skill test at this location: Take 1 horror. [action] If there are no clues on Temple of the Elder Things: Choose 2 locations with keys on them. Swap each key on those locations. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Terror of the Stars
text: Hunter. Massive. Terror of the Stars gets +3 [per_investigator] health. While Terror of the Stars is ready, investigators at its location cannot spend or take control of keys.

name: Benign Elder Thing
text: Spawn - Any empty location. Benign Elder Thing enters play with 1 doom on it. Forced - When Benign Elder Thing is defeated: Place 1 doom on the agenda. [action]: Parley. Test [willpower] (3). If you succeed, remove Benign Elder Thing from the game.

name: Reawakened Elder Thing
text: Hunter. Forced - When this enemy engages you: Place a key you control on it. When it leaves play, place that key on its location. Forced - When an investigator at this enemy's location takes control of a key: This enemy readies, engages, and attacks them.

name: Dawning of the Truth
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (2). Increase the difficulty of this test by 1 for each key on your location or under your control. If you fail, take 2 horror (3 horror instead if you fail by 3 or more).

name: Crumbling Ruins
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (3). During this test, if you reveal a chaos token that matches a key on your location or under the control of an investigator at your location, you automatically fail. For each point you fail by, take 1 damage.

name: Frostbitten
text: Revelation - Put Frostbitten into play in your threat area. Frostbitten can be healed as if it were a single point of damage on you (if it is healed, discard it) . Forced - When you reveal a [frost] token during a skill test: You must either take 1 damage or you automatically fail this test. (Limit once per test.)

name: Possessed
text: Revelation - Put Possessed into play in your threat area. Possessed can be healed as if it were a single point of horror on you (if it is healed, discard it) . Forced - When you reveal a [frost] token during a skill test: You must either take 1 horror or you automatically fail this test. (Limit once per test.)

name: The Heart of Madness
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -1 (-3 instead if there is an [[Ancient One]] enemy at your location). [cultist]: -1. If there is a seal at your location, or if your location is a Mist-Pylon, treat this token as a [frost] token, instead. [tablet]: -3. If you fail, draw the top card of the Tekeli-li deck. [elder_thing]: -4. If you fail by 3 or more, place 1 doom on the current agenda. This can cause the current agenda to advance.

name: The Gate of Y'quaa
text: [action]: Place an activated seal you control on The Gate of Y'quaa. [action]: Resign. You retreat, hoping you've done enough to seal away whatever lies beyond the gate. (If you control 1 or more seals, you retain control of them.)

name: Geothermal Vent
text: [action] If you control the [seal_a] seal: Test [combat] (3). If you succeed, investigators at Geothermal Vent spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to activate the [seal_a] seal. Then, remove 1 [frost] token from the chaos bag.

name: Forsaken Temple
text: [action] If you control the [seal_c] seal: Test [willpower] (3). If you succeed, investigators at Forsaken Temple spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to activate the [seal_c] seal. Then, look at the revealed side of each unrevealed location on the same spoke as Forsaken Temple.

name: Library of Kós
text: [action] If you control the [seal_b] seal: Test [intellect] (3). If you succeed, investigators at Library of Kós spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to activate the [seal_b] seal. Then, look at the revealed side of each unrevealed location on the same ring as Library of Kós.

name: Protoplasmic Pool
text: [action] If you control the [seal_d] seal: Test [agility] (3). If you succeed, investigators at Protoplasmic Pool spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to activate the [seal_d] seal. Then, deal 2 damage to each enemy in play.

name: Hall of the Sunless Sea
text: [action] If you control the [seal_e] seal, investigators at Hall of the Sunless Sea spend 1 [per_investigator] clues and discard 2 [per_investigator] cards from their hands, as a group: Activate the [seal_e] seal.

name: Subnautical Sprawl
text: Treat the modifier of the first [frost] token revealed during each skill test at Subnautical Sprawl as -3 instead of -1. (Limit once per round.)

name: Vaulted Corridor
text: [fast]: Choose another Vaulted Corridor and test [agility] (X). X is the number of locations away that Vaulted Corridor is from this one. If you succeed, move there. (Limit once per round.)

name: Primeval Terror
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (2). This test gets +1 difficulty for each location away from The Gate of Y'quaa you are. If you fail, take 2 horror.

name: Roots of the Earth
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (2). This test gets +1 difficulty for each location away from The Gate of Y'quaa you are. If you fail, take 2 damage.

name: The Beating Heart
text: Forced - If two or more activated seals are controlled by investigators at the same location: The latent energy stored within the seals fuses together, and the ensuing chain reaction sets off an electrostatic detonation that destroys all life on Earth. (→R3)

name: The Miasma Beckons
text: Forced - If two or more activated seals are controlled by investigators at the same location: The latent energy stored within the seals fuses together, and the ensuing chain reaction sets off an electrostatic detonation that destroys all life on Earth. (→R3)

name: Call of Madness
text: Forced - If two or more activated seals are controlled by investigators at the same location: The latent energy stored within the seals fuses together, and the ensuing chain reaction sets off an electrostatic detonation that destroys all life on Earth. (→R3)

name: Dormancy
text: Objective - If an activated seal is placed on The Gate of Y'quaa, advance.

name: The Great Seal
text: Objective - Place as many activated seals as you can on The Gate of Y'quaa before whatever is inside escapes. If all five seals have been placed, advance.

name: Glacial Grotto
text: Forced - After Glacial Grotto is revealed: Place the dormant [seal_a] seal on it. [action]: Test [combat] (2) to shatter the ice. If you succeed, investigators at Glacial Grotto may spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, for you to take control of the seal on it.

name: Sculptured Crypt
text: Forced - After Sculptured Crypt is revealed: Place the dormant [seal_b] seal on it. [action]: Test [intellect] (2) to decipher the alien script. If you succeed, investigators at Sculptured Crypt may spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, for you to take control of the seal on it.

name: Undercity Altar
text: Forced - After Undercity Altar is revealed: Place the dormant [seal_c] seal on it. [action]: Test [willpower] (2) to break the ancient ward. If you succeed, investigators at Undercity Altar may spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, for you to take control of the seal on it.

name: Ichor-Laden Tunnels
text: Forced - After Ichor-Laden Tunnels is revealed: Place the dormant [seal_d] seal on it. [action]: Test [agility] (2) to traverse the ichor. If you succeed, investigators at Ichor-Laden Tunnels may spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, for you to take control of the seal on it.

name: Limestone Caverns
text: Forced - After Limestone Caverns is revealed: Place the dormant [seal_e] seal on it. [action] Investigators at Limestone Caverns spend 1 [per_investigator] clues and 3 [per_investigator] resources, as a group: Take control of the seal on Limestone Caverns.

name: Protoplasmic Mass
text: Hunter. Spawn - Location farthest from you on the outer ring. Prey - Nearest investigator with a seal only. Forced - When the enemy phase ends, if an investigator controls an activated seal: Protoplasmic Mass readies and resolves the enemy phase again (it resolves its hunter keyword and attacks a second time) . (Limit once per phase.)

name: Electrostatic Discharge
text: Surge. Revelation - Each investigator at the same location as a seal takes 1 horror, and 1 damage if that seal is activated

name: That Which Has No Name
text: Forced - When 1 or more doom would be put into play, if there are any copies of The Nameless Madness still set aside: Instead, spawn 1 set-aside copy of The Nameless Madness at the location nearest to an investigator without a copy of that enemy that is connected to a location with a copy of that enemy. Objective - At the end of the round, if all 15 copies of The Nameless Madness are in play and not every Mist-Pylon is collapsed, advance this agenda.

name: Collapse the Pylons
text: Each revealed Mist-Pylon can be attacked as if it were an enemy. Its fight value is equal to its shroud value and its health is equal to its clue value. While it has no health remaining, it is collapsed (it remains in play) . [reaction] When you discover 1 or more clues at a Mist-Pylon, spend those clues: Deal that much damage to that Mist-Pylon. Objective - At the end of the round, if each Mist-Pylon is collapsed, advance this act.

name: Mist-Pylon
text: [fast] If you control the [seal_a] seal, and it is activated: You unleash the seal's power. Place the [seal_a] seal on this Mist-Pylon. For the remainder of the game, each time you deal damage to a Mist-Pylon, deal 1 additional damage.

name: Mist-Pylon
text: [fast] If you control the [seal_b] seal, and it is activated: You unleash the seal's power. Place the [seal_b] seal on this Mist-Pylon. For the remainder of the game, reduce the shroud value of each Mist-Pylon by 2.

name: Mist-Pylon
text: [fast] If you control the [seal_c] seal, and it is activated: You unleash the seal's power. Place the [seal_c] seal on this Mist-Pylon. For the remainder of the game, each investigator gets +1 to each of their skills while they are at a Mist-Pylon.

name: Mist-Pylon
text: [fast] If you control the [seal_d] seal, and it is activated: You unleash the seal's power. Place the [seal_d] seal on this Mist-Pylon. For the remainder of the game, whenever an investigator at a Mist-Pylon would be dealt 1 or more damage and/or horror, cancel 1 of that damage or horror.

name: Mist-Pylon
text: [fast] If you control the [seal_e] seal, and it is activated: You unleash the seal's power. Place the [seal_e] seal on this Mist-Pylon. For the remainder of the game, each enemy gets -2 fight and -2 evade while it is at a Mist-Pylon.

name: The Nameless Madness
text: Alert. Massive. Retaliate. The Nameless Madness cannot take damage. Forced - After you successfully evade or attack The Nameless Madness: For each point you succeeded by, exhaust the nearest ready copy of The Nameless Madness.

name: Unsealed Phantasm
text: Spawn - The nearest Mist-Pylon that is not collapsed (or your location, if there are none in play). While Unsealed Phantasm is ready and at a Mist-Pylon, damage cannot be dealt to that Mist-Pylon. Forced - At the end of the enemy phase, if Unsealed Phantasm is ready: Move it once toward the Mist-Pylon nearest to it that is not collapsed.

name: The Final Mirage
text: The Nameless Madness gains hunter. Forced - When 1 or more doom would be put into play: Instead, spawn 1 set-aside copy of The Nameless Madness at the leftmost investigator's location. Objective - Run.

name: Titanic Ramp
text: Titanic Ramp is connected to the locations to its left and right. As an additional cost for you to leave Titanic Ramp, test [agility] (4). If you fail, cancel the effects of the move. Any investigator at your location or a connecting location may spend 1 clue to have you automatically succeed at this test.

name: Titanic Ramp
text: Titanic Ramp is connected to the locations to its left and right. As an additional cost for you to leave Titanic Ramp, test [agility] (3). If you fail, cancel the effects of the move. Any investigator at your location or a connecting location may spend 1 clue to have you automatically succeed at this test.

name: Titanic Ramp
text: Titanic Ramp is connected to the locations to its left and right. As an additional cost for you to leave Titanic Ramp, test [agility] (2). If you fail, cancel the effects of the move. Any investigator at your location or a connecting location may spend 1 clue to have you automatically succeed at this test.

name: Titanic Ramp
text: Titanic Ramp is connected to the locations to its left and right. As an additional cost for you to leave Titanic Ramp, test [agility] (1). If you fail, cancel the effects of the move. Any investigator at your location or a connecting location may spend 1 clue to have you automatically succeed at this test.

name: Hidden Tunnel
text: Hidden Tunnel is connected to the location to its left. Objective - If each undefeated investigator is at the Hidden Tunnel, advance the act.

name: Primordial Evil
text: Hunter. Retaliate. Forced - When you deal any amount of damage to Primordial Evil: Shuffle the top card of the Tekeli-li deck into your deck without looking at it (if you cannot, Primordial Evil attacks you).

name: The Madness Within
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (4). For each point you fail by, shuffle the top card of the Tekeli-li deck into your deck without looking at it (for each card you cannot shuffle, take 1 horror).

name: Manifestation of Madness
text: Hunter. Forced - When Manifestation of Madness attacks you: Shuffle the top 2 cards of the Tekeli-li deck into your deck without looking at them (for each card you cannot shuffle, Manifestation of Madness deals +1 damage and +1 horror for this attack).

name: Glacial Phantasm
text: Forced - At the end of the enemy phase, if Glacial Phantasm is ready: Move it once toward the location with the most investigators. In player order, each investigator at Glacial Phantasm's location or a connecting location shuffles the top card of the Tekeli-li deck into their deck without looking at it (each investigator who cannot takes 1 horror).

name: Kindred Mist
text: Revelation - Attach to the nearest location without a copy of Kindred Mist attached. Forced - When 1 or more cards from the Tekeli-li deck would be shuffled into your deck while you are at attached location: Draw them instead, placing them on the bottom of your deck instead of the bottom of the Tekeli-li deck. Discard Kindred Mist at the end of this round.

name: Antarctic Wind
text: Revelation - Attach to the nearest location without a copy of Antarctic Wind attached. Investigators at attached location cannot play cards or draw cards from their deck. Forced - At the end of the round: Discard Antarctic Wind.

name: Whiteout
text: Revelation - Attach to your location. Each investigator at attached location gets -1 [willpower], -1 [intellect], -1 [combat], and -1 [agility]. Forced - At the end of the round: Discard Whiteout.

name: Polar Vortex
text: Revelation - Attach to your location. Forced - When you end your turn at attached location: Each card you control with health (including your investigator) takes 1 direct damage. Forced - At the end of the round: Discard Polar Vortex.

name: Elder Thing Scavenger
text: Hunter. Forced - After Elder Thing Scavenger attacks you: Discard the top 3 cards of your deck. Draw each weakness discarded this way.

name: Guardian Elder Thing
text: Hunter. Forced - When you deal damage to Guardian Elder Thing: For each point of damage dealt, discard the top card of your deck. Draw each weakness discarded this way.

name: Rise of the Elder Things
text: Revelation - Find the topmost [[Elder Thing]] enemy in the encounter discard pile and spawn it engaged with you. Each [[Elder Thing]] enemy currently engaged with you gets +1 fight and +1 evade until the end of the round. If Rise of the Elder Things put no enemies into play, it gains surge.

name: Ice Shaft
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (3). For each [frost] token revealed during this test, take 1 damage. If you fail, take 2 damage.

name: Through the Ice
text: Revelation - Attach to the nearest location without a copy of Through the Ice attached. As an additional cost for you to enter or leave attached location (except by a scenario card effect), test [agility] (2). If you fail, cancel the effects of the move, take 1 damage and 1 horror, and discard Through the Ice.

name: Lost Researcher
text: Spawn - Any location (empty, if able). Lost Researcher enters play with 1 doom on it. Forced - When Lost Researcher is defeated: Move each doom on it to its location. [action]: Parley. Test [willpower] or [intellect] (3). If you succeed, take control of 1 doom on Lost Researcher and flip it to its clue side. Then, if there is no doom on Lost Researcher, discard it.

name: Frenzied Explorer
text: Frenzied Explorer enters play with 1 doom on it. Forced - When Frenzied Explorer is defeated: Move each doom on it to its location. [reaction] After you successfully evade Frenzied Explorer by 2 or more: Take control of 1 doom on Frenzied Explorer and flip it to its clue side. Then, if there is no doom on Frenzied Explorer, discard it.

name: Abandoned to Madness
text: Revelation - Attach to the nearest [[Possessed]] enemy and place 1 doom on that enemy. If there are no [[Possessed]] enemies in play, search the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[Possessed]] enemy, draw it, and attach Abandoned to Madness to it (shuffle the encounter deck). Increase the difficulty to fight, evade, or parley with attached enemy by 1.

name: Blasphemous Visions
text: Revelation - Shuffle the top card of the Tekeli-li deck into your deck without looking at it. Then, put Blasphemous Visions into play in your threat area. Resolve the effects of each Tekeli-li weakness you draw an additional time. [action]: Test [willpower] (3). If you succeed, discard Blasphemous Visions.

name: Glimpse the Unspeakable
text: Peril. Revelation - Draw the top card of the Tekeli-li deck (and resolve its effects) . Shuffle it into any investigator's deck instead of placing it on the bottom of the Tekeli-li deck. If no Tekeli-li weakness is drawn by this effect, Glimpse the Unspeakable gains surge.

name: Nightmarish Vapors
text: Peril. Revelation - You must either (choose one): - Lose 2 actions. - Shuffle the top 2 cards of the Tekeli-li deck into your deck without looking at them.

name: Miasmatic Torment
text: Revelation - If you control a partner asset, exhaust them and attach Miasmatic Torment to them. Otherwise, Miasmatic Torment gains surge. Attached asset cannot ready. Forced - At the end of your turn: Attached asset takes 1 damage or 1 horror. [action]: Test [willpower] or [intellect] (3). If you succeed, discard Miasmatic Torment.

name: Nebulous Miasma
text: Revelation - Attach to your location. Forced - When you end your turn at attached location: Each card you control with sanity (including your investigator) takes 1 direct horror. Forced - At the end of the round: Discard Nebulous Miasma.

name: Giant Albino Penguin
text: Aloof. As an additional cost for you to enter or leave this enemy's location, you must spend 1 action.

name: Wuk! Wuk! Wuk!
text: Revelation - Find the Giant Albino Penguin enemy farthest from you. You must either move it to your location or place 1 doom on it. If there are no Giant Albino Penguins in play, search the encounter deck and discard pile for a Giant Albino Penguin, draw it, and shuffle the encounter deck.

name: Forgotten Shoggoth
text: Hunter. Forced - After Forgotten Shoggoth engages you: Draw the top card of the Tekeli-li deck (if you cannot, Forgotten Shoggoth attacks you).

name: Rampaging Shoggoth
text: Hunter. Massive. Rampaging Shoggoth gets +2 [per_investigator] health. Forced - At the end of the enemy phase: Deal 2 damage to each investigator and non-[[Shoggoth]] enemy at Rampaging Shoggoth's location. Each of those investigators draws the top card of the Tekeli-li deck.

name: Polar Mirage
text: Revelation - Attach to the nearest location with at least 1 clue, and without a copy of Polar Mirage attached. Forced - After you discover or take control of 1 or more clues at attached location: Discard each non-weakness card in your hand. Discard Polar Mirage.

name: Dark Aurora
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). For each [frost] token revealed during this test, take 1 horror. If you fail, take 2 horror.

name: Professor William Dyer
text: Partner. Uses (3 secrets). [action] Spend 1 secret and exhaust Professor William Dyer: Heal 2 horror from an investigator or another [[Ally]] asset at your location.

name: Danforth
text: Partner. Uses (5 secrets). [reaction] After an investigator at your location resolves a Tekeli-li weakness, exhaust Danforth and spend 1 secret: That investigator draws 2 cards.

name: Eliyah Ashevak
text: Partner. Uses (3 secrets). [action] Spend 1 secret and exhaust Eliyah Ashevak: Evade. Attempt to evade with a base [agility] skill of 5. If you succeed, you may move to a connecting location.

name: Dr. Mala Sinha
text: Partner. Uses (3 supplies). [action] Spend 1 supply and exhaust Dr. Mala Sinha: Heal 2 damage from an investigator or another [[Ally]] asset at your location.

name: Avery Claypool
text: Partner. Uses (5 supplies). [reaction] When an investigator at your location reveals a [frost] token during a skill test, exhaust Avery Claypool and spend 1 supply: Cancel that token and reveal a new one.

name: James "Cookie" Fredericks
text: Partner. Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo and exhaust James "Cookie" Fredericks: Fight. Fight with a base [combat] skill of 5. If you succeed and the attacked enemy is non-[[Elite]], it cannot attack for the remainder of the round.

name: Dr. Amy Kensler
text: Partner. Uses (3 secrets). [action] Spend 1 secret and exhaust Dr. Amy Kensler: Investigate. Investigate with a base [intellect] skill of 5. If you succeed, look at the top card of any investigator's deck or the encounter deck. You may discard that card.

name: Roald Ellsworth
text: Partner. Uses (5 supplies). [fast] During an investigator's turn, exhaust Roald Ellsworth and spend 1 supply: Choose a treachery attached to any location. Treat that treachery's text box as if it were blank until the end of this turn.

name: Takada Hiroko
text: Partner. Uses (9 resources). [action] Exhaust Takada Hiroko: Move up to 3 resources from Takada Hiroko to your resource pool.

name: Tekeli-li
text: Revelation - Take 1 horror. Place Tekeli-li on the bottom of the Tekeli-li deck.

name: Tekeli-li
text: Revelation - Take 1 damage. Place Tekeli-li on the bottom of the Tekeli-li deck.

name: Tekeli-li
text: Revelation - Discard 1 card at random from your hand. Place Tekeli-li on the bottom of the Tekeli-li deck.

name: Tekeli-li
text: Revelation - Lose 2 resources. Place Tekeli-li on the bottom of the Tekeli-li deck.

name: Tekeli-li
text: Revelation - If it is your turn, lose 1 action. Otherwise, lose 1 action during your next turn. Place Tekeli-li on the bottom of the Tekeli-li deck.

name: Tekeli-li
text: Revelation - Place 1 of your clues on your location. Place Tekeli-li on the bottom of the Tekeli-li deck.

name: Tekeli-li
text: Revelation - Discard an asset you control. Place Tekeli-li on the bottom of the Tekeli-li deck.

name: Claypool's Furs
text: Fast. [reaction] When you reveal a [frost] token during a skill test you are performing, deal 1 damage to Claypool's Furs: Cancel that chaos token and return it to the bag. Reveal a new chaos token.

name: Collected Works of Poe
text: Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Choose an investigator at your location to search the top 6 cards of their deck for each copy of Tekeli-li and place each of them on the bottom of the Tekeli-li deck. Shuffle that investigator's deck. That investigator draws 1 card.

name: Cookie's Custom .32
text: Fast. Uses (2 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. Either fight with a base [combat] skill of 5, or get +2 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage.

name: Dyer's Sketches
text: Fast. Play during any [fast] window. Draw 3 cards.

name: Ellsworth's Boots
text: Limit 1 [[Footwear]] per investigator. [reaction] After the last clue is discovered from your location, exhaust Ellsworth's Boots: Move to a connecting location, or discard Ellsworth's Boots to move to any revealed location.

name: Kensler's Log
text: Fast. Uses (2 secrets). [action] Spend 1 secret: Investigate. Either investigate with a base [intellect] skill of 5, or get +2 [intellect] for this investigation. If you succeed, you discover 1 additional clue at your location.

name: Sinha's Medical Kit
text: Uses (3 supplies). [fast] Exhaust Sinha's Medical Kit and spend 1 supply: Heal 1 damage or 1 horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset at your location.

name: Takada's Cache
text: Fast. Play during any [fast] window. Gain 3 resources and draw 1 card. Remove Takada's Cache from the game.

name: Anyu
text: [fast] Exhaust Anyu: Choose one, or discard Anyu to choose up to three, in any order - - Move to a connecting location. - You get +2 skill value for your next skill test this round. - Evade. Attempt to evade with a base [agility] skill of 4.

name: Daniela Reyes
text: [reaction] After an enemy attacks you (except an attack of opportunity you provoked), even if that attack was canceled: Either deal 1 damage to that enemy, or automatically evade it. [elder_sign] effect: +1. If you were attacked by an enemy this round, you automatically succeed, instead.

name: Mechanic's Wrench
text: Daniela Reyes deck only. [fast] Exhaust Mechanic's Wrench: Choose an enemy at your location. That enemy attacks you. [action]: Fight. Use this ability only against an enemy that has attacked you since the end of your last turn. You get +2 [combat] for this attack and deal +1 damage for this attack.

name: Mob Goons
text: Hunter. Prey - Daniela Reyes only. This enemy's attacks cannot be canceled. Damage/horror dealt by this enemy's attacks is treated as direct.

name: Norman Withers
text: Play with the top card of your deck revealed. Once per round, you may play the top card of your deck as if it were in your hand, at -1 resource cost. Forced - After a weakness is revealed while on top of your deck: Draw it. [elder_sign] effect: +X. You may swap the top card of your deck with a card in your hand. X is the resource cost of the top card of your deck.

name: Livre d'Eibon
text: Norman Withers deck only. [fast] Exhaust Livre d'Eibon: Swap the top card of your deck with a card in your hand. [fast] Exhaust Livre d'Eibon: Commit the top card of your deck to an eligible skill test performed by an investigator at your location.

name: The Harbinger
text: Revelation - Place this card on top of your deck. While The Harbinger is revealed and on top of your deck, cards in your deck cannot be searched, drawn, or manipulated in any way except by the below ability. [action] [action]: Discard The Harbinger. This ability may be activated while The Harbinger is on top of your deck, as if it were in your threat area.

name: Monterey Jack
text: [reaction] At the end of your turn, if you started this round 1 location away from your current location: Either gain 1 resource or draw 1 card (if you started this round 2 or more locations away, do both instead). [elder_sign] effect: +1. If you started this round 1 or more locations away from your current location, gain 1 resource or draw 1 card.

name: Trusty Bullwhip
text: Fast. Monterey Jack deck only. [action]: Fight. This attack uses [agility] instead of [combat]. If this attack succeeds, you may exhaust Trusty Bullwhip to either automatically evade the attacked enemy or deal +1 damage for this attack.

name: Buried Secrets
text: Revelation - Put Buried Secrets into play in your threat area. If your location can be investigated, you cannot move except by scenario card effects. [action]: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, discard Buried Secrets. If you fail, you may take 2 horror to shuffle it into your deck.

name: Lily Chen
text: You begin the game with each Discipline in your deck in play, [[Unbroken]] side faceup. [elder_sign] effect: +2. After this test ends, flip a [[Broken]] Discipline you control to its [[Unbroken]] side.

name: Discipline
text: Lily Chen deck only. Permanent. You get +1 [willpower]. [action]: Take 1 direct damage to heal 3 horror, or take 1 direct horror to heal 3 damage. Flip this asset over.

name: Discipline
text: Lily Chen deck only. Permanent. [reaction] After the round ends, if you took no damage or horror this round: Flip this asset over to its [[Unbroken]] side.

name: Discipline
text: Lily Chen deck only. Permanent. You get +1 [intellect]. [action]: If you have fewer than 5 cards in your hand: Draw cards until there are 5 cards in your hand. Flip this asset over.

name: Discipline
text: Lily Chen deck only. Permanent. [reaction] After the round ends, if your hand did not have 2 or more cards in it at any point this round: Flip this asset over to its [[Unbroken]] side.

name: Discipline
text: Lily Chen deck only. Permanent. You get +1 [combat]. [action]: You get +5 skill value for the next skill test you perform this turn. After that skill test ends, flip this asset over. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Discipline
text: Lily Chen deck only. Permanent. [reaction] After the round ends, if you performed no skill tests this round: Flip this asset over to its [[Unbroken]] side.

name: Discipline
text: Lily Chen deck only. Permanent. You get +1 [agility]. [action]: One at a time, take up to 3 different fight or evade actions. Flip this asset over. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Discipline
text: Lily Chen deck only. Permanent. [reaction] After the round ends, if no enemies were at the same location as you at any point this round: Flip this asset over to its [[Unbroken]] side.

name: Burden of Destiny
text: Revelation - You must either (choose one): - Flip a Discipline you control to its [[Broken]] side. It cannot be flipped back this round. - Take 1 damage and 1 horror.

name: Bob Jenkins
text: At any time, an investigator at your location may reveal to you the [[Item]] assets in their hand. You may take an additional action during your turn, which can only be used to play an [[Item]] asset from the hand of an investigator at your location, under their control. (Both investigators may spend resources to pay its cost). [elder_sign] effect: +1 for each [[Item]] asset you control.

name: Shrewd Dealings
text: Bob Jenkins deck only. Reduce the cost of each [[Item]] asset you play by 1. [reaction] When you play an [[Item]] asset: Play it under the control of any investigator at your location.

name: Greed
text: Revelation - Take 1 horror. If you have... - ...10 or fewer resources, take 1 additional horror. - ...5 or fewer resources, take 1 additional horror. - ...0 resources, take 1 additional horror.

name: Geared Up
text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Purchase at deck creation. Forced - When your first turn of the game begins: One at a time, play any number of [[Item]] assets from your hand, reducing the cost of each by 1. During this turn, you have 3 fewer actions to take.

name: Toe to Toe
text: Fight. This attack deals +1 damage and is automatically successful. As an additional cost to perform this attack, the chosen enemy makes an attack against you.

name: "Get behind me!"
text: Fast. Play during any [fast] window. Until the end of the phase, whenever an enemy would attack another investigator at your location, it attacks you instead, then engages you. Cancel 1 horror dealt by each attack made in this way.

name: Gang Up
text: Fight. For each different class among cards you control, you get +1 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack.

name: Sweeping Kick
text: Fight. Add your [agility] to your skill value for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. If you succeed, automatically evade the attacked enemy.

name: Defensive Stance
text: While Defensive Stance is in your hand or committed to a skill test, it gains [combat] icons equal to your [agility], and [agility] icons equal to your [combat].

name: Butterfly Swords
text: [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. After this attack, you may exhaust Butterfly Swords to fight again, adding your [agility] to your skill value for that attack. That attack deals +1 damage.

name: Dodge
text: Fast. Play when an enemy attacks an investigator at your location. Cancel that attack. Then, test [agility] (1). If you succeed, deal 1 damage to that enemy.

name: Combat Training
text: Fast. Limit 1 [[Composure]] in play. You get +1 [combat] and +1 [agility]. Non-direct damage/horror must be assigned to Combat Training before it can be assigned to your investigator card. [fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [combat] or +1 [agility] for this skill test.

name: On the Hunt
text: Fast. Play when you would draw an encounter card during the mythos phase. Instead, search the encounter deck for an enemy, spawn it engaged with you (instead of its normal spawn location) , attach On the Hunt to it, and shuffle the encounter deck. [reaction] When you defeat attached enemy: Gain 3 resources.

name: Fang of Tyr'thrha
text: Fight. Choose an enemy at any revealed location as the target for this attack. Before resolving this attack, you may move to that enemy's location. Add your [agility] to your [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +3 damage.

name: Butterfly Swords
text: [action]: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. After this attack, you may fight again, adding your [agility] to your skill value for that attack. If both attacks are successful, you may exhaust Butterfly Swords to have the second attack deal +1 damage.

name: Forced Learning
text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Purchase at deck creation. Increase your deck size by 15. During each upkeep phase, instead of drawing 1 card, draw 2 cards and discard 1 of them.

name: Jeremiah Kirby
text: You get +1 [intellect]. [reaction] After Jeremiah Kirby enters play, choose "even" or "odd:" Reveal the top 5 cards of your deck. Draw each card with a cost that matches the chosen option. Shuffle the remaining cards into your deck.

name: Archive of Conduits
text: Limit 1 per deck. As an additional cost to play this asset, place 1 resource on 4 different locations, as leylines. [reaction] After you successfully investigate a location with a leyline, exhaust this asset: Move that leyline onto this asset. Then, if there are 4 leylines on it, discard it, take its leylines as resources, and record in your Campaign Log that "you have identified the gateway."

name: Written in the Stars
text: Fast. Play only during your turn. Discard the top card of your deck. If that card is a weakness, shuffle it back into your deck. Otherwise, for the remainder of your turn, while that card is in your discard pile, commit it to each eligible skill test you perform.

name: Hiking Boots
text: Limit 1 [[Footwear]] per investigator. You get +1 [agility]. [reaction] After the last clue is discovered from your location, exhaust Hiking Boots: Move to a connecting location with at least 1 clue, or to a connecting unrevealed location.

name: Join the Caravan
text: Fast. Play only during your turn. Reduce the cost of this card by 1 for each different class among cards you control. Move to any revealed location.

name: Survey the Area
text: While Survey the Area is in your hand or committed to a skill test, it gains [intellect] icons equal to your [agility], and [agility] icons equal to your [intellect].

name: Medical Texts
text: [action]: Choose an investigator at your location and test [intellect] (2). If you succeed, heal 1 damage from that investigator (2 damage instead if you succeed by 2 or more). If you fail, you must either exhaust Medical Texts or deal 1 damage to that investigator.

name: Unearth the Ancients
text: Investigate. Choose up to 2 [seeker] assets in your hand. The difficulty of this skill test is equal to the combined cost of the chosen assets. If you succeed, put the chosen assets into play, one at a time. For each [[Relic]] asset put into play by this ability, draw 1 card.

name: Scientific Theory
text: Fast. Limit 1 [[Composure]] in play. You get +1 [intellect] and +1 [combat]. Non-direct damage/horror must be assigned to Scientific Theory before it can be assigned to your investigator card. [fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [intellect] or +1 [combat] for this skill test.

name: Archive of Conduits
text: Researched. Uses (4 leylines). Limit 1 per deck. [fast]: Move 1 leyline from this asset to a non-[[Elite]] enemy. [action]: Choose an investigator, and an enemy with a leyline at a revealed location. That investigator moves to that location. You may remove the leyline to deal 1 damage to that enemy.

name: Archive of Conduits
text: Researched. Uses (4 leylines). Limit 1 per deck. [fast]: Move 1 leyline from this asset to a revealed location. [action]: Choose an investigator and a revealed location with a leyline. That investigator moves to that location. You may remove the leyline to have them take an investigate action.

name: Archive of Conduits
text: Researched. Uses (4 leylines). Limit 1 per deck. [fast]: Move 1 leyline from this asset to a non-[[Elite]] enemy. [action]: Choose an investigator engaged with an enemy with a leyline. That investigator disengages from that enemy and moves to a connecting location. You may remove the leyline to automatically evade that enemy. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Archive of Conduits
text: Researched. Uses (4 leylines). Limit 1 per deck. [fast]: Move 1 leyline from this asset to an investigator. [action]: Choose an investigator with a leyline. That investigator draws 1 card and heals 1 damage or 1 horror. You may remove the leyline to have them instead draw 2 cards and heal 2 damage or 2 horror.

name: Prophesiae Profana
text: While you are not at the locus, you get +1 [intellect], +1 [agility], and you may ignore attacks of opportunity. [reaction] After Prophesiae Profana enters play: Choose a revealed location. That location is "the locus" until Prophesiae Profana leaves play. [action]: Move any investigator to the locus.

name: Underworld Support
text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Purchase at deck creation. Your deck cannot include more than 1 copy of each non-weakness, non-signature card (by title). Reduce your deck size by 5.

name: Scout Ahead
text: Move. Move up to 3 times. Enemies do not engage you during this movement.

name: 21 or Bust
text: One at a time, reveal random tokens from the chaos bag until you choose to stop. Treat each [skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing] as a 5; the [auto_fail] as a 10; and the [elder_sign] as either a 1 or an 11. If the combined value of those tokens (ignoring +/-) is... - ...18 or less, gain 4 resources. - ...19, gain 5 resources. - ...20, gain 6 resources. - ...21, gain 9 resources.

name: Counterespionage
text: Fast. Play when you draw a non-weakness treachery. Cancel that card's revelation effect and draw the top card of the encounter deck. [reaction] When you play Counterespionage, increase its cost by 2: Change "the encounter deck" to "your deck". [reaction] When you play Counterespionage, increase its cost by 2: Change "you" to "any investigator".

name: Cheat the System
text: Fast. Play during any [fast] window. Gain 1 resource for each different class among cards you control.

name: Untimely Transaction
text: Reveal an [[Item]] asset in your hand. Another investigator at your location may play that asset as if it were in their hand. If they do, draw 1 card and gain resources equal to that asset's printed cost.

name: Savant
text: Savant gains [wild] icons equal to your lowest skill other than the skill being tested.

name: The Red Clock
text: Exceptional. Uses (0 charges). Forced - After your turn begins: Either place 1 charge here, or take all charges here, as resources. Then, if it has exactly... - 1 charge, you get +3 skill value for your next skill test. - 2 charges, you may move up to 2 times. - 3 charges, you may take an additional action this turn.

name: Money Talks
text: Fast. Play when an investigator at any location initiates a skill test. Instead of the skill type indicated for this test ([willpower], [intellect], [combat], or [agility]), this is a resource skill test. The performing investigator's base skill value for this test is equal to half the number of resources in your resource pool (rounded down). Draw 1 card.

name: Black Market
text: Fast. Play at the start of the investigation phase. One at a time, reveal cards from the top of any investigator deck(s) until exactly 5 cards have been revealed. Set those cards aside, out of play. While set aside, any investigator may play any of those cards as if they were in their hand. At the start of the next investigation phase, shuffle each of those cards still set aside into its owner's deck.

name: Moxie
text: Fast. Limit 1 [[Composure]] in play. You get +1 [willpower] and +1 [agility]. Non-direct damage/horror must be assigned to Moxie before it can be assigned to your investigator card. [fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [willpower] or +1 [agility] for this skill test.

name: The Black Fan
text: Exceptional. While you have... - ...10+ resources, you get +1 health and +1 sanity. - ...15+ resources, you may take one additional action during your turn. - ...20+ resources, you get +1 to each of your skills.

name: The Red Clock
text: Exceptional. Uses (0 charges). Forced - After your turn begins: You may take all charges here, as resources. Place 1 charge here. If it has exactly... - 1 charge, you get +4 skill value for your next skill test. - 2 charges, you may move up to 3 times. - 3 charges, you may take 2 additional actions this turn.

name: Down the Rabbit Hole
text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Purchase at deck creation. After each scenario of a campaign, reduce the experience cost of the first 2 cards you upgrade before the next scenario by 1. Increase the experience cost for you to purchase new cards by 1.

name: Dragon Pole
text: You have 1 additional arcane slot. [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack for each of your arcane slots that is filled. If at least 2 of your arcane slots are filled, this attack deals +1 damage.

name: Meditative Trance
text: For each of your arcane slots that is filled, either heal 1 damage or 1 horror.

name: Close the Circle
text: Uses (1 charge for each class among cards you control, including this one). [fast] Spend 1 charge and exhaust Close the Circle: Take a basic action. For each skill test performed during that action, you may use your [willpower] instead of the skill indicated for that action.

name: Winds of Power
text: Place 2 charges on an asset you control. [reaction] After you draw Winds of Power during your turn: Play it.

name: Foresight
text: Fast. Play when an investigator at your location would draw a card from their deck or from the encounter deck. Name a card. If the drawn card is the named card, that investigator may either (choose one): - Cancel that card's effects and discard it. - Immediately play that card at -2 cost.

name: Occult Theory
text: While Occult Theory is in your hand or committed to a skill test, it gains [willpower] icons equal to your [intellect], and [intellect] icons equal to your [willpower].

name: Parallel Fates
text: Look at the top 6 cards of an investigator's deck or the encounter deck. You may either return them to the top of that deck in any order, or shuffle them into that deck. If you looked at an investigator's deck, that investigator may draw 1 card.

name: Astronomical Atlas
text: [fast] Exhaust Astronomical Atlas: Look at the top card of your deck. If it is not a weakness, attach it facedown to Astronomical Atlas (max 5 cards attached). [fast]: Commit a card attached to Astronomical Atlas to an eligible skill test. If that test succeeds, add that card to your hand instead of discarding it. (Limit once per test.)

name: Healing Words
text: Uses (4 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Heal 2 damage from among investigators at your location.

name: Grounded
text: Fast. Limit 1 [[Composure]] in play. You get +1 skill value during skill tests on [[Spell]] cards. Non-direct damage/horror must be assigned to Grounded before it can be assigned to your investigator card. [fast] During a skill test on a [[Spell]] card, spend 1 resource: You get +1 skill value for this test.

name: True Magick
text: Uses (1 charge). Replenish this charge at the start of each round. You may resolve abilities on [[Spell]] assets in your hand by revealing them from your hand. Treat True Magick as if it were the revealed asset (to pay its costs, spend charges, perfom its effect, etc) .

name: Short Supply
text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Purchase at deck creation. Forced - When your first turn of the game begins: Discard the top 10 cards of your deck.

name: Schoffner's Catalogue
text: Uses (5 secrets). If Schoffner's Catalogue has no secrets, discard it. You may spend secrets on Schoffner's Catalogue as resources to pay for [[Item]] assets played by any investigator at your location.

name: Bandages
text: Uses (3 supplies). If Bandages has no supplies, discard it. [reaction] After an investigator or [[Ally]] asset at your location takes 1 or more damage, spend 1 supply: Heal 1 damage from that card.

name: Jury-Rig
text: Uses (3 durability). Attach to an [[Item]] asset controlled by an investigator at your location. [fast] During a skill test on attached asset, spend 1 durability: You get +2 skill value for this test.

name: Bangle of Jinxes
text: Uses (1 charge). [fast] Spend 1 charge: You get +2 skill value for this test. (Limit once per test.) [reaction] After an enemy attacks you: Place 1 charge on Bangle of Jinxes.

name: Burn After Reading
text: Exile a level 0-5 card in your hand. Discover 2 clues at your location. If the exiled card was level 2 or higher, remove 1 doom from the current agenda. Exile Burn After Reading. Card designed by the Council-in-Exile at Gen Con 2020

name: Strength in Numbers
text: Strength in Numbers gains a [wild] icon for each different class among cards you control.

name: Dauntless Spirit
text: While Dauntless Spirit is in your hand or committed to a skill test, it gains [willpower] icons equal to your [combat], and [combat] icons equal to your [willpower].

name: Blood Will Have Blood
